TL;DR: 本文探讨了如何在自然语言处理（NLP）中操作化“文化”概念，指出文化对齐需多元认识论而非仅增加文化样本，并基于五层技术活动模型分析现有NLP研究的文化处理方式，发现多数方法仍停留在表层输出或表征，忽视权力、治理与社会语境等深层问题，最终主张采用反思性、多元的社会技术路径来应对文化多样性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索如何在NLP中操作化‘文化’，揭示在技术设计中纳入多元文化背景的可能性与局限，挑战仅靠数据扩展实现文化对齐的简化思路。

Method: 采用社会技术视角，运用‘语言技术设计五层活动模型’系统梳理和分析NLP中处理文化的相关方法。

Result: 发现当前NLP研究虽在文化敏感性上有所进展，但多数方法仍局部化，集中于输出或表征层面，未能触及权力结构、治理机制与社会语境等深层维度。

Conclusion: 操作化文化远不止技术适配，需走向一种反思性、多元的社会技术路径，审慎权衡计算形式化在包容多语言与多元文化背景中的潜力与边界。

Abstract: The paper explores how "culture" can be operationalised in Natural Language Processing (NLP) and what this reveals about the possibilities and limits of considering a plurality of cultural backgrounds in technological design. It proposes that cultural alignment cannot be achieved only by adding more examples of "other cultures", rather it requires plural epistemologies: allowing multiple, locally grounded ways of knowing. To analyze how this plurality of knowing can be addressed in NLP, the paper uses a socio-technical model of language technology (LT) design, the five layers of technological activity model, for collecting and systematizing approaches to culture in NLP. The analysis shows that while NLP research has made progress toward more culturally sensitive systems, many approaches remain partial, addressing "culture" primarily at the level of output or representation while leaving deeper questions of power, governance, and social context unresolved. The paper concludes that operationalising culture requires much more than technical adaptation; it suggests a reflexive and plural socio-technical approach that navigates potentials and limits of computational formalisation for accounting multiple linguistic and socio-cultural backgrounds.

</details>


### [372] [From Recognition to Understanding: Unlocking Cognitive Time Series Reasoning with LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22126)
*Xin Qiu,Junlong Tong,Yao Zhang,Yunpu Ma,Wei Zhang,Xiaoyu Shen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出TSCognition多模态基准和TSAlign统一框架，旨在提升大语言模型在时间序列推理任务中的表现，通过将时间序列编码为紧凑的块级表示并与LLM语义空间对齐，显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列分析与大语言模型结合的方式局限于曲线拟合式预测，忽视了真实世界时序决策所需的语义理解、上下文感知和复杂推理能力。

Method: 构建TSCognition多维时序推理基准（含41K问答样本、5类认知任务），并提出TSAlign框架：采用分块编码、门控残差注入和多变量融合，将时序信号对齐到LLM嵌入空间的语义方向。

Result: TSAlign在TSCognition和TimerBed基准上均超越现有LLM、VLM及时间序列问答方法，同时大幅降低计算开销。

Conclusion: 将时间序列建模从低层预测转向高层认知推理，并通过语义对齐桥接时序与语言模型，是提升LLM时序理解能力的有效路径。

Abstract: Time series analysis has recently been coupled with Large Language Models (LLMs) to leverage their reasoning and world knowledge capabilities, yet gains remain limited. We attribute this to a fundamental mismatch between existing task formulations and LLM strengths: most settings reduce time series understanding to curve-fitting systems, focusing on low-level prediction while ignoring the semantic, contextual, and reasoning-intensive nature of real-world temporal decision-making.To address these limitations, we introduce TSCognition, a multimodal benchmark for multi-dimensional time series reasoning. It collects real-world time series and textual information from 15 public sources and constructs approximately 41K QA samples around five cognitive reasoning tasks: Decoding, Grounding, Inferring, Extrapolating, and Acting. Building on this, we further propose TSAlign, a unified framework that encodes time series into compact patch-level representations and aligns them with semantic directions in the LLM embedding space via gated residual injection and multivariate fusion.Experiments show that TSAlign outperforms existing LLM, VLM, and time series QA baselines on TSCognition and the publicly available TimerBed benchmark while substantially reducing computational cost.Code is available at: [https://github.com/EIT-NLP/CognitiveTSR](https://github.com/EIT-NLP/CognitiveTSR)

</details>


### [373] [BioMatrix: Towards a Comprehensive Biological Foundation Model Spanning the Modality Matrix of Sequences, Structures, and Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22138)
*Qizhi Pei,Zhimeng Zhou,Yi Duan,Yiyang Zhao,Wei Li,Han Guo,Liang He,Chengping Li,Chang-Yu Hsieh,Conghui He,Rui Yan,Lijun Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: BioMatrix 是首个原生支持分子与蛋白质的序列、结构及自然语言的多模态基础模型，采用统一的离散 token 空间和单一大语言模型架构，实现跨模态、跨实体的端到端生成与理解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生物基础模型在原生多模态融合与跨实体覆盖之间存在权衡：多模态模型通常限于单一实体类型，而跨实体模型则缺乏原生结构建模或依赖适配器设计，无法原生生成所读取的模态。

Method: 提出统一 tokenization 方案，将分子（SMILES/SELFIES）、分子结构、蛋白序列、蛋白结构及自然语言映射至共享离散 token 空间，在纯 decoder-only 架构（基于 Qwen3）下以单一 next-token 预测目标联合训练；无外部编码器、投影适配器或模态专用输出头。

Result: 在涵盖 6 类共 80 项下游任务（含单/多实体、跨/模内理解与生成）中，BioMatrix 在 77 项上达到 SOTA 或具竞争力性能。

Conclusion: 证明单一、原生多模态通用模型可有效匹配甚至超越各类专用模型，在广泛生物任务中具备统一建模潜力。

Abstract: We present BioMatrix, the first multimodal foundation model that natively integrates sequences, structures, and natural language for both molecules and proteins within a single decoder-only architecture. Existing biological foundation models pursue native multimodality and broad entity coverage separately: those that fuse multiple modalities under a shared objective remain confined to a single entity type, while those spanning multiple entity types either omit explicit structural modeling or rely on adapter-based designs in which the model cannot natively generate the very modalities it can read. BioMatrix closes this gap by mapping molecular sequences (supporting both SMILES and SELFIES notations), molecular structures, protein sequences, protein structures, and natural language into a shared discrete token space through a unified tokenization scheme, so that all modalities are consumed and produced uniformly under a single next-token prediction objective -- without external encoders, projection adapters, or modality-specific output heads. Built upon the Qwen3 language model (1.7B and 4B), BioMatrix is continually pretrained on 304.4 billion tokens spanning general and domain-specific text, sequence and structure views of molecules and proteins, and cross-modal corpora that interleave biomolecular entities with scientific text and link distinct entities through molecule-protein and protein-protein interaction data. After tuning on a comprehensive suite of downstream applications covering 80 tasks across 6 categories -- encompassing single-entity and multi-entity understanding and generation tasks across and within modalities -- BioMatrix achieves state-of-the-art or competitive performance on 77 out of 80 tasks, demonstrating that a single, natively multimodal generalist model can effectively match or surpass specialized approaches across a wide range of biological tasks.

</details>


### [374] [The Score Granularity Gap in Black-Box LLM Classification: A Comparative Study of Confidence Constructions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22179)
*Ao Sun,Tian Sun,Jiaxing Geng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了大语言模型（LLM）作为黑盒分类器在选择性预测中的置信度评分粒度问题，提出“评分粒度间隙”概念，发现单次口头化置信度虽排序效果好但取值离散、阈值选择粗糙，并系统比较七种置信度构建方法在25个模型-数据对上的表现与代价权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作关注LLM置信度的校准性或排序性，但忽略了部署中关键问题：置信度评分能支持多细粒度的阈值设定？即操作员实际可用的决策阈值数量。

Method: 通过控制实验，系统比较七种置信度构造方式（如单次口头化数字、token概率、多次查询聚合等），在9个LLM和3个基准共25个模型-数据对上评估其粒度间隙、排序性能与推理开销。

Result: 单次口头化置信度经正确转换后排序能力较强，但仅取少数离散值，导致粒度间隙大；多查询聚合可提升弱模型性能，却可能损害强模型排序；不同构造方法在粒度、排序、成本间存在明确权衡。

Conclusion: 置信度评分的粒度间隙是影响LLM实际部署的关键维度；应根据模型强度、成本约束与风险要求选择合适构造方式，并提供面向操作员的阈值选择指南。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as black-box classifiers in pipelines that automate confident decisions and route uncertain ones to human review. Such selective prediction needs a confidence score that an operator can threshold at a chosen risk level. Prior work asks whether LLM confidence is well calibrated or well ranked; we ask a complementary, deployment-oriented question that has been largely overlooked: at what resolution can the score be thresholded? We call the answer the score granularity gap. Through a controlled comparison of seven ways to build a confidence score, from a single verbalized number, to token probabilities, to querying the model many times and combining the answers, across 25 model-dataset pairs (9 LLMs, 3 benchmarks), we find that single-shot verbalized confidence, once correctly converted to a class probability, ranks cases surprisingly well, yet takes only a handful of distinct values. It therefore offers an operator only a few coarse thresholds, no matter how well it ranks. We show which constructions widen this gap, at what inference cost, and with what effect on ranking, notably that multi-query aggregation helps weak models but can degrade already-strong ones. We translate these trade-offs into concrete deployment guidance.

</details>


### [375] [Lexical Consensus: Grounded Word Learning and Shared Meaning in Artificial Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22207)
*Patricio M. Vera*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Lexical Consensus框架，研究AI如何从具身感知经验中习得、稳定并使用新词汇意义；发现词汇习得能力受感知距离主导的‘感知一致性梯度’调控，且命名与检索是两个不同机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI评估多关注任务表现和行为模仿，忽视其是否能从具身经验中真正习得并稳定使用新词汇意义，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 基于冻结的DINOv2视觉嵌入、Carroll式伪词、可解释的词汇学习器与线性基线，构建Lexical Consensus实验框架，在结构化感知基底上测试人工标签习得、双向泛化与稳定性。

Result: 发现稳健的感知一致性梯度：原生类别最易习得，连贯过扩展仍可学，中程析取概念性能下降，远析取概念接近随机水平；CIFAR-100分离实验证实该梯度由感知距离（而非语义距离）主导；双向评估揭示命名与检索机制分离，示例驱动机制在标签到图像检索中优于质心原型。

Conclusion: 冻结的感知几何结构既支撑词汇具身 grounding，也构成习得边界；若无表征自适应，AI难以习得远离感知结构的抽象或析取概念。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence systems are commonly evaluated through task performance and behavioral imitation, but such evaluations leave open whether an artificial agent can acquire, stabilize, and use new lexical meanings from grounded experience. This paper introduces Lexical Consensus, an experimental framework for studying grounded word learning over a structured perceptual substrate. Using frozen DINOv2 visual embeddings, Carroll-style nonce words, and interpretable lexical learners plus linear baselines, we test whether agents can acquire artificial labels for visual concepts, generalize them bidirectionally, and stabilize them across controlled settings.
  The main result is a robust perceptual-coherence gradient: native categories are easiest to learn, coherent overextensions remain learnable, mid-range disjunctive concepts degrade, and far-disjunctive concepts approach chance. A pre-registered CIFAR-100 dissociation experiment confirms that this gradient is governed by perceptual distance rather than semantic relatedness: perceptual distance predicts acquisition accuracy (partial R^2 = 0.245, p < 1e-7), while semantic distance adds no significant explanatory power (partial R^2 = 0.002, p = 0.660).
  Bidirectional evaluation shows that naming and retrieval are distinct: exemplar-based mechanisms outperform centroid prototypes in label-to-image retrieval, exposing a memory-fidelity dimension separate from naming accuracy. Falsification controls, homogeneous candidate-pool evaluations, and null results on representational restructuring indicate that frozen perceptual geometry both enables lexical grounding and limits what can be acquired without representational adaptation.

</details>


### [376] [Evaluating Large Language Models for Hausa and Fongbe Machine Translation: Benchmarks, Failures, and Metric Reliability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22269)
*Mahounan Pericles Adjovi,Roald Eiselen,Prasenjit Mitra*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文评估了当前大语言模型在英语到豪萨语和丰贝语翻译任务上的表现，发现模型性能因语言而异，自动指标与人工评价的相关性也显著不同，尤其神经指标存在嵌入坍缩问题，建议对低资源非洲语言采用多指标评估，并需至少2500句样本以确保结果稳定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估当前大语言模型在两种典型西非低资源语言（豪萨语和丰贝语）上的翻译质量，并检验常用自动评估指标是否能可靠反映人类判断。

Method: 使用GPT-4o Mini、Claude Sonnet 4、Gemini 2.5 Flash和Qwen2.5-7B四个模型，在500至10,000句规模上进行英-豪萨/英-丰贝翻译；采用BLEU、chrF++、TER、COMET、BERTScore等自动指标，并与母语者人工评分对比；分析指标-人类相关性（Spearman rho）、模型排序一致性及嵌入相似性。

Result: 1）豪萨语翻译质量较好（人工分4.0–4.5/5），丰贝语差（1.0–2.2/5），BLEU差距达3倍；2）模型排名因语言而异（Gemini优丰贝，GPT-4o优豪萨）；3）自动指标与人工评分相关性差异大（丰贝rho=1.0，豪萨rho=0.5），且BERTScore等出现嵌入坍缩（相似度>0.99）；4）需≥2500句才能获得稳定系统排序。

Conclusion: 低资源非洲语言的机器翻译评估不能依赖单一自动指标，尤其需警惕神经指标失效；应采用多指标联合评估，并保证足够大的测试集规模（≥2500句）。

Abstract: We investigate the translation quality of current large language models (LLMs) for English-to-Hausa and English-to-Fongbe - two typologically distinct West African languages from the Afroasiatic and Niger-Congo families respectively - and evaluate whether standard automatic metrics reliably reflect human judgment for these low-resource languages. We evaluate four models (GPT-4o Mini, Claude Sonnet 4, Gemini 2.5 Flash, and Qwen2.5-7B) at progressive scales (500 to 10,000 sentences) using automatic metrics (BLEU, chrF++, TER, COMET, BERTScore) validated against native-speaker judgment. Our results reveal three key findings. First, translation quality varies substantially by language: Hausa achieves acceptable quality (human scores 4.0-4.5/5) while Fongbe achieves poor quality (1.0-2.2/5), with a consistent 3x BLEU gap across all systems. Second, model rankings differ by language - Gemini leads for Fongbe while GPT-4o leads for Hausa by human evaluation - indicating that performance on one low-resource African language does not predict performance on another. Third, metric-human correlation varies dramatically: perfect rank correlation for Fongbe (rho=1.0) but weak correlation for Hausa (rho=0.5), where human evaluators preferred GPT-4o despite all automatic metrics ranking Claude first. We further show that neural metrics like BERTScore exhibit embedding collapse (within-language similarity >0.99) for both languages, limiting their ability to differentiate translation quality. Based on these findings, we recommend multi-metric evaluation for low-resource African languages, with particular caution when interpreting neural metrics. We establish that minimum sample sizes of n=2,500 sentences are required for stable system rankings, as smaller samples produced artifact findings that reversed at scale.

</details>


### [377] [MixedPEFT: Combining Multiple PEFT Methods with Mixed Objectives for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22272)
*Mohammed Rawhani,Dervis Karaboga,Ozkan Ufuk Nalbantoglu,Alper Basturk,Bahriye Akay*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合可逆适配器与LoRA的参数高效混合目标训练方法，用于无监督领域自适应，在仅训练7%参数的情况下，在MNLI跨20个领域任务上超越现有参数高效及全参数微调方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练语言模型在新领域应用时面临全量微调计算开销大和灾难性遗忘问题，亟需参数高效的无监督领域自适应方案。

Method: 提出一种定制化的参数高效微调（PEFT）架构，融合可逆适配器与LoRA，并采用混合目标训练：在有标签源域数据上优化分类任务，在无标签目标域数据上联合优化掩码语言建模（MLM）。

Result: 在MNLI的20个领域迁移任务上，相较UDapter、DANN和DSN分别提升1.41、1.26和0.86个百分点，仅使用7%可训练参数。

Conclusion: 精心设计的PEFT组合与并行多目标优化能同时优于现有参数高效方法和全量微调基线，为参数高效无监督领域自适应树立新基准。

Abstract: Pre-trained language models struggle when applied to new domains, as full fine-tuning is computationally expensive and prone to catastrophic forgetting. This study addresses this challenge by presenting a novel parameter-efficient strategy for unsupervised domain adaptation that combines custom PEFT architectures with mixed-objective training. Our approach simultaneously optimizes classification performance on labeled source domain data and masked language modeling (MLM) on unlabeled target domain data, preserving target domain knowledge while adapting to source domain tasks. Our method employs a custom union of invertible adapters and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) within a unified parameter-efficient framework. Through comprehensive evaluation on the Multi-Genre Natural Language Inference (MNLI) dataset across 20 domain shifts, our approach achieves significant improvements over existing methods: 1.41 percentage points over the current parameter-efficient state-of-the-art UDapter, 1.26 percentage points over the fully-tuned DANN baseline, and 0.86 percentage points over DSN, while utilizing only 7% of the model's trainable parameters. These results establish new benchmarks for parameter-efficient unsupervised domain adaptation and demonstrate that carefully designed PEFT combinations with concurrent optimization can outperform both existing parameter-efficient methods and traditional fully-tuned approaches.

</details>


### [378] [From Speech to Text Corpora: Evaluating ASR-Based Data Acquisition for Low-Resource Fongbe and Hausa](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22274)
*Mahounan Pericles Adjovi,Victor Olufemi,Roald Eiselen,Prasenjit Mitra*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探讨了利用ASR（自动语音识别）管道扩展低资源非洲语言文本语料库的可行性，针对贝宁的丰贝语（Fongbe）和西非广泛使用的豪萨语（Hausa）进行了实验。通过微调MMS-300M模型，在Fongbe上实现了9.48%的WER（词错误率），相较基线大幅下降78%；对Hausa则使用已有的Whisper-Small模型处理大量YouTube视频，生成约6770个转录片段。人工评估显示Hausa转录质量尚可接受，而Fongbe仍需后处理或模型改进。作者公开了数据集、模型和转录语料。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低资源非洲语言缺乏用于训练语言模型的文本语料库，亟需低成本、可扩展的方法扩充文本资源。

Method: 对Fongbe使用12.3小时手工整理语音数据微调MMS-300M模型；对Hausa采用已有Whisper-Small模型，从1553个YouTube视频中筛选424个（共45.49小时）进行转录，并人工评估质量。

Result: Fongbe WER达9.48%，较基线降低78%；Hausa生成6770个转录片段，人工评分57.4/100；Fongbe人工评分仅36.5/100，质量不足。

Conclusion: ASR可用于拓展Hausa等部分非洲语言的文本资源，但对Fongbe等带声调、含丰富变音符号的语言，当前模型仍需改进或辅以后处理；所构建资源全部开源。

Abstract: Low-resource African languages lack text corpora needed for language model training. We investigate whether ASR pipelines can extend text resources for two typologically distinct West African languages: Fongbe (tonal, diacritic-rich) and Hausa (non-tonal). We fine-tune MMS-300M on a curated 12.3-hour Fongbe dataset, achieving 9.48% WER on the ALFFA benchmark - a 78% relative reduction from the prior 44.04% baseline - while preserving tonal diacritics critical to the language. For Hausa, we apply an existing fine-tuned Whisper-Small model. We catalog 1,553 YouTube videos (236 hours) and process a subset of 424 videos (45.49 hours) selected to balance domain diversity with available computational resources, producing 6,770 transcribed segments. Human evaluation on 50 randomly sampled segments per language shows mean quality scores of 57.4/100 for Hausa and 36.5/100 for Fongbe, indicating that while Hausa transcriptions approach acceptable quality for corpus construction, Fongbe transcriptions require post-processing or improved models for production use. We release the curated dataset, fine-tuned model, transcribed corpus, and full video catalog following platform terms and ethical guidelines.

</details>


### [379] [Learning at the Right Pace: Adaptive Data Scheduling Improves LLM Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22305)
*Zicheng Xu,Ruixuan Zhang,Yu-Neng Chuang,Xiuyi Lou,Hoang Anh Duy Le,Oren Gal,Alexander S. Szalay,Zhaozhuo Xu,Guanchu Wang,Vladimir Braverman*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为自适应数据调度（ADS）的双层数据调度框架，用于改进大语言模型（LLMs）强化学习后训练过程中的数据采样策略，显著提升了推理性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL后训练多采用均匀数据采样，忽略了训练数据的语义结构和策略能力的动态变化，导致训练效率与效果受限。

Method: ADS包含两个层次：簇级调度——按语义模式组织样本并自适应调整簇间分布；样本级调度——在簇内选择策略边界样本以提供高信息量的相对优势信号。

Result: 在三个LLM和七个推理基准上，ADS平均准确率比GRPO提升5.2%，且对不同目标设计的RL方法均具兼容性和增益效果。

Conclusion: ADS是一种通用、有效的数据调度策略，有望成为LLM RL后训练的标准组件。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve remarkable reasoning capabilities through reinforcement learning (RL) post-training. However, existing RL post-training commonly relies on uniform data sampling, which ignores the semantic structure of the training data and the changing capability of the training policy. To address these limitations, we propose Adaptive Data Scheduling (ADS), a dual-level data scheduling framework for pacing RL post-training that replaces uniform sampling with an adaptive distribution over semantic clusters and policy-boundary sample selection. At the cluster level, ADS organizes samples according to semantic patterns and maintains an adaptive inter-cluster distribution to solidify current training progress. At the sample level, ADS performs intra-cluster scheduling to continuously sample policy-boundary samples, which provides informative relative advantages. Experimental results across three LLMs and seven reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that ADS improves average accuracy by 5.2% over Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Notably, ADS consistently improves RL methods with different objective designs, highlighting its potential as a general data scheduling strategy for LLM RL post-training. The source code is available at: https://github.com/Richard-zrx/ADS.

</details>


### [380] [BabelJudge: Measuring LLM-as-a-Judge Reliability Across Languages and Agent Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22329)
*Shreyas KC*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出BabelJudge，一个开源基准与可靠性审计框架，用于检测LLM-as-a-judge中的四大偏差：位置偏差、冗长偏差、顺序不一致性及跨语言性能退化，无需人工标注；通过可控扰动生成金标准对，并在多语言与智能体评估场景中验证其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM-as-a-judge方法存在隐藏系统性偏差（位置、冗长、顺序不一致、跨语言退化），而传统准确率指标无法揭示这些缺陷，亟需无监督、低成本的可靠性评估框架。

Method: 提出‘降级生成金标’方法：从高质量参考响应施加可控扰动构造已知偏好的数据对；设计四维偏差度量体系，并扩展至智能体轨迹级评估（含9种扰动和3个新指标）；支持11种裁判模型后端。

Result: 在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-4bit上验证：Swahili语可靠性得分（0.550）显著低于Hindi（0.714），且顺序一致性仅0.480；原始准确率掩盖了这些严重问题；新增轨迹级指标可有效识别工具误用、幻觉与长度偏好。

Conclusion: BabelJudge提供了一种免人工、多维度、可扩展的LLM裁判可靠性评估范式，揭示了当前评估方法的根本局限，并为公平、鲁棒的多语言与智能体评估奠定基础。

Abstract: LLM-as-a-judge has become the dominant approach to scalable evaluation in NLP pipelines, yet judges themselves carry systematic biases that raw accuracy hides: they favor responses placed in slot A (position bias), they prefer longer responses regardless of quality (verbosity bias), and their reliability degrades sharply in lower-resource languages. We introduce BabelJudge, an open-source benchmark and reliability audit framework that measures all four failure modes -- position bias, verbosity bias, order inconsistency, and cross-lingual degradation -- on any judge model, without requiring human preference labels. The key insight is gold-labelling by degradation: starting from a high-quality reference response and applying a controlled perturbation yields a pairwise item whose gold label is known by construction, eliminating annotation cost. We evaluate Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-4bit across English, Hindi, Arabic, and Swahili and find that our composite bias-penalised reliability score drops from 0.714 in Hindi to 0.550 in Swahili, a gap that raw accuracy (0.835 vs. 0.660) understates. Swahili order consistency collapses to 0.480, meaning judge verdicts are near-random under slot-order swaps -- a failure mode invisible to accuracy alone. We further extend the framework to agentic evaluation via nine trajectory-level perturbations (argument corruption, tool swaps, hallucinated calls, missing steps) and three new metrics: tool accuracy, hallucination detection rate, and trajectory-length bias. BabelJudge is released as a Python package supporting 11 judge backends. Code: https://github.com/Shreyaskc/BabelJudge

</details>


### [381] [How Does Research Evolve? Tracing Cross-Domain Trajectories in NLP, ML, and CV with Claim-Grounded Typed Citations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22342)
*Abdul Muntakim,Md Abdullah Al Hafiz Khan,Sadid Hasan,Yong Pei*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了SciTraj语料库，首个基于声明的、带类型标注的引用图谱，通过将引用边与具体声明句子关联，并结合NLI验证和规则筛选构建六类关系边，支持对科研演进路径、学科壁垒及主题涌现等现象的细粒度分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有引用图谱将多种引用动机（如方法扩展、局限改进、未来方向实现、观点争议）统一为同质化边，难以刻画科学进展的多样性；亟需一种能区分引用背后具体声明动机的细粒度结构化数据支撑科研演化建模与预测。

Method: 构建SciTraj语料库：从NLP、ML、Vision领域32,559篇论文中提取声明句，定义六类引用关系（四类NLI验证的声明驱动型 + 两类基于摘要相似性与年份规则的相似型），共生成573,126条有向边；并提供长路径统计、时序链接预测基准、年份混洗可证伪性检验及人工标注一致性评估。

Result: 发现学科间引用流动存在明显‘孤岛化’现象；主题涌现集中于计算机视觉与大语言模型相关工作；语料库覆盖72.8%论文、含2.87亿条长度≥3的类型化轨迹；链接预测基准与时序检验验证了其结构有效性与标注可靠性（κ=0.74，精度79.9%）。

Conclusion: SciTraj首次实现了引用关系的声明级细粒度建模，为定量研究科学演化机制、预测研究趋势及构建下一代科研知识图谱提供了高质量基础设施与实证基础。

Abstract: How does research evolve, and what substrate would let us forecast where it goes next? Scientific progress is not simply a uniform accumulation of facts: ideas extend prior methods, address known limitations, realize proposed future directions, and sometimes dispute earlier claims. Existing citation graphs usually collapse these roles into a single homogeneous edge type, limiting how we can analyze scientific progress. We address this gap by proposing the SciTraj corpus, the first claim-grounded typed citation graph in which each edge is linked to the specific claim sentence that motivates it. Claim-bearing sentences are extracted from paper sections; four claim-driven relations are verified by NLI entailment against in-paper context, while two similarity-only relations are gated by abstract cosine and year-gap rules. SciTraj contains 32,559 papers from NLP, ML, and Vision (2015--2024), connected by 573,126 directed edges across six relation types, with NLI-verified claim seeds. Using SciTraj, we identify disciplinary siloing in typed citation flow and topic emergence concentrated in Vision and LLM-related work. The corpus also contains 287M typed trajectories of length $\geq 3$, covering 72.8% of papers, and supports a temporally split typed link-prediction benchmark. A year-shuffle falsifiability test separates temporal structure from year-correlated content, and a 3-annotator pilot reports $κ= 0.74$ with 79.9% precision.

</details>


### [382] [Curiosity as Linguistic Intervention: Using LLM Tutoring Dialogues to Influence Exploratory Learning Behavior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22349)
*Gevindu Ganganath,Pasindu Bolonghege,Qianru Lyu,Pradeep Varakantham,Thivya Kandappu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出CURIOBOT框架，利用大语言模型（LLMs）通过操控新奇性、复杂性、冲突与不确定性等贝伦内(collative)变量，实施好奇心驱动的对话式教学干预，并验证其显著提升学习者的探索性行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究语言如何塑造探索性认知，特别是通过LLM在推理阶段系统操控对话策略，以研究好奇心对学习行为的影响。

Method: 构建CURIOBOT框架，将Berlyne的collative变量（新奇性、复杂性、冲突、不确定性）转化为自适应语言干预策略；开展270场跨模型家族、领域与主题难度的辅导对话实验；设计以学习者为中心的评估框架，量化探索性提问、对话主体性、有效挣扎与可观测好奇心。

Result: 好奇心导向的干预显著提升学习者探索行为，在固定时间预算下对话轮次最多增加2.4倍；学习者侧收益独立于教师端教学质量变化，表明好奇心是一种部分独立的交互层面机制。

Conclusion: LLM支持的对话可作为可扩展的实验平台，用于系统研究语言如何塑造探索性学习行为；CURIOBOT为基于语言干预激发学习好奇心提供了可操作框架。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) provide a new opportunity to study how language shapes exploratory cognition because conversational strategies can be systematically manipulated at inference time. We introduce CURIOBOT, a framework that operationalizes Berlyne's collative variables, novelty, complexity, conflict, and uncertainty, as adaptive linguistic interventions for conversational tutoring. Across 270 tutoring conversations spanning multiple model families, domains, and topic complexity levels, curiosity-oriented interventions consistently increased exploratory learner behaviors, producing up to 2.4x more conversational turns under fixed time budgets. To measure these effects, we further introduce a learner-centered evaluation framework capturing exploratory questioning, conversational agency, productive struggle, and observable curiosity. Learner-side gains persisted even when tutor-side instructional quality remained unchanged, suggesting that curiosity functions as a partially independent interaction-level mechanism. More broadly, our results demonstrate that LLM-mediated dialogue can serve as a scalable experimental framework for studying how language shapes exploratory learning behavior.

</details>


### [383] [ORBIT: Training-Free Multi-Attribute Behavioral Steering via Orthogonal Subspace Rotation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22357)
*Narges Ghasemi,Amir Ziashahabi,Salman Avestimehr,Jonathan May*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出ORBIT方法，一种无需训练的多属性激活引导技术，通过正交旋转在联合子空间中协同控制多个行为属性，同时保持输出连贯性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有激活引导方法主要针对单属性控制，多属性联合控制时存在范数不平衡和方向抵消问题，且分类器方法需随属性集合变化而重训练。

Method: ORBIT基于旋转式引导扩展至多属性场景：利用SVD构建各属性引导平面的联合子空间，在其中进行范数保持的单一旋转；引入自适应逐词门控机制识别需修正的属性，并可选添加增强项强化弱投影属性。

Result: 在TraitFactory（新提出的侧重行为倾向的多属性基准）和ToneBank上，对Llama-3.2-3B、Qwen-2.5-7B、Llama-3.1-8B三个模型的实验表明，ORBIT在多属性协同引导效果与输出连贯性上均优于现有无需训练的基线方法。

Conclusion: ORBIT是一种高效、灵活、无需训练的多属性行为控制方法，解决了多属性引导中的方向冲突与范数失衡问题，适用于动态调整的属性组合场景。

Abstract: Language models are widely used in assistant settings, where controlling behavioral attributes is often essential. Activation steering modifies hidden-state representations at inference time, providing a lightweight, training-free mechanism that can be toggled at runtime. Existing methods, however, have focused primarily on steering a single attribute at a time. When multiple attributes must be controlled simultaneously, naive summation of per-attribute steering vectors suffers from norm imbalance and directional cancellation, while classifier-based approaches require retraining whenever the attribute set changes. We introduce ORBIT (Orthogonal Rotation-Based Intervention Technique), a training-free extension of rotation-based steering to the multi-attribute setting. Our method constructs a joint subspace from per-attribute steering planes via singular value decomposition and applies a single norm-preserving rotation within that subspace toward a combined target direction. Adaptive per-token gating identifies which attributes need correction at each position, and an optional additive boost strengthens attributes with weak initial projection. We also introduce TraitFactory, a new multi-attribute benchmark that focuses on behavioral tendencies rather than surface-level style. We evaluate ORBIT on TraitFactory and ToneBank across three models (Llama-3.2-3B, Qwen-2.5-7B, Llama-3.1-8B) while steering multiple attributes simultaneously, showing that it achieves stronger and more balanced multi-attribute steering than existing training-free baselines while better preserving output coherence.

</details>


### [384] [First-Token Broadcasters: Mechanistic Origins of Language Identity and Distributed Robustness in Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22361)
*Arjun Pillai,Christian Hoang,Anjelo Jann Laroza*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出语言身份头消融（LIHA）方法，通过逐个归零注意力头来识别影响多语言模型语言切换的关键头，并发现训练方式（如指令微调）会显著改变语言身份电路的结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究多语言语言模型为何常生成错误语言，以及为何难以修复这一问题。

Method: 提出Language Identity Head Ablation（LIHA）因果干预方法，对GPT-2和Qwen2.5系列模型进行头级消融实验，结合平行数据集分析语言切换率及补偿模式。

Result: 发现GPT-2中存在‘首词广播头’（如L6H1），其持续关注首提示词并传播语言信号；指令微调使语言身份电路前移并集中于第0层（如L0H5）；中文与俄文实验表明该机制具有脚本特异性。

Conclusion: 指令微调会重构语言身份电路，使其定位更早、更集中；语言识别依赖于特定注意力头对首词的广播行为，且受训练范式与文字系统共同影响。

Abstract: Why do multilingual language models sometimes generate in the wrong language, and why is this so hard to fix? We introduce Language Identity Head Ablation (LIHA), a causal intervention that zeros each attention head individually and measures the resulting language switch rate across a parallel dataset of 2,700 prompt-language pairs spanning seven languages. Applied to GPT-2, LIHA identifies a small set of first-token broadcaster heads - led by L6H1 (switch rate 0.32, 3.23 $σ$ above the population mean) - that attend persistently to the first prompt token, propagating its language signal throughout generation. Compensatory redistribution when heads are ablated is statistically significant (p < $10^{-5}$) and follows a directional, hierarchical pattern: compensation always recruits heads in layers above the ablated head, suggesting a feedforward cascade rather than global diffusion. To probe how training regime shapes these circuits, we apply LIHA to a controlled pair - Qwen2.5-1.5B-Base and Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct - identical in architecture and size, differing only in training. The base model is nearly flat (max SR=0.016, 200/336 heads at SR=0.0); the instruct model concentrates causal influence sharply at layer 0, led by L0H5 (SR=0.224, 8.93 $σ$ above mean), with all other layers near zero. This controlled comparison provides direct causal evidence that instruction tuning reorganizes language identity circuits toward early-layer localization. Extended experiments with Chinese and Russian confirm that first-token broadcasting is script-specific in GPT-2, with non-Latin languages handled at layer 0 - the same locus as the instruction-tuned model. Code and data will be released upon publication.

</details>


### [385] [Knowledge-Graph Grounding Helps LLMs Only for Out-of-Training Knowledge: A Controlled Study on Clinical Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22419)
*Madhulatha Mandarapu,Sandeep Kunkunuru*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文复现并修正了Nature Medicine研究中关于大语言模型在医疗基准测试中的表现，并探讨了结构化知识图谱（KG）对模型性能的影响。研究发现，公开生物医学知识图谱中的事实对前沿模型而言是冗余的，只有当关键事实超出模型训练数据范围时（如私有或新颖数据），知识图谱才真正提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究结构化知识图谱（KG）能否改变前沿大语言模型在医疗任务中优于检索增强工具的现象，并明确知识 grounding 在何种条件下真正有效。

Method: 1）复现 Nature Medicine 研究中的 HealthBench 评估，校准评分标准并识别评分偏差；2）基于 PrimeKG 构建图+向量混合引擎（samyama-graph），对比朴素三元组检索与自然语言到 Cypher 的智能体查询在 MedQA 上的效果；3）在合成反事实 KG 和混合已知/新颖事实的基准上测试知识增强效果。

Result: 1）原研究中报告的 ~88 分实为 Consensus 变体，完整 HealthBench 下前沿模型得分仅 ~46–47；发现并修正评分器缺陷；2）在真实公开 KG（PrimeKG）上，知识增强对 MedQA 无显著提升（|Δ| ≤ 3.4）；3）在合成反事实 KG 和混合基准上，知识增强使模型在未知事实上的准确率从随机水平跃升至 ~100%，而对已知事实无增益。

Conclusion: 知识图谱 grounding 仅在关键事实超出模型训练分布（即私有或新颖数据）时有效；公开 KG 中的事实已被前沿模型内化，无需额外检索——这印证了原研究强调的‘机构私有数据’前提。

Abstract: A recent Nature Medicine study reports that general-purpose frontier LLMs outperform specialized retrieval-augmented clinical tools on medical benchmarks, and that retrieval can hurt strong models. We ask the natural follow-up: does structured knowledge-graph (KG) grounding change this, and when does grounding help at all? We contribute two results. First, a reproduction: the study's headline HealthBench score (~88) is the Consensus variant, not full HealthBench, where frontier models and ideal completions both score ~46-47 under a physician-calibrated grader (agreement 82.5%); we reproduce GPT-5.2 Consensus =90.9 and flag a score-deflating grader bug. Second, a knowledge-boundary result. Using a graph+vector engine (samyama-graph) over the public biomedical KG PrimeKG, neither naive triple retrieval nor an agentic natural-language-to-Cypher loop (82% successful queries) improves MedQA across a weak-to-strong model ladder (all |Delta| <= 3.4). On a synthetic counterfactual KG, and on a hybrid benchmark mixing known and novel facts, the identical pipeline lifts out-of-training accuracy from chance to ~100% (+68 to +79) while adding nothing on known facts (a no-LLM arm answers both). Across three regimes (no-knowledge, graph-aided, hybrid), grounding helps only insofar as the decisive fact lies outside the model's training -- public-KG facts are redundant, private and novel data are where it pays -- matching the study's institutional-data caveat.

</details>


### [386] [Words as Difference Makers: How Large Language Models Determine Causal Structure in Text](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22430)
*Wolfgang Pietsch*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探讨了大语言模型（LLMs）如何隐式学习因果结构，提出其依赖一种基于‘差异制造者’（difference-making）的归纳逻辑（即变分归纳），而非传统因果推断框架；该逻辑通过海量多源文本中识别词语序列中的差异/无差异因素实现，并由词嵌入与自注意力等架构特征支撑，其机制类比科学实验方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有主流因果推断形式化框架（如Pearl的干预主义和Neyman-Rubin潜在结果框架）难以解释LLMs如何从文本中习得因果结构，亟需新视角阐明其内在因果归纳机制。

Method: 提出并论证LLMs采用‘差异制造者’逻辑（变分归纳）作为其隐式因果学习机制；结合训练过程分析（海量多上下文文本对差异/无差异模式的统计提取）与架构分析（token embeddings和self-attention在该逻辑中的作用）。

Result: 揭示LLMs的因果学习并非依赖显式因果图或反事实建模，而是通过统计性差异检测实现，其机制在原理上类比控制变量实验；关键架构组件（如embedding和attention）被赋予新的功能解释。

Conclusion: LLMs不具备传统意义上的‘世界模型’，但通过变分归纳在语言层面构建了实用的、基于差异的因果表征；这为理解其推理能力提供了更贴合实际的新理论基础，并挑战了将LLMs直接等同于因果模型的流行观点。

Abstract: Because large language models (LLMs) are impressively successful in predicting text, it appears that they must have access to a 'world model' representing causal and definitional structure. However, the dominant formalisms of modern causal inference -- Judea Pearl's interventionist approach and the Neyman-Rubin potential outcomes framework -- struggle to illuminate how LLMs learn causal structure. I resolve this puzzle by arguing that LLMs employ a specific inductive approach based on a difference-making logic -- sometimes called variational induction. I demonstrate how central aspects of this logic are realized during training, where LLMs require enormous amounts of text data from a wide range of contexts to identify difference- and indifference-makers within word sequences. Furthermore, I analyze specific architectural features of LLMs -- such as token embeddings and self-attention -- to determine their roles in variational induction. The difference-making logic of LLMs fundamentally parallels the experimental method, where causal relations are derived by systematically varying individual circumstances to determine their influence on a phenomenon.

</details>


### [387] [CASPER in the Machine: Insights into Character Variety in LLM-Generated Stories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22454)
*Anneliese Brei,Abhisheik Sharma,Nicholas Sanaie,Lu Wang,Snigdha Chaturvedi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探讨了大型语言模型（LLM）生成的故事与人类撰写的故事在角色刻画上的异同，基于叙事学理论从八个复杂维度（如风格化、完整性等）对角色进行自动分类与对比分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM生成文本在虚构领域的广泛应用，亟需系统评估其生成故事中角色刻画的真实性与多样性，以理解LLM在叙事能力上的优势与局限。

Method: 基于叙事学理论定义八个角色维度，构建自动化分类方法，对主流LLM生成故事与近期出版的人类写作故事中的角色进行标注与统计对比分析。

Result: 发现LLM与人类故事在部分角色维度（如 stylization）上存在显著相似性，但在角色多样性与内在一致性方面仍存在差距；不同LLM间角色表现亦有差异。

Conclusion: LLM已具备初步的角色塑造能力，但尚难达到人类作者在角色深度、连贯性与多样性上的综合水平，提示未来需加强叙事结构建模与角色一致性训练。

Abstract: As LLM-generated text is increasingly used, especially in fictional domains, we explore how much LLM-generated stories differ from human-written stories. In this work, we focus on characters. We borrow definitions from narratology to analyze eight intricate dimensions of character, such as stylization and wholeness. These dimensions consider more than just basic characteristics. They assess how characters are portrayed within their stories. After automatically inferring categories of characters within both LLM and human-written stories, we compare and contrast these two sets of stories. We consider the following overarching questions: (1) Do LLMs and human-written stories have similar characters? and (2) Do LLMs generate stories with a variety of characters? Our analysis includes research questions that focus on stories generated by popular LLMs and recently published human-written stories. We describe a number of interesting similarities, differences and key takeaways.

</details>


### [388] [Interleaved Speech Language Models Latently Work In Text](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22473)
*Talia Sternberg,Gallil Maimon,Yossi Adi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过logit lens分析了语音-文本交织的语音语言模型（SLMs），发现其在中间层隐式进行语音转录，随后在文本空间预测下一个词，最后返回语音域；该行为与模型使用交织数据训练及初始化自文本大模型密切相关，并影响其语音知识能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语音语言模型（SLMs）中语音与文本模态在潜在空间中的交互机制尚不明确，亟需深入分析以理解其内部工作机制。

Method: 采用logit lens方法，对不同家族和规模的语音-文本交织语言模型进行分析，考察其各中间层输出的文本token可解码性、转录稳定性及模态转换过程，并探究交织数据和文本LM初始化对行为的影响。

Result: 发现模型存在隐式语音转录阶段，对应 spoken word 的文本token 在中间层即可被高置信度解码（最高达77%样本中位列top候选）；此后模型在文本空间预测下一词，再转回语音域；该行为依赖于语音-文本交织训练和文本LM初始化，并与语音知识能力正相关。

Conclusion: 语音-文本交织SLMs内部存在可识别的模态转换流程，揭示了语音与文本表征的深层耦合机制，为未来SLM架构设计与优化提供了理论依据和实证支持。

Abstract: Speech language models (SLMs) have been extensively studied, with the common paradigm incorporating text data and pre-trained text LMs. A leading approach is speech-text interleaving in which models are trained over sequences containing both speech and text tokens, aiming to boost even speech-only capabilities. Yet the way these two modalities interact in the model latent space remains unclear. In this work, we analyze interleaved speech-text LMs from different model families and sizes through the scope of the logit lens to provide such insight. We reveal that these models go through an implicit transcription phase in which the text token of the spoken word becomes decodable in intermediate layers, despite not being trained for speech recognition. The transcription of the word appears as one of the top candidate words for as much as 77\% of the data. Following this stage, the models proceed to predict the next word in the text space before transforming back to the speech domain. We finally analyze the role of interleaving data, and initializing from text LMs in eliciting this behavior, as well as seeing how this correlates with spoken knowledge abilities. Our analysis sheds light on the internal mechanisms underlying the relationship between speech and text modalities and could shape SLM optimization.

</details>


### [389] [Not All Claims Are Equally Risky: FACTOR for Adaptive Verification in Factual Long-Form Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22474)
*Areeba Hassan,Arooj Kausar,Syeda Kisaa Fatima,Gibrail Islam,Mehwish Fatima*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出FACTOR方法，通过基于声明级不确定性的自适应验证策略，在推理时提升大语言模型长文本生成的事实性，同时降低验证成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有验证技术对所有声明采用统一验证策略，忽视了不同声明间幻觉风险的差异，导致验证效率低下。

Method: FACTOR结合不确定性估计、自适应语言推理验证和候选重排序，在推理时根据每个声明的不确定性动态分配验证资源。

Result: 在FactScore基准上验证表明，FACTOR在提升事实性的同时降低了验证成本；消融实验识别出不确定性估计是性能提升的主要驱动因素。

Conclusion: FACTOR是一种高效且模型无关的方法，可显著提升大语言模型长文本生成的事实性。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) generate fluent long-form text, however, often add unsupported factual claims. Existing verification techniques improve factuality by grounding generation in external evidence. However, the same verification policy usually applies to all claims despite being differences in hallucination risks. We propose \textit{FACTOR} (\textit{FACTuality-Oriented Risk-aware Verification}), an inference-time model that adapts verification criteria according to claim-level uncertainty. FACTOR combines uncertainty estimation, adaptive language inference verification, and candidate re-ranking to allocate verification effort where it is most needed. We evaluate \textit{FACTOR} on FactScore benchmark showing that adaptive verification improves factuality while reducing verification cost simultaneously. We further perform different ablation studies to identify the primary driver of these gains. Our results show the effective and model-agnostic performance of \textit{FACTOR} for improving factuality in long-form generation.

</details>


### [390] [ROMEVA: Geometry-Preserving Vocabulary Expansion for Roman Urdu Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22478)
*Mahnoor Khan,Afsheen Asif,Milhan Afzal Khan,Seemab Latif,Mehwish Fatima*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出ROMEVA方法，通过子词平均初始化和PCA引导的锚点损失来稳定mBERT在罗马乌尔都语词汇扩展时的嵌入空间，但在下游情感分类任务中，朴素微调反而表现最佳，揭示了嵌入稳定性与下游性能之间的脱节。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多语言语言模型（如mBERT）在低资源NLP中广泛应用，但其对拼写不一致的语言（如罗马乌尔都语）适应性研究不足；罗马乌尔都语存在严重子词碎片化问题。

Method: 提出ROMEVA（Roman Urdu Embedding-preserving Vocabulary Adaptation），结合子词平均初始化与PCA引导的锚点损失，在mBERT中扩展500个高碎片化词汇，并对比朴素微调、子词感知微调与ROMEVA。

Result: ROMEVA最有效地保持预训练嵌入空间稳定性，但朴素微调在下游情感分类任务中性能最强。

Conclusion: 嵌入稳定性与下游性能之间存在脱节，对于形态不一致语言，更强的适配可能比严格保持嵌入更优。

Abstract: Multilingual Language Models like mBERT are widely used for low-resource NLP, yet their adaptation to morphologically inconsistent languages such as Roman Urdu remains underexplored. Roman Urdu spelling variation causes severe sub-word fragmentation, averaging 1.50 sub-words per token. We propose \textit{ROMEVA} (Roman Urdu Embedding-preserving Vocabulary Adaptation), which combines sub-word-average initialization and a PCA-guided anchor loss to stabilize embeddings during vocabulary expansion. Using a 36,130-comment Roman Urdu corpus, we add 500 highly fragmented tokens to mBERT and compare naive fine-tuning, sub-word-aware fine-tuning, and \textit{ROMEVA}. While \textit{ROMEVA} most effectively preserves the pretrained embedding space, naive fine-tuning achieves the strongest downstream sentiment classification performance. These findings reveal a disconnect between embedding stability and downstream performance, suggesting that stronger adaptation may be preferable to strict embedding preservation in morphologically inconsistent languages.

</details>


### [391] [Breaking the Likelihood Trap: Variance-Calibrated Modulation for Large Language Model Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22511)
*Yuanhao Ding,Meimingwei Li,Esteban Garces Arias,Matthias Aßenmacher,Christian Heumann,Chongsheng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需训练的预解码干预方法VCM，通过上下文搜索灯和自适应自去偏两种动态机制，校准词元概率分布，缓解大模型开放生成中的‘似然陷阱’问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在开放生成中常陷入‘似然陷阱’，表现为重复退化和词汇单调，导致生成文本与人类写作存在差距；现有后处理截断（如Top-p）和固定重复惩罚策略各有缺陷，无法兼顾分布头部校准与人类词汇偏好及logit尺度变化。

Method: 提出方差校准调制（VCM），包含两个动态机制：(1) 基于点互信息（PMI）的上下文搜索灯，抑制全局停用词、提升上下文激发词；(2) 自适应自去偏，利用实时logit标准差实现尺度无关的惩罚。该方法无需训练，部署于解码前。

Result: VCM在开放生成、事实问答和数学推理任务上均显著缓解似然陷阱，在保持极低计算开销的同时，提升了生成多样性、连贯性，并尤其在较高温度下提高了推理准确率。

Conclusion: VCM是一种通用、轻量、即插即用的解码增强方法，有效弥合了模型输出与人类语言偏好之间的鸿沟，为解码策略设计提供了新范式。

Abstract: In open-ended generation, LLMs frequently fall into the "likelihood trap", marked by repetitive degeneration and vocabulary dullness, creating a discrepancy between machine-generated and human-written text. While post-hoc tail truncation (e.g., Top-$p$, Min-$p$) avoids sampling from the unreliable tail, it can over-sample from the uncalibrated head and misalign generation with human lexical preferences; fixed scalar repetition penalties likewise ignore variation in logit scale across inference steps, potentially disrupting semantic coherence. To address both limitations, we propose Variance-Calibrated Modulation (VCM), a training-free pre-decoding intervention that reshapes the probability distribution before truncation through two dynamic mechanisms: (1) Contextual Searchlight via PMI, which suppresses global stopwords while elevating context-evoked tokens, and (2) Adaptive Self-Debiasing, which uses real-time logit standard deviation for scale-invariant penalization. Across open-ended generation, factual QA, and mathematical reasoning, VCM consistently mitigates the likelihood trap. With negligible computational overhead, VCM integrates with existing decoding strategies, improving diversity, coherence, and, particularly at higher decoding temperatures, reasoning accuracy.

</details>


### [392] [Look Light, Think Heavy: What Multimodal Chain-of-Thought Reasoning Can and Cannot Do](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22565)
*Zhuoran Jin,Kejian Zhu,Hongbang Yuan,Yupu Hao,Pengfei Cao,Yubo Chen,Kang Liu,Jun Zhao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了多模态链式思维（CoT）在12个感知与推理任务上的效果，发现CoT并非万能：在感知任务中可能损害性能（如视觉定位、物体计数），但在数学、科学及多图推理等任务中有效；现有开源多模态推理模型改进有限，且视觉推理仍是瓶颈，表现为‘看轻、想重’——视觉反思持续减弱而语言反思波动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究多模态链式思维（CoT）的能力边界：它能做什么？在哪些任务上失效？为何失效？

Method: 在12个涵盖感知与推理的多模态任务上，对比评估14个非推理模型和8个推理模型，分析CoT对性能的影响及其内在机制（如视觉/语言反思动态）。

Result: 1) CoT对感知任务常有害（如视觉接地、计数性能下降），但提升数学、科学及多图像推理；2) 开源多模态推理模型整体提升有限，或因过度侧重数学推理；3) 视觉反思随推理过程持续衰减，形成‘Look Light, Think Heavy’现象，成为关键瓶颈。

Conclusion: 多模态CoT需按任务选择性使用；当前模型语言反思能力较强，但缺乏持续深度视觉 introspection，未来应强化视觉-语言协同反思机制。

Abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) has become a standard method for improving reasoning capabilities in large language models (LLMs) by eliciting step-by-step thinking, but its effectiveness in multimodal tasks remains unclear. In this paper, we aim to systematically investigate the key question: What can multimodal Chain-of-Thought reasoning do, and where and why does it fall short? To this end, we evaluate 12 multimodal tasks across perception and reasoning categories using both 14 non-reasoning models and 8 reasoning models. Our analysis reveals several important findings: (1) CoT is not a free lunch and should be used selectively depending on the specific requirements of each task. For perception tasks, CoT can lead to undesirable side effects, such as reduced performance in visual grounding and object counting. In contrast, it proves effective for reasoning tasks involving mathematical, scientific, and multi-image reasoning; (2) Compared to original models, existing open-source multimodal reasoning models often yield only marginal overall improvements, possibly due to an overemphasis on mathematical reasoning at the expense of broader capabilities; (3) Visual reasoning remains a key bottleneck for current multimodal CoT, as models exhibit a Look Light, Think Heavy pattern where verbal reflection rises and falls during reasoning, whereas visual reflection consistently diminishes. These findings suggest that while multimodal CoT handles verbal reflection relatively well, it lacks the ability to maintain deep visual introspection throughout the reasoning process.

</details>


### [393] [What are Key Factors for Updates in RL for LLM Reasoning?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22570)
*Peidong Wang,Demi Wang,Xufang Luo,Jiahang Xu,Xiaocui Yang,Shi Feng,Yuqing Yang,Dongsheng Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出ACPO方法，通过自适应调整重要性采样比的裁剪边界来改进基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR），在多个推理任务上超越现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLVR方法多依赖启发式直觉，导致算法选择不一致甚至矛盾，但仍有经验提升；需理论分析以理解其更新机制。

Method: 理论分析RLVR更新，揭示离策略程度对重要性采样比分布及裁剪行为的影响；提出以梯度期望为核心，建模token概率、优势函数与重要性采样比的作用；据此设计自适应裁剪策略ACPO。

Result: ACPO在3B和7B模型上于数学求解、表格问答和逻辑谜题等多个推理基准上显著优于DAPO和CISPO等强基线。

Conclusion: 基于理论分析驱动的方法能带来更鲁棒、更有效的RLVR算法。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a promising framework for enhancing the reasoning ability of large language models. However, much of the existing work is guided by heuristic intuition, leading to divergent algorithmic choices, even contradictory ones that nevertheless report empirical gains. To better understand this phenomenon, we conduct a theoretical analysis of RLVR updates. Our study reveals that differences in off-policy degree, determined by the number of gradient steps per rollout, substantially affect the distribution of importance sampling ratios and their clipping behavior, thereby altering which tokens dominate the update. Building on this insight, we characterize gradient expectation as the central quantity governing update dynamics and analyze the roles of token probability, advantage, and importance sampling ratio. Motivated by these findings, we propose Adaptive Clip Policy Optimization (ACPO), which adjusts clipping boundaries across token groups according to the empirical variance of their importance sampling ratios. Experiments on 3B and 7B models across diverse reasoning benchmarks, spanning mathematical problem solving, tabular QA, and logic puzzles, demonstrate that ACPO outperforms strong baselines such as DAPO and CISPO. These results demonstrate that principled, analysis-driven approaches yield more robust and effective RLVR methods. Code is available in: https://github.com/Control-derek/ACPO

</details>


### [394] [Context-Aware Distillation and Ablation for Text2DSL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22578)
*Alexander V. Kozachok,Alexander M. Nazimov,Shamil G. Magomedov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过引入上下文感知蒸馏方法，结合BNF语法、API规范和封闭标识符词表构建结构化上下文，显著提升了Polkit规则生成的准确性和鲁棒性，并通过消融实验验证了各结构化组件对性能的贡献。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提升Text2DSL任务中DSL代码生成的准确性与可靠性，解决原有提示合成方法在复杂DSL（如Polkit）上泛化能力弱、运行时失败率高的问题。

Method: 采用上下文感知蒸馏：以DeepSeek-V4-Flash为教师模型，在BNF语法、API规范和封闭标识符词表构成的结构化上下文中生成数据；构建双层验证管道（AST验证+运行时测试）；在GigaChat-10B-A1.8B上对八种结构化上下文组合进行因子消融实验。

Result: PolkitBench语料库规模从4,204扩展至10,073对样本，AST有效性达100.0%，运行时通过率达99.7%；结构化上下文显著缓解模型在更难语料上的性能崩溃（Combined Score仅下降0.051），词表贡献最大语义质量增益（+0.198），API和BNF分别主导结构有效性提升（+24.7pp和+22.3pp）。

Conclusion: 结构化上下文是Text2DSL中不可或缺的‘承重机制’，而非修饰性改进；封闭标识符词表是关键组件，其与API或BNF的组合即能接近全上下文性能；各组件贡献可量化分解，为未来DSL生成系统设计提供可解释依据。

Abstract: We extend our prior work on Text2DSL automatic generation of domain-specific language (DSL) code from natural language descriptions along two complementary axes. First, we replace prompt-only synthetic generation with context-aware distillation, in which a teacher large language model (DeepSeek-V4-Flash) operates under an explicitly defined structured context comprising a BNF grammar, an API specification, and a closed identifier vocabulary; the resulting corpus is verified by a two-tier pipeline combining AST validation through esprima and runtime acceptance through the production polkitd daemon and the pkcheck client. This scales the verified PolkitBench corpus from 4,204 to 10,073 natural-language-to-Polkit-rule pairs at 100.0% AST validity and 99.7% runtime pass rate. Second, we conduct the per-component factorial ablation of structured context that was identified as future work in the precursor study: eight conditions C0-C7 are evaluated on GigaChat-10B-A1.8B with the new corpus. Three findings emerge. (i) The new harder corpus collapses the baseline mode (Syntax Valid 97.6% -> 58.5%, Combined Score 0.482 -> 0.252), whereas the context-enhanced mode degrades only marginally (Syntax 98.6% -> 97.4%, Combined 0.801 -> 0.750), confirming that structured context is not a cosmetic improvement but a load-bearing mechanism. (ii) The best absolute condition is the full context C7 across all metrics, while the strongest partial conditions (C5 = BNF + Vocabulary, C6 = API + Vocabulary) both contain the vocabulary. (iii) A Shapley-style decomposition assigns the largest semantic-quality effect to the vocabulary (Combined +0.198), the largest structural-validity effects to API (+24.7 pp) and BNF (+22.3 pp).

</details>


### [395] [Sub-Billion, Super-Frontier: Small Language Models Rival Zero-Shot Frontier LLMs on General and Literary Relation Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22606)
*Despina Christou,Grigorios Tsoumakas*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探讨了小型语言模型（SLMs）在关系抽取（RE）任务中能否替代大型语言模型（LLMs），发现经过针对性微调的亚十亿参数SLM（如Qwen2.5-0.5B）在多个基准上超越零样本前沿LLM（如GPT-4、Claude Sonnet），且优势源于任务适配而非模型规模或生成能力；结果表明，当有任务数据时，轻量、私密、硬件友好的SLM是RE的实用选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）虽在关系抽取（RE）上表现优异，但其高计算开销和对专有API的依赖限制了其在资源受限或隐私敏感场景下的部署。本文旨在探究小型语言模型（SLMs）通过合理适配能否在RE任务中有效弥补与LLMs的性能差距。

Method: 评估了5个参数量从360M到3B的SLMs，在三种领域组合设定和两种提示条件微调方式下共30种配置；对比零样本前沿LLMs（GPT-4、Claude Sonnet等）及判别式RoBERTa基线；在9个通用与文学领域RE基准上评测正类micro-F1；并开展领域自适应预训练案例研究与同族模型缩放分析。

Result: 最佳亚十亿模型Qwen2.5-0.5B在通用领域RE上达micro-F1 0.83，显著高于GPT-4（0.69）和Claude Sonnet（0.66）的零样本结果；在文学RE中亦领先（Biographical基准0.92 vs. 0.83；双文学基准平均0.833 vs. 0.578）；RoBERTa基线同样优于LLMs，说明性能增益源于任务适配而非生成解码；领域自适应预训练未带来实质性提升，同族缩放收益也仅边际。

Conclusion: 当具备任务特定数据时，紧凑且经任务适配的小型语言模型可在关系抽取任务中实现高精度、高隐私性与硬件高效性，为LLM替代方案提供了实证支持；性能优势主要来自监督微调式任务适配，而非模型规模或生成范式。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong relation extraction (RE), but their computational demands and reliance on proprietary APIs limit deployment in resource-constrained or privacy-sensitive settings. We investigate how far small language models (SLMs) can close this gap across general-domain and literary text. We evaluate five models from 360M to 3B parameters under three domain-composition regimes and two prompt-conditioned tuning styles (30 configurations), comparing them with zero-shot frontier LLMs and a discriminative RoBERTa baseline. Across nine benchmarks, the best sub-billion model, Qwen2.5-0.5B fine-tuned on pooled general-domain data, achieves a general-domain positive-class micro-F1 of 0.83, versus 0.69 for GPT-5.4 and 0.66 for Claude Sonnet 4.6 evaluated zero-shot. This does not imply that SLMs are intrinsically stronger; rather, targeted task adaptation enables 4-bit models deployable on a single consumer GPU to outperform general-purpose frontier systems under this protocol. An in-domain RoBERTa baseline also exceeds both frontier models, indicating that the gain stems from task adaptation rather than generative decoding. On literary RE, tuned SLMs reach 0.92 on the human-annotated Biographical benchmark versus 0.83 for GPT-5.4, and 0.833 versus 0.578 on the two-benchmark literary average. A targeted domain-adaptive pretraining case study yields no practically meaningful gain over supervised fine-tuning, while the cleanest within-family scale comparison shows only marginal improvement. These results show that, when task-specific data are available, compact task-adapted models can provide accurate, private, and hardware-efficient RE.

</details>


### [396] [Orthogonal Representation Editing: Decoupling Semantic Entanglement in Batch Knowledge Editing of LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22627)
*Wenhao Yu,Zhicong Lu,Bo Lv,Fangyin Ma,Kaiwen Wei,Shihao Yang,Nayu Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出正交表示编辑（ORE）方法，通过构建通用语义子空间并施加正交约束来解耦语义纠缠，提升大语言模型批量知识编辑的精度与泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有知识编辑方法在批量编辑时性能下降，主要源于语义表示纠缠（如概念重叠与句法模式共享）导致表征空间中干扰累积、编辑精度降低。

Method: 提出正交表示编辑（ORE）：在LLM隐层表示空间中操作，构建通用语义子空间，对编辑向量施加正交约束以解耦语义纠缠；引入门控非线性表示头，自适应定位编辑位置并精确控制知识注入。

Result: ORE在多项基准上显著优于现有方法，并在跨语言知识编辑任务中展现出更强泛化能力。

Conclusion: 正交约束与自适应编辑机制可有效缓解语义纠缠，为高效、鲁棒的大模型批量知识编辑提供了新范式。

Abstract: Knowledge editing aims to efficiently update factual information in Large Language Models (LLMs) without full retraining. However, existing methods still suffer from performance degradation in batch knowledge editing. We identify that semantic representation entanglement, such as overlapping concepts and shared syntactic patterns, accumulates interference in the representation space and reduces editing precision. To bridge this gap, in this paper, we propose Orthogonal Representation Editing (ORE), which performs edits in the hidden representation space of LLMs by constructing a general semantic subspace and enforcing orthogonal constraints on edit vectors, effectively decoupling semantic entanglement. Furthermore, we introduce a gated non-linear representation head to enable adaptive learning of editing locations and precise control over knowledge injection. Extensive experiments show that ORE outperforms existing methods and achieves superior performance in cross-lingual knowledge editing scenarios. We release our code at https://github.com/YVVH/ORE.

</details>


### [397] [Only Ask What You Don't Know: Grounded Delta Planning for Efficient Multi-step RAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22681)
*Wei-Chieh Chou,Xuanjun Chen,Jian-Ren Lin,Claire Lin,Hung-yi Lee,Jyh-Shing Roger Jang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出GDP-RAG框架，通过基于信息差的计划式检索与推理，在多跳问答中实现高准确率与低成本平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG方法在多跳问答中存在误差传播或过度推理问题，导致成本高、准确率低。

Method: 提出Grounded Delta Planning RAG（GDP-RAG）：（1）初步检索以锚定规划；（2）基于信息缺口的规划提示；（3）骨架化轨迹，将子查询与来自初步检索的Thought证据绑定并传递至最终答案。

Result: 在HotpotQA、2WikiMultiHopQA和MuSiQue上取得最高准确率60.63%，同时pass成本为0.51，显著低于PAR-RAG（0.65）和KnowTrace（1.57）。

Conclusion: GDP-RAG通过聚焦未解决的信息缺口，生成简洁可靠的推理路径，在准确率与推理成本之间取得最优权衡。

Abstract: Multi-hop question answering remains challenging for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) because existing approaches either propagate errors across iterative retrieval rounds or over-generate reasoning steps, increasing cost without improving accuracy. We propose Grounded Delta Planning RAG (GDP-RAG), a plan-based framework that targets only the information delta based on three simple design choices: (1) preliminary retrieval to ground planning before execution, (2) a gap-conditioned planning prompt that asks only for missing information, and (3) a skeletal trajectory that pairs each subquery with a Thought capturing evidence from preliminary retrieval and carrying it through to the final answer. GDP-RAG focuses computation on unresolved gaps, yielding concise, reliable reasoning trajectories. Extensive experiments on HotpotQA, 2WikiMultiHopQA, and MuSiQue show that GDP-RAG achieves the highest accuracy (60.63%) among all compared systems while maintaining a cost-of-pass of 0.51, 22% lower than PAR-RAG (0.65) and 68% lower than KnowTrace (1.57), with no method achieving both higher accuracy and lower cost.

</details>


### [398] [moBERTo: A Modern Encoder for Portuguese via Continued Pretraining of ModernBERT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22722)
*Thiago Laitz,Thales Sales Almeida,João Guilherme Alves Santos,Giovana Kerche Bonás*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文介绍了moBERTo，一种针对葡萄牙语优化的Encoder-only Transformer模型，通过在ModernBERT-base基础上继续预训练得到，并在多个葡萄牙语NLP任务上取得SOTA结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提升Encoder-only架构在葡萄牙语NLP任务（尤其是长上下文检索与判别式任务）上的性能，填补高质量葡萄牙语基础模型的空白。

Method: 基于ModernBERT-base，在600亿token的葡萄牙语语料上继续预训练；采用葡萄牙语分词器、子词匹配嵌入迁移、8192长度的长上下文后训练；保留原架构特性（RoPE、交替局部-全局注意力、FlashAttention等）。

Result: moBERTo在三个葡萄牙语检索基准的平均reranking nDCG@10最高，在PLUE-PT上表现最优；消融实验证明持续预训练优于从头训练，分词器适配利于token级任务但损害长上下文检索，长上下文后训练进一步提升reranking和NER性能。

Conclusion: Encoder-only模型经针对性适配后仍可在判别式任务上媲美更大规模decoder-only模型；moBERTo为葡萄牙语NLP提供了高效、开源的基础模型方案。

Abstract: Encoder-only transformer models remain essential for production NLP pipelines. We introduce moBERTo, a Portuguese adaptation of ModernBERT obtained through continued pretraining of the ModernBERT-base checkpoint on 60 billion tokens (5 epochs over a 12-billion-token corpus curated from FineWeb2 and filtered with educational and STEM classifiers). We preserve the original architecture, including rotary positional embeddings, alternating local-global attention, flash attention, and unpadding. We evaluate moBERTo across information retrieval (including long-context retrieval at up to 8,192 tokens), document classification, named entity recognition, and natural language understanding. Our best variant, which combines a Portuguese tokenizer with subword-matching embedding transfer and long-context post-training, achieves the highest average reranking nDCG@10 across three Portuguese retrieval benchmarks and the best results on PLUE-PT. Through ablation studies, we show that (i) continued pretraining is strongly preferable to training from scratch, particularly for preserving long-context capabilities; (ii) tokenizer adaptation improves token-level tasks but degrades long-context retrieval; (iii) a dedicated long-context post-training phase at 8,192 tokens further improves reranking and NER; and (iv) encoder-only architectures remain competitive with larger decoder-only alternatives for discriminative tasks. We publicly release the model weights at https://huggingface.co/Tropic-AI/moBERTo and training data at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Tropic-AI/moberto-pretraining-dataset-c4-compatible on Hugging Face.

</details>


### [399] [BLUEX v2: Benchmarking LLMs on Open-Ended Questions from Brazilian University Entrance Exams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22723)
*João Guilherme Alves Santos,Giovana Kerche Bonás,Thiago Laitz,Thales Sales Almeida,Helio Pedrini*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文介绍了BLUEX v2，一个面向葡萄牙语大语言模型评估的新基准，基于巴西顶尖大学第二阶段入学考试的开放性题目构建，涵盖多学科、图文结合及认知能力标注，并对21个主流LLM进行了系统评测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有葡萄牙语评估基准（如BLUEX）主要覆盖选择题，缺乏对开放性、论述性任务的评估，尤其忽视了要求深度推理与生成能力的第二阶段大学入学考试题目。

Method: 构建BLUEX v2基准：采集UNICAMP和USP 2022–2025年第二阶段考题，共395题（919个子问），55.7%含图像；标注学科、参考答案、LLM生成评分细则及6类认知能力标签；采用LLM-as-a-judge协议评估21个SOTA模型。

Result: 21个模型得分分布在4.18–9.10（0–10分制），差距达4.92分；数学推理与图像理解为最难能力维度；所有数据、代码与结果开源。

Conclusion: BLUEX v2填补了葡萄牙语开放生成任务评估的空白，提供了高难度、多模态、细粒度认知标注的权威基准，推动葡语LLM能力全面评测与提升。

Abstract: Although Large Language Models (LLMs) excel in many tasks, their assessment in Portuguese has received less attention, particularly for open-ended, discursive tasks that demand deeper reasoning and generation capabilities. While the original BLUEX benchmark addressed the scarcity of Portuguese evaluation datasets through multiple-choice questions from Brazilian university entrance exams, it did not cover the more challenging second-phase examinations, which require free-form written responses. In this work, we introduce BLUEX v2, a benchmark derived from the second-phase entrance exams of Brazil's two leading universities: UNICAMP (Comvest) and USP (Fuvest), spanning exam years 2022-2025. Our dataset comprises 395 questions unfolding into 919 graded subquestions, with 55.7% of questions containing associated images. Each question is annotated with subject area, official reference answers, LLM-generated rubric criteria, and six cognitive capability tags. We evaluate 21 state-of-the-art LLMs using an LLM-as-a-judge protocol. Results reveal a 4.92-point performance spread across models (4.18-9.10 on a 0-10 scale), with Mathematical Reasoning and Image Understanding emerging as the hardest capability dimensions. The dataset, evaluation code, and model outputs are publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/BLUEXv2.

</details>


### [400] [When Confidence Takes the Wrong Path: Diagnosing Retrieval-State Lock-In in RAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22728)
*Sahib Julka*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出并定义了检索增强生成（RAG）系统中一种新型失败模式——‘检索状态锁定’（retrieval-state lock-in），指出传统基于答案一致性的黑箱置信度方法无法识别该问题；通过将置信度解耦为答案、证据和检索状态三个独立对象，在KG-RAG系统中实证发现大量错误具有零答案离散度，进而设计出高精度（91.9%）但低覆盖率（7.7%）的可审计决策规则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG系统中黑箱不确定性估计方法依赖答案一致性作为置信度指标，但在检索状态缺陷（如空检索或一致但错误的检索结果）下，该指标失效——答案一致仅反映错误稳定而非正确；该问题在实际部署中已被察觉，但缺乏统一命名、可测标志及发生率边界。

Method: 提出‘检索状态锁定’概念，将RAG置信度分解为答案表面、检索证据和检索状态三类独立对象；在可检查、本体引导的知识图谱RAG（KG-RAG）系统上，基于六个问答快照开展实证分析，量化答案离散度、证据一致性与检索状态可靠性，并构建三重校验的可审计接受规则。

Result: 在五次采样下，42%的KG-RAG错误和59%的稠密检索错误呈现零答案离散度；三重校验规则实现91.9%的聚合精确率（对比全接受基线69.7%），但仅覆盖7.7%的答案；在临床校准领域，该规则达100%自动化判别精确率（非临床安全声明，仍需人工验证）。

Conclusion: RAG系统的置信度是对象特异性的：答案一致时，关键不是‘是否可信’，而是‘应质疑流水线中哪一环节’；‘检索状态锁定’是根本性挑战，需解耦评估并建立可审计、可归因的不确定性量化范式。

Abstract: The trustworthiness of a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system depends on more than the answer it returns, yet many black-box uncertainty methods still read agreement among sampled answers as confidence. That inference fails when repeated samples condition on the same defective retrieval state. The state may be empty, with the model falling back on parametric memory, or populated by a coherent but wrong neighbourhood. In either case, the answers agree because the error is stable. The problem is recognised in deployed RAG, but it has lacked a name, a measurable signature, and a prevalence bound. We supply all three. We name the failure retrieval-state lock-in and diagnose it by separating the three objects a single confidence score conflates: the answer surface, the retrieved evidence, and the retrieval state itself. In an inspectable, ontology-guided knowledge-graph RAG (KG-RAG) system across six question-answering snapshots, we measure the agreement blind spot directly: at five samples per question, 42% of KG-RAG errors and 59% of dense-retrieval errors carry zero answer dispersion, so agreement has nothing to rank, while evidence- and retrieval-state checks still flag most of them. The decomposition supports an auditable decision rule: accepting an answer only when answer, evidence, and retrieval checks all agree that it is low-risk reaches 91.9% pooled precision against a 69.7% accept-all rate. The cost is coverage: it certifies only 7.7% of answers as low-risk. On the clinical calibration domain it reaches 100% precision under an automated judge; this is an in-domain automated-label upper bound, not a clinical safety claim, and still needs human validation. Confidence in RAG is object-specific: when answers agree, the useful question is which part of the pipeline to distrust.

</details>


### [401] [Language-Specific Sentiment Polarity Biases in Encoder and Large Language Model Classification of Product Reviews](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22745)
*Advita Rajiv,Kavitha Kothur,Gautham Reddy*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: This paper examines sentiment polarity biases in AI models across languages and architectures, revealing that large language models show negative bias in French, while encoder models show positive bias in Japanese.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: To understand and address language-specific sentiment classification biases in multilingual AI systems, which affect their reliability in social and business applications.

Method: Empirical analysis of sentiment classification accuracy across different languages (e.g., French, Japanese) and model types (large language models vs. encoder models).

Result: Large language models exhibit negative bias in French (better at classifying negative reviews), while encoder models show positive bias in Japanese (failing to detect indirect negative criticism).

Conclusion: Sentiment analysis models display language- and architecture-dependent polarity biases, necessitating tailored evaluation and mitigation strategies for multilingual deployment.

Abstract: This study investigates sentiment polarity biases, specifically, differences in how accurately AI models classify positive versus negative reviews across languages and model architectures. Large language models show a negative bias in French and are more accurate on negative reviews, while encoder models exhibit positive bias in Japanese, missing negative reviews that use indirect criticism. These language-specific polarity biases have implications in both social and business domains deploying multilingual sentiment analysis systems.

</details>


### [402] [AI Fiction in the Wild](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22748)
*Neel Gupta,Maria Antoniak,Melanie Walsh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文基于50多万条ChatGPT用户对话数据，发现超1/3对话涉及AI生成小说（含原创、角色扮演、同人、色情文学），并识别出高频用户行为模式（如'无限故事需求者'）；进而提出两个理论观点：AI催生'唯我式读写者'，并重塑叙事生态中互动性、重复性与个性化特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究普通读者是否也利用AI生成虚构内容，以及大语言模型如何重构虚构作品的生产与消费方式。

Method: 基于50余万条匿名英文ChatGPT用户对话数据（arXiv:2405.01470），进行实证分析，识别虚构生成行为模式与用户画像，并结合文学与媒体理论展开阐释。

Result: 发现超三分之一对话涉及虚构生成；用户偏好同人、色情文学；呈现重复请求、即时反馈、小众元素组合等倾向；识别出‘无限故事需求者’等典型用户类型。

Conclusion: AI正模糊作者与读者界限，催生封闭式人机交互的‘唯我式读写者’；其互动性、可玩性与可变性正重塑当代叙事与娱乐生态，与自出版、同人文化、色情产业等存在结构性相似。

Abstract: Some professional authors are beginning to use AI tools to help produce their fiction writing. Are readers using AI to generate fiction, too? This paper examines how large language models are reshaping the production and consumption of fiction by enabling new forms of participation in narrative generation. Drawing on over 500,000 anonymized, English-language ChatGPT-user conversations (arXiv:2405.01470), we find that more than one third of the conversations involve some form of fiction generation -- including original stories, roleplay, fanfiction, and erotica. This AI-generated fiction is notably dominated by power users. We identify common fiction generation patterns and profiles among these users, including what we call "infinite story demanders," who repeatedly request and revise variations of the same or similar narratives over extended periods of time. We show that users especially gravitate toward fanfiction and erotica, and that they are broadly drawn to generic forms, repetition, immediacy, and niche combinations of story elements. Our findings motivate two theoretical provocations. First, we argue that AI technologies may lead to a shift in the conventional relationship between the author and reader, potentially producing what we call a "solipsistic reader-writer," who both generates and consumes fiction within a closed conversational loop, interacting with a machine rather than a human other. Second, we note that LLMs enable interactivity, play, and permutation in ways that are seemingly pleasurable for users, raising questions about where AI will fit into contemporary storytelling and entertainment ecosystems. We situate these developments within broader transformations in literature and media, including self-publishing, fanfiction, and pornography, and suggest that AI-generated fiction shares structural affinities with on-demand, personalized, and repetitive cultural forms.

</details>


### [403] [Learning Moral Diversity: Modelling Individual Perspectives in Moral Classification of Texts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22771)
*Yi Ren,Lewis Mitchell,Matthew Roughan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种建模标注者主观性的新方法，通过在预训练语言模型中加入标注者特异性层，提升对个体标注的预测能力，并揭示标注者的道德观点差异，表明标注分歧反映了任务固有的主观性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将多个标注者的标签聚合为单一‘真值’，忽略了道德判断任务固有的主观性和标注分歧（尤其在短文本如推文中），导致性能评估失真。

Method: 扩展预训练语言模型，增加一个学习标注者特异性特征的层，以分别建模每个标注者的道德判断倾向。

Result: 该模型显著提升了对个体标注的预测准确率；所学表示能有效揭示不同标注者的道德视角差异；相比聚合标签训练的模型，本方法更真实反映任务复杂性与模型能力。

Conclusion: 标注分歧不是噪声而是道德判断主观性的体现；建模个体视角不仅提升预测性能，还增强对道德判断机制的理解与可解释性。

Abstract: Understanding moral values in social media text offers insight into moral judgement formation, and supervised NLP models trained on crowdsourced data have achieved strong classification performance. However, most approaches simplify the problem by aggregating multiple annotators' labels into a single "ground truth", overlooking the inherent subjectivity of the task. In practice, there are disagreements between annotators caused by personal viewpoint or inherent ambiguities, particularly for short tweets. Here, we extend a pretrained language model with a layer that learns annotator-specific features. Our model improves predictions of individual annotations and yields representations that reveal meaningful insights into annotators' moral perspectives. We show that models trained on aggregated labels may hide variation and give a misleading impression of performance. Overall, we demonstrate that disagreement reflects the inherent subjectivity of the task and that modelling individual perspectives creates benefits for moral classification of texts.

</details>


### [404] [Does the Same Token Mean the Same State? MoE Routing as Signal for Reasoning Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22798)
*Kang Chen,Minshen Yu,Junjie Nian,Yaoning Wang,Yixin Cao,Yugang Jiang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为RAD（Routing Agreement Decoding）的新解码方法，利用稀疏MoE模型中锚点处专家路由状态的一致性进行测试时控制，无需依赖答案字符串即可选择最优输出，在数学、通用问答和代码任务上表现与多数投票相当，并在无明确答案字符串的任务（如代码补丁选择）中展现出独特优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究稀疏MoE语言模型中相同token ID是否对应相同路由状态和专家组合，并挖掘其潜在结构以支持无需答案字符串的测试时控制。

Method: 提出RAD方法：固定锚点（如答案起始或结束标记），提取各生成轨迹在该锚点窗口内的MoE路由状态，用加权Jaccard K近邻度量路由密度，选择最密集的路由盆地中心作为最终输出。

Result: RAD在10种稀疏MoE模型和6个数据集（含数学、GPQA、代码）上性能媲美多数投票（RAD 73.9 vs Majority 73.6）；在SWE-bench Verified上提升best-of-16补丁选择效果；在代码生成等无标准答案字符串任务中实现直接pass@1。

Conclusion: 稀疏MoE模型中token ID不掩盖深层路由结构，RAD利用该结构实现了不依赖答案解析的通用选择机制，为无字符串定义任务提供了新接口。

Abstract: In sparse Mixture-of-Experts language models, does the same token id imply the same router state and the same experts producing it? Holding the emitted token id fixed at repeated anchors, we find it does not: the experts that produce it still separate task context, trajectory history, and reasoning-effort mode. This residual structure supports test-time control: near \emph{boundary} anchors (the final-response transition) and \emph{delimiter} anchors (which open the answer, e.g.\ \texttt{\textbackslash boxed\{} or code fences), routing neighborhoods already align with final-answer basins at a marker-only readout and strongest when the routing is read at the answer opening. We operationalize this as \textbf{RAD} (Routing Agreement Decoding), an answer-string-free multi-rollout selector: it locates a fixed anchor, represents each rollout by its anchor-window MoE routing states, and returns the densest Weighted-Jaccard $K$-NN route-basin center, without parsing, normalizing, executing, or voting over answer strings. Across 10 sparse-MoE configurations (gpt-oss, Qwen3-MoE) and 6 datasets spanning math, GPQA, and code, RAD is on par with Majority where string voting is well-posed, with small positive paired deltas (RAD $73.9$ / RAD+DC $74.2$ vs.\ Majority $73.6$). Like majority voting, RAD is not a verifier: a dense \emph{wrong} basin can still win. Its value is the interface: the same selector gives direct pass@1 on code, where exact-string voting is ill-defined, and the same routing-density principle, re-anchored to the agentic boundary, improves best-of-16 patch selection on SWE-bench Verified over random, where patches have no answer string to vote on.

</details>


### [405] [KaLM-Reranker-V1: Fast but Not Late Interaction for Compressed Document Reranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22807)
*Xinping Zhao,Jiaxin Xu,Ziqi Dai,Xin Zhang,Shouzheng Huang,Danyu Tang,Xinshuo Hu,Meishan Zhang,Baotian Hu,Min Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: KaLM-Reranker-V1是一种高效且强表达力的解耦式重排序模型，采用编码器-解码器架构，通过预编码文档和交叉注意力建模查询-文档相关性，在多个基准上达到SOTA性能，兼顾速度与效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有重排序模型大多联合编码查询与文档，导致计算耦合、部署效率低、灵活性差；亟需一种既高效又保持强相关性建模能力的解耦方案。

Method: 提出KaLM-Reranker-V1：编码器用Matryoshka嵌入池化预编码文档；解码器建模系统指令、用户指令与查询意图；通过交叉注意力实现查询上下文与文档表征间的细粒度相关性建模，实现‘快但不晚交互’（FBNL）。

Result: 在BEIR、MIRACL和LMEB上表现优异：BEIR达SOTA，媲美Qwen3-Reranker；MIRACL上未专训多语言仍表现强劲；LMEB中0.27B Nano模型可匹敌7–12B嵌入模型。

Conclusion: KaLM-Reranker-V1成功平衡了效率与表达力，验证了解耦计算+早期交互设计的有效性，为大规模检索系统提供了一种实用、可扩展的重排序新范式。

Abstract: As retrieval systems scale, high-quality reranking becomes increasingly important. However, most existing rerankers, whether encoder-based or decoder-based, jointly encode the query and passage, tightly coupling their computation and limiting deployment efficiency as well as flexibility. We present KaLM-Reranker-V1, a fast but not late-interaction (FBNL) reranker that decouples query and passage computation while retaining expressive relevance modeling. Built on an encoder-decoder architecture, KaLM-Reranker-V1 uses the encoder to pre-encode passages with Matryoshka embedding pooling, while the decoder models the system instruction, user instruction, and query intent; cross-attention then captures relevance between the query context and passage representations. This design makes KaLM-Reranker-V1 efficient through decoupled passage encoding, yet not late interaction, by preserving rich relevance modeling through cross-attention. We instantiate KaLM-Reranker-V1 in three sizes, Nano, Small, and Large, with 0.27B, 1B, and 4B activated parameters, respectively. Extensive experiments on BEIR, MIRACL, and LMEB demonstrate that KaLM-Reranker-V1 achieves strong reranking performance with superior efficiency. On BEIR, KaLM-Reranker-V1 achieves state-of-the-art performance, on par with strong industrial models such as the Qwen3-Reranker series; on MIRACL, despite not being extensively trained on multilingual data, KaLM-Reranker-V1 still shows excellent reranking performance. Moreover, on LMEB, reranking models demonstrate a clear advantage, with even the 0.27B Nano model remaining competitive with 7-12B embedding models.

</details>


### [406] [Bagpiper-TTS: Natural Language Guided Universal Speech Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22811)
*Jinchuan Tian,Haoran Wang,Siddhant Arora,Takashi Maekaku,Keita Goto,Jin Sakuma,Yusuke Shinohara,Chao-Han Huck Yang,Shinji Watanabe*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Bagpiper-TTS，一种基于自然语言提示的通用语音合成系统，通过意图推理生成富含元信息的文本蓝图，支持多说话人、角色扮演、歌唱等多种任务，并在多个评测中达到先进水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统TTS系统依赖固定输入格式和预定义元数据槽位，难以满足用户灵活多样的需求。

Method: Bagpiper-TTS首先对自然语言提示进行意图推理，生成包含转录文本与细粒度元数据的丰富caption，再以此指导语音合成。

Result: 在Seed-TTS-Eval基准上WER达1.7%，在LLM-as-a-judge和人工主观评测中表现媲美专用模型。

Conclusion: Bagpiper-TTS实现了通用性与高性能的统一，显著拓展了TTS系统的任务覆盖范围与交互灵活性。

Abstract: Classical TTS systems typically rely on rigid input formats and predefined metadata slots, limiting their ability to fulfill flexible user requirements. This paper introduces Bagpiper-TTS, a universal speech synthesis system that deals with diverse natural language user requests. Given a natural language prompt, Bagpiper-TTS first reasons over the users' intent to derive a rich caption, i.e., a comprehensive textual blueprint encompassing both transcription and nuanced metadata. Subsequently, this caption guides the synthesis of the target speech. Our model inherently supports a broad spectrum of tasks besides classical TTS applications, including multi-talker, intent-to-speech, role-play synthesis, singing voice synthesis, and more. Experimental results demonstrate that Bagpiper-TTS achieves an 1.7% Word Error Rate (WER) on the Seed-TTS-Eval benchmark and match the performance of dedicated models in both LLM-as-a-judge and human subjective evaluations across multiple applications.

</details>


### [407] [IndicGuard: A Multilingual Safety Guard Model and Dataset for Indic Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22841)
*Parth Bramhecha,Smit Deshmukh,Sairaj Bodhale,Adwait Borate,Raviraj Joshi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了IndicGuard，一个面向印度语言的多语言安全守卫模型和数据集，旨在解决现有英语中心化安全机制在印度地区文化敏感性和本地化危害识别上的不足。通过构建涵盖10种主要印度语言的高质量、文化适配的安全数据集，并基于Gemma-3-4B-IT微调出4B参数模型，IndicGuard在本地化漏洞防御、多轮对话一致性及跨语言泛化能力上均显著优于基线模型CultureGuard。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM安全机制以英语为中心，难以准确识别印度地区特有的社会文化敏感性和本地化危害类型，亟需适配区域价值观的多语言安全方案。

Method: 构建覆盖10种印度语言、包含地域性危害、敏感社会政治语境与对抗性越狱样本的高质量安全数据集；基于Gemma-3-4B-IT指令微调4B参数模型作为多语言安全守卫；开展跨语言、多轮对话及低资源语言泛化评估。

Result: IndicGuard在本地化鲁棒性、多轮内容审核一致性上显著提升，全面超越CultureGuard；并在未见的低资源印度语言上展现良好泛化能力。
