We introduce a causal prior that synthesizes each dataset from a randomly sampled DAG over typed nodes across two modalities (tabular attributes and time series), natively producing multivariate, multi-class TSC datasets with cross-modal causal structure across channels, timesteps and labels, a regime not addressed by existing synthetic priors. To validate the prior, we finetune TabPFN v2.5 with minimal adaptations and evaluate on 75 UCR/UEA datasets within TabPFN's operating regime. Finetuning on our generator significantly outperforms both the unmodified upstream model and a tabular-only ablation of the same prior (Wilcoxon signed-rank $p=3.0\times 10^{-8}$ on ROC-AUC), isolating the contribution of the cross-modal temporal structure.

</details>


### [739] [RocketPFN: Accurate Time Series Classification via In-Context Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21786)
*Franco Martino O'Rourke,Ana Trisovic,Dimitris Bertsimas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RocketPFN是一种无需训练的时间序列分类方法，结合了随机卷积特征提取（Rocket）和预训练表格基础模型（TabPFN v2.5）进行上下文内分类，在多个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能且零训练开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为时间序列分类（TSC）提供一种无需目标数据训练、高效且高性能的零样本基准方法，以评估新兴的TSC基础模型。

Method: 采用两阶段无训练流水线：第一阶段用Rocket随机卷积提取时间序列特征；第二阶段将特征输入预训练的TabPFN v2.5模型，通过上下文学习完成分类。

Result: 在92个UCR数据集上平均准确率达0.900，与最强集成方法HC2持平（p=0.50），推理中位耗时30秒/折；显著优于HC2中任一单模型及MOMENT/Mantis系列TSC基础模型（p<0.001）。

Conclusion: RocketPFN为零样本TSC提供了强基线，证明无需学习参数、仅依赖随机特征+大模型上下文推理即可媲美甚至超越复杂训练模型，建议作为TSC基础模型评估的新参考标准。

Abstract: We introduce RocketPFN, a training-free pipeline for time series classification that combines random convolutional feature extraction (Rocket) with in-context classification via a pretrained tabular foundation model (TabPFN v2.5). On 92 UCR datasets (30-resample protocol), RocketPFN matches HC2, the strongest published method on the archive, in mean accuracy (both 0.900, Wilcoxon p=0.50), with no training on the target data and a median inference time of 30 seconds per fold. It also significantly outperforms every individual classifier in the HC2 ensemble. On UEA (20 datasets) the difference is likewise not statistically significant. A separate comparison concerns TSC foundation models: when paired with the same downstream classifier, MOMENT, Mantis, and MantisV2 are all significantly outperformed by RocketPFN using fewer extracted features and no learned parameters (p<0.001 in each case). This holds even when the encoders were pretrained on corpora that include the UCR training samples. We propose this two-stage pipeline as a reference point for evaluating zero-shot TSC foundation models.

</details>


### [740] [What Do Lorentz-Equivariant Jet Taggers Learn?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21790)
*Jay Agarwal,Siddharth Khare,Dhruv Kumar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了洛伦兹协变喷注标记器（Lorentz-equivariant jet taggers）内部学习的内容，通过协变性测试、线性探针和等级消融分析五种模型，发现协变模型抑制伪快度等参考系依赖特征，而强编码喷注质量与N-子喷注性，并揭示不同几何代数等级通道对顶夸克识别的贡献差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究洛伦兹协变喷注标记器内部学习的物理特征与代数结构，以理解其判别能力来源并指导未来模型设计。

Method: 采用协变性测试、线性探针和等级消融（grade ablations）方法，在L-GATr、L-GATr-slim和LLoCa-T等五个模型上进行分析。

Result: 线性探针显示协变模型将帧依赖的伪快度压制为零，同时强编码喷注质量和N-子喷注性；等级消融表明在L-GATr中，双矢量通道对顶夸克标记可忽略，而类矢量通道占主导但初始变量敏感，说明网络利用多种表征路径。

Conclusion: 物理特征（如喷注质量、N-子喷注性）和特定代数等级结构（如类矢量通道）共同承载判别信息，该发现有助于优化洛伦兹协变喷注标记器的设计。

Abstract: We study what Lorentz-equivariant jet taggers learn internally, using equivariance tests, linear probes and grade ablations across five models including L-GATr, L-GATr-slim and LLoCa-T. Linear probes show that equivariant models suppress frame-dependent pseudorapidity to zero while encoding jet mass and N-subjettiness strongly. Grade ablations on L-GATr reveal that bivector channels are negligible for top-quark tagging while vector-like channels are dominant but seed variable, consistent with the network exploiting multiple representational pathways. These results characterize which physical features and algebraic grade structures carry discriminative information in equivariant taggers and may inform future development of such models.

</details>


### [741] [Discretizing Reward Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21795)
*Vijay Viswanathan,Shiqi Wang,Devamanyu Hazarika,Chirag Nagpal,Tongshuang Wu,Graham Neubig,Yuning Mao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了奖励模型在强化学习中的过度敏感性问题，并提出通过离散化奖励来缓解该问题，从而提升策略质量并减少奖励黑客行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管奖励模型被广泛使用，但其在塑造强化学习中的作用仍不清楚；现有连续型奖励模型虽能区分细微差异，却常对同样优质的响应给出不同评分，导致策略退化。

Method: 提出用蒙特卡洛Dropout对任意神经奖励模型进行无训练离散化，形成离散奖励簇；理论分析其在降低过度敏感性的同时保持判别能力；并在控制实验与自然RL场景中验证效果。

Result: 实证表明，离散化奖励可显著减少奖励黑客行为，获得比原始连续奖励更优的策略；理论证明存在兼顾低过度敏感性与高判别能力的离散化方案。

Conclusion: 应摒弃单一‘准确率’评估奖励模型，转而采用‘判别能力’与‘特异性’（即低过度敏感性）双重指标；离散化是一种简单有效、无需再训练的改进方法。

Abstract: Despite their widespread use, the role of reward models in shaping reinforcement learning is poorly understood. Reward models offer a tempting promise: they automatically estimate response quality in the absence of verifiers or human judges. Unlike "verifiable rewards" which typically produce binary scores, reward models typically produce continuous scores, allowing them to be sensitive to fine-grained differences in responses. However, we show this apparent strength is a serious weakness: many popular reward models are oversensitive, assigning different scores to equally good responses. Theoretically, we show that seemingly perfect reward models can be highly oversensitive; empirically, this oversensitivity can lead to bad policies. In place of existing notions of "reward model accuracy," we propose evaluating reward models using distinct measures of "discriminative ability" and "specificity" (the complement of oversensitivity). As a solution, we describe a training-free algorithm that uses Monte Carlo dropout on any neural reward model to produce discrete reward clusters. Theoretically, we prove there exist discretizations that reduce oversensitivity at minimal expense of discriminative ability; empirically we show, in both controlled and natural RL settings, that discretizing rewards leads to less reward hacking and better policies than training on the original rewards.

</details>


### [742] [Causal Variational Deep Embedding: A Family of Interventional Generators for Confounded Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21806)
*Jingyuan Chen,Kangrui Ruan,Junzhe Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CauVaDE方法，通过构建一个规范化的增强结构因果模型（SCM），将未观测混杂因素建模为有界支持的离散潜在簇，并结合熵正则化在可行区域内生成多样化的干预样本，在图像数据上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度生成模型会继承训练数据中的虚假关联，尤其是由未观测混杂因子引起的混淆；现有因果生成方法依赖过强的结构假设，在图像领域往往不成立，而真实数据通常兼容多种可能的因果机制。

Method: 提出CauVaDE框架：基于一个规范化的增强SCM，将未观测混杂因子退化为离散潜在簇变量，连续变化由独立噪声吸收；将其实例化为混合变分自编码器，并引入熵正则项γ控制簇后验以遍历可行干预分布区域。

Result: 在图像基准数据集上，CauVaDE能生成多样化的干预样本，并在FID指标上优于无混杂的参考模型。

Conclusion: CauVaDE提供了一种更灵活、数据驱动的因果生成建模范式，无需强结构性假设即可逼近可观测与干预分布空间中的可行因果效应集合。

Abstract: Deep generative models reproduce the observational distribution of their training data, inheriting any spurious associations it contains. A common source is an unobserved confounder that shapes both an attribute the user wants to control at sampling time and an attribute expected to vary in response. Existing causal generative approaches resolve the resulting ambiguity by imposing structural assumptions strong enough to single out one interventional distribution; in image domains, such assumptions are rarely warranted, and the data is generally consistent with a set of distinct causal mechanisms -- a feasible region of interventional distributions. We propose CauVaDE (Causal Variational Deep Embedding), built on a canonical augmented SCM in which the unobserved confounder collapses, without loss of generality, into a discrete latent cluster of bounded support while continuous variation is absorbed into independent noises. We prove that this canonical class is dense, in both observational and interventional Wasserstein distance, in the class of augmented SCMs compatible with a given causal diagram, and instantiate it as a mixture variational autoencoder whose cluster variable plays the role of the canonical confounder. An entropy regularizer with weight $γ$ on the cluster posterior then traces a family of candidate causal effects that fit the observational data to comparable likelihood while spanning the feasible region. Experiments on image data benchmarks show that CauVaDE produces diverse interventional samples and improves FID against an unconfounded reference.

</details>


### [743] [Causal Gaussian Processes for Robust Treatment Effect Evaluation with Unobserved Confounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21809)
*Junzhe Zhang,Jingyuan Chen,Elias Bareinboim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在存在混杂偏差的情况下，从观测数据中评估连续域因果效应的新方法，通过通用离散化和因果高斯过程（CGP）模型实现对任意因果模型的高精度近似。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有政策评估方法难以处理混杂偏差，且多数要求先验环境知识或仅适用于离散变量，本文旨在解决连续变量下、仅需时序信息的因果效应评估问题。

Method: 提出一种对外生域的通用离散化方法，可任意精度逼近任意因果模型的观测与干预分布；在此基础上构建因果高斯过程（CGP）模型族。

Result: CGP模型能有效逼近任意含混杂观测的因果模型的观测与干预分布，在仅需治疗与结果间基本时间顺序的前提下实现连续域因果效应评估。

Conclusion: 该方法降低了对先验知识的依赖，拓展了混杂鲁棒因果评估在连续变量场景中的适用性，为实际观测数据下的策略评估提供了新工具。

Abstract: The presence of confounding bias poses a key challenge in policy evaluation, as the target causal effects of actions are not identifiable (i.e., underdetermined) from observational data. On the other hand, existing confounding-robust evaluation strategies require detailed prior knowledge about the environment or apply only to discrete treatments and outcomes. This paper investigates causal effect evaluation over the continuous domain from confounded observations, while requiring only basic temporal ordering between the treatment and the outcome. We introduce a universal discretization of the exogenous domains that approximates the observational and interventional distributions of any causal model with arbitrary accuracy using a finite number of latent states. Building on this newfound universal approximation property, we develop a novel family of Causal Gaussian process (CGP) models that effectively approximate the observational and interventional distributions of any causal model with confounded observations.

</details>


### [744] [Local Causal Attribution of Chain-of-Thought Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21821)
*Dennis Wei,Yannis Belkhiter,Erik Miehling,Radu Marinescu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AttriCoT方法，通过构建结构因果模型分析大语言模型思维链中各单元间的因果关系，以提升模型透明性与安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提升语言模型思维过程的因果理解能力，增强模型透明性和安全性。

Method: 提出AttriCoT算法，采用黑盒方法构建基于思维链单元的结构因果模型，并通过O(U)次前向传播估计各单元的重要性参数。

Result: 在5个数据集和4种推理模型上的扰动曲线评估表明，AttriCoT比其他方法更能忠实反映模型行为；归因结果揭示了不同模型和领域间思维结构的显著差异。

Conclusion: AttriCoT为理解语言模型内部推理机制提供了有效、高效且可解释的因果归因工具。

Abstract: Understanding the causal structure of a language model's thought process is a problem of significant importance for both transparency and safety. In this work, we take a local approach toward this goal by analyzing the causal relationships among individual components, termed units, of a given, specific chain-of-thought trace. We construct a structural causal model on these units and relate each unit to the log probability of generating (subsequent) output units. Our algorithm, termed AttriCoT, is a black-box method that performs attribution by estimating importance parameters in the structural causal model using $O(U)$ forward passes through the model, where $U$ is the number of units. Evaluation of perturbation curves across 5 datasets and 4 reasoning models shows that AttriCoT produces attributions that are more faithful to the model's behavior than alternative methods. The attribution results also reveal notable differences in thought structure between models and domains.

</details>


### [745] [Mat-Pref: Verifiable-Reward Training Improves Compositional Reasoning in Inorganic Materials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21830)
*Sarrah R. Mikhail Leung,Taehan Kim,Jeongbin Park*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了Mat-Pref基准，用于评估强化学习在材料科学中对离子取代问题的泛化能力，并发现单纯扩大模型规模不足以解决组合式化学推理；通过SFT+GRPO两阶段方法显著提升小模型性能，揭示了GRPO通过增强答案模态性来提升推理可靠性的机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLVR方法在科学领域缺乏细粒度泛化能力评估，无法区分结构迁移、性质迁移与记忆效应；需构建能解耦泛化维度的材料推理基准。

Method: 提出Mat-Pref基准（10,837个离子取代问题，覆盖11类无机结构），设计三种评估划分（分布内、结构族外推、跨性质迁移）；采用监督微调（SFT）加组相对策略优化（GRPO）两阶段训练，并结合自一致性采样与logit lens机制分析。

Result: 四个零样本大模型（70–671B）在各划分上仅达33–54%；Qwen3-8B经SFT+GRPO后，在分布内和结构族外推上分别达65.2%和71.6%，超越零样本Qwen3-235B超20个百分点；GRPO使正确答案更常成为模态响应，并将宽松/严格评分差距从24.0pp缩小至14.3pp。

Conclusion: 规模并非解决组合式化学推理的充分条件；GRPO通过重塑输出分布、增强关键层的答案结晶能力，显著提升小模型在结构泛化任务上的可靠性与鲁棒性。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) has driven rapid progress in mathematical and code reasoning, but when extended to science, existing benchmarks do not decompose what generalizes: do gains reflect structural transfer, property transfer, or memorization? We introduce Mat-Pref, a benchmark of 10,837 ionic-substitution questions across 11 inorganic structure families, grounded in density functional theory calculations from the Materials Project, with three evaluation splits that isolate in-distribution performance, generalization to entirely held-out structure families, and cross-property transfer: applying band-gap reasoning to hosts seen during training only through formation-energy supervision. Four zero-shot frontier models (70-671B parameters) remain in the 33-54% range on every split, confirming that scale alone does not resolve the compositional chemical reasoning this task demands. A two-stage pipeline of supervised fine-tuning followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) lifts Qwen3-8B to 65.2% in-distribution and 71.6% on held-out families, exceeding zero-shot Qwen3-235B by over 20 percentage points on both structural-generalization splits. Self-consistency sampling shows that the SFT policy can already produce correct answers but cannot reliably surface them as the modal response; GRPO reshapes the distribution so that correct answers become modal rather than merely reachable, and this sharper commitment is visible mechanistically: logit lens analysis reveals a ${\sim}$20pp advantage in answer crystallization at the critical decision layer. We formalize this observation as a distractor-permutation consistency metric under which GRPO narrows the gap between lenient scoring (at least one permutation correct) and strict scoring (all permutations correct) from 24.0 to 14.3 percentage points.

</details>


### [746] [UniRank: Unified Rank Allocation for Low-Rank LLM Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21847)
*Chao Han,Haozhe Hu,Fei Ma,Wei Zhang,Xiaoyu Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于双重标准（局部奇异能量比和全局功能重要性）的低秩分解秩分配方法，并引入保持秩的LoRA微调策略，显著提升大语言模型压缩效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有低秩分解中的秩分配方法存在手动规则泛化性差、学习方法计算开销大的问题。

Method: 将全局低秩分配建模为排序-截断流程，通过局部奇异能量比和全局输入-输出余弦相似度联合评分各奇异分量；提出秩保持的LoRA微调，避免传统合并流程中的再截断信息损失。

Result: 在多种模型结构、规模与分解方案下均验证有效性；单次压缩无需微调即相较均匀/启发式分配基线降低困惑度最高达50%。

Conclusion: 双重评分机制与秩保持微调可兼顾效率与性能，为大语言模型低秩压缩提供通用、高效的新范式。

Abstract: Low-rank decomposition serves as a promising compression paradigm for large language models, however, rank allocation remains challenging: manual rules lack generalizability, and learning-based approaches incur heavy computational overhead. To address these issues, we formulate global low-rank allocation as a sorting-and-truncation pipeline, and score each singular component via dual criteria: \textbf{Local} singular energy ratio that quantifies the intrinsic importance within the decomposed parameter matrix and \textbf{Global} functional importance (measured by input-output cosine similarity) that evaluates the functional significance of decomposed modules. We verify the strong correlation between high input-output cosine similarity and low effective rank through geometric interpretation and experimental validation. Furthermore, we propose rank-preserving fine-tuning, which performs direct LoRA tuning on decomposed weights and avoids extra information loss caused by re-truncation in conventional merging pipelines. Empirical results confirm that our method delivers sustained performance enhancements when combined with models featuring distinct decomposition schemes, model sizes and architectural designs, e.g. in one-shot compression without further fine-tuning, our method reduces perplexity by up to 50\% compared with uniform and heuristic allocation baselines. Code will be available at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/LLM-Pruning.

</details>


### [747] [WiSP: A Working-Set View of Mixture-of-Experts Serving on Extremely Low-Resource Hardware](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21868)
*Jiamu Zhang,Liang Wu,Mayank Darbari,Liangjie Hong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出WiSP和MV-WSA两种技术，通过路由感知的专家分页和边际价值驱动的VRAM分配，在低资源MoE模型服务中显著提升吞吐量与内存效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代MoE模型参数量大但稀疏激活，GPU显存受限下，传统层级CPU卸载牺牲了稀疏性优势；需在专家权重与KV缓存间高效共享有限VRAM。

Method: 提出WiSP（路由感知专家分页器）动态驻留高频复用专家；提出MV-WSA（边际价值工作集分配）按单位字节延迟收益均衡分配VRAM，并支持离线配置或在线动态调整。

Result: WiSP在相同显存预算下实现最高1.95倍解码吞吐量提升；MV-WSA离线配置在真实服务中兼顾prefill与decode性能，线上控制器进一步提升1.20倍吞吐量。

Conclusion: MoE服务瓶颈不在路由预测精度而在PCIe带宽与VRAM分配策略；MV-WSA通过边际价值优化实现了接近oracle的资源分配效果。

Abstract: Modern Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models place most of their parameters in expert layers, yet only a small fraction of those experts are used for any token. The unused weights must still be stored where the GPU can reach them. On commodity GPUs the common fix is layer-level CPU offloading, which keeps memory low but streams all of a layer's experts across PCIe on every forward pass, losing much of MoE's sparsity benefit. We cast low-resource MoE serving as a working-set management problem on the GPU: routed expert weights and the key-value (KV) cache are two streams of memory demand competing for limited VRAM. We realize this in WiSP (Working-Set Paging), a routing-aware expert pager that plugs into an unmodified serving engine with byte-identical outputs. Keeping resident only the experts a workload reuses, WiSP reaches up to 1.95x the decode throughput of static offload at the same memory budget when the model does not fit. We also find that prefetching experts from predicted routing helps little in single-stream decode: the bottleneck is PCIe bandwidth, not prediction accuracy. This shifts the question from prefetching to allocation: how should VRAM be split between experts and the KV cache? We answer with MV-WSA (Marginal-Value Working-Set Allocation), which equalizes marginal latency benefit per byte subject to a KV admission floor. MV-WSA runs either as an offline configurator or as an online controller that resizes both pools while serving. In real serving the offline configurator is the only policy we test that does well on both prefill and decode; in trace-driven simulation it stays within a few percent of a per-workflow oracle while fixed splits are about 20% worse. The online controller adds a further 1.20x without changing model outputs.

</details>


### [748] [Protein contacts are already in the attention: a single-forward-pass alternative to the Categorical Jacobian](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21876)
*Rome Thorstenson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于注意力头选择的高效蛋白质接触预测方法，仅需一次前向传播即可超越原Categorical Jacobian（CJ）方法，在泄漏清洁数据上显著提升性能，并揭示了预训练数据重叠对先前评估结果的夸大影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Categorical Jacobian（CJ）方法计算开销大（约19L次前向传播），且其性能可能因训练/测试数据泄漏被高估；本文旨在寻找更高效、更鲁棒的接触预测读出机制。

Method: 提出基于少量标注蛋白（如10个）选出top-K接触相关注意力头，并对其输出取平均（无需参数）；引入representation-CJ以适配无掩码语言建模头的架构；在泄漏清洁的CAMEO数据集上系统评估。

Result: 在泄漏清洁设置下，新方法在ESM-2-650M上比CJ提升+9个百分点（p<0.001）；性能增益源于监督式头选择而非平均操作；CJ与新方法在泄漏清洁下均比原始报告下降30–36个百分点，表明先前结果受数据泄漏显著影响；representation-CJ适用于更广架构，但因果LM（ProGen2）上两种方法均失效。

Conclusion: 注意力头中已富集接触信号，只需少量标注即可识别并利用；当前主流评估存在严重泄漏偏差；双向预训练可能是注意力中编码残基对结构的必要条件。

Abstract: The Categorical Jacobian (CJ) of Zhang et al. (2024) reads protein contacts from a language model by perturbing every residue with every alternative amino acid, about 19L forward passes. We show the signal it reconstructs is already concentrated in a small subset of attention heads: averaging the top-K contact-relevant heads, selected on as few as 10 labeled proteins, recovers contacts in one forward pass and beats CJ on leakage-clean data for every bidirectional model where CJ is defined, and matches or beats it in-distribution (the exceptions being the smallest 8M model and a statistical tie on ESM Cambrian). Ablations localize the gain to labeled head selection, not averaging: at a matched label budget the unweighted mean ties a supervised L1 logistic regression on the same heads, so the parameter-free mean is selection's minimal form, not the source of the advantage. Our primary test is leakage-clean: on a CAMEO split where neither selection nor evaluation touches data the models have plausibly memorized, the head readout beats CJ on ESM-2-650M by +9 pp (N=29, p<0.001), with the within-model margin reproducing across architectures on a wider pretraining-aware set. Both methods fall 30-36 percentage points from their in-distribution Zhang numbers to the leakage-clean numbers, consistent with substantial pretraining overlap inflating prior numbers (a CAMEO-vs-Zhang difficulty shift contributes too, so we read it as an upper bound on the leakage component). We additionally introduce representation-CJ, a hidden-state generalization of the Jacobian for architectures without a masked-LM head; show that the optimal K tracks how diffusely a model spreads its contact heads; and find that both methods lose the contact signal on both causal LMs we test (ProGen2), suggesting attention-encoded pair structure may depend on bidirectional pretraining.

</details>


### [749] [A Verifiable Search Is Not a Learnable Chain-of-Thought](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21884)
*Harsh Patel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了链式思维（Chain-of-Thought）在教模型执行需回溯搜索的程序性任务（如密码算术题）时存在根本性局限：模型能准确执行单步运算和验证，但无法忠实模拟前向搜索过程；只有将搜索预计算为查表+验证，才能实现高精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究‘任何可由短程序求解的任务都能通过链式思维教会模型’这一假设是否成立，尤其关注需回溯搜索的程序性推理任务。

Method: 在9个由确定性生成器构造的推理任务上实验；对其中密码算术任务，逆向工程其Python求解器并转化为多种链式思维形式；在30B Nemotron模型上用LoRA微调，并测试不同模型规模、微调与提示方法；辅以消融实验（如揭示密钥）定位失败根源。

Result: 前向可计算任务（查表、算术、8位布尔）迁移效果好（≥0.99, 0.68），但密码算术任务在各种链式思维设计、强化学习和自训练下性能始终极低（0.01–0.07）；模型能准确执行单步运算（97–100%）且常将正确答案排进top-8（71%），却无法进行前向搜索推导；揭示密钥后性能跃升至0.57；预计算搜索并转为查表+验证方案达Private LB 0.92。

Conclusion: 当任务唯一解法依赖于在信息空白结构上的搜索时，不存在可被忠实模仿的前向链式思维；模型实际学到的是记忆与验证，而非搜索；提升此类任务性能的关键在于消除搜索，将其核心组合结构预计算为可检索知识。

Abstract: It is tempting to assume any task solvable by a short program can be taught to a model as its chain-of-thought: write the steps out, fine-tune, and the model follows. This paper shows the assumption fails for an identifiable class of procedures. The testbed is nine reasoning tasks, each from a deterministic generator; public and hidden splits share generators, so held-out data proxies test accuracy. I reverse-engineer the generators into Python solvers, render them as chain-of-thought, and distill into a rank-<= 32 LoRA over a 30B (3.5B-active) Nemotron model. Forward-computable tasks install readily: lookup/arithmetic and an 8-bit boolean task transfer (>= 0.99 and 0.68). Cryptarithm does not: distilling its backtracking search holds at 0.01-0.07 across eleven chain-of-thought designs, RL from verifiable rewards, and self-training, even though a search solver answers 71% of instances. This is not a capability gap. The model does the arithmetic on 97-100% of lines and ranks the correct cipher in its top eight on 71%; it cannot carry the search forward as a left-to-right derivation. Fine-tuning learns the shape of a verifiable elimination step while its verdicts become unconditional templates, correct only 16-57% of the time ("verdict-as-token"). The ceiling holds across backbones from 3B to 671B and across fine-tuning and prompting; a controlled intervention isolates the cause: revealing the cipher key, which turns the derivation forward, lifts the same instances from 0.03 to 0.57. When a procedure's only solution is search over information-free structure, no faithful forward chain-of-thought exists to imitate. The task becomes learnable only by removing the search, precomputing its combinatorial core into a catalog and reducing the trace to recall plus verification; the 1st-place solution reaches Private LB 0.92 this way. What distills is memorization and verification, not search.

</details>


### [750] [Cohort-Anchored Foundation Models for Electronic Health Records: From Risk Scores to Auditable Peer Cohorts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21885)
*Kaiping Zheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CAFM（Cohort-Anchored Foundation Model）框架，将患者队列作为核心建模对象，通过四阶段流程提升医疗基础模型的可解释性、鲁棒性与临床对齐性，并在多个临床任务中验证其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医疗基础模型虽性能优异，但因缺乏可解释性、易受分布偏移影响、且未与临床医生推理逻辑对齐，难以可靠部署；根本原因在于忽视患者队列比较这一关键临床证据来源。

Method: 提出CAFM框架，包含四个阶段：偏差感知的数据筛选、队列条件化预训练、多模态队列对齐、以及医生参与的迭代优化；该框架可即插即用地增强现有EHR基础模型，无需修改其编码器。

Result: 在急性肾损伤预测、心电图心血管风险分层、眼眶影像视神经病变分诊、以及视网膜电图驱动的报告生成等四个临床案例中验证了CAFM的有效性；并提出五个可实证检验的假设及五大开放挑战。

Conclusion: 将基础模型显式锚定于患者队列，是构建可信临床AI的原理性路径。

Abstract: Foundation models have achieved remarkable performance across medical question answering, imaging, and electronic health record (EHR) tasks, yet reliable clinical deployment remains challenging due to limited interpretability, vulnerability to distribution shift, and weak alignment with clinician reasoning. We argue that these limitations arise because existing approaches prioritize representation learning while treating patient comparison as an emergent property rather than a primary source of clinical evidence. To address this gap, we propose CAFM, a Cohort-Anchored Foundation Model framework that elevates patient cohorts to a first-class object throughout the learning pipeline. The framework consists of four stages: deviation-aware data curation, cohort-conditioned pretraining, multimodal cohort alignment, and clinician-in-the-loop refinement. Together, these stages improve data quality, organize representations around clinically meaningful cohort structure, preserve modality-specific relationships, and support auditable clinical decision-making. The framework is compositional and can augment existing EHR foundation models without modifying their underlying encoders. We illustrate CAFM through four clinical case studies spanning acute kidney injury prediction, cardiovascular risk stratification from electrocardiograms, optic neuropathy triage from orbital imaging, and electroretinogram-grounded report generation. We further present five empirically testable hypotheses and identify open challenges in data quality, irregular temporality, multimodal learning, distribution shift, and evaluation beyond predictive accuracy. We argue that explicitly anchoring foundation models to patient cohorts provides a principled path toward trustworthy clinical AI.

</details>


### [751] [Ranking-and-Selection with Multiple Correct Answers and Non-Answerable Estimates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21889)
*Qiaoqiao Wang,Wei You*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为ENDS的统一框架，用于解决结构化场景下的固定精度排序与选择问题，尤其处理答案非唯一及噪声导致暂时无有效解的情况；通过答案导向的接受集、受限广义似然比停止规则和答案陷阱分解，实现了高效纯探索性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对多保真度排序选择和成对比较中识别Condorcet胜者等场景中出现的答案非唯一性及噪声下暂时无有效解的问题，亟需一种统一且鲁棒的纯探索方法。

Method: 提出基于答案导向接受集、受限广义似然比停止规则和答案-陷阱分解的统一框架；设计ENDS算法，整合估计、提名、陷阱检测与成本感知的信息导向选择，并为多种问题推导显式公式。

Result: ENDS在广泛的纯探索问题（如多保真度R&S、Condorcet Winner识别）上展现出优异性能，数值实验验证其有效性与实用性。

Conclusion: ENDS提供了一个通用、可实例化的理论框架与算法范式，为结构化固定精度排序与选择问题提供了坚实的理论基础与实用解决方案。

Abstract: We study fixed-precision ranking-and-selection in structured settings where the answer may be non-unique and where noisy estimates may temporarily admit no valid answer at all. This phenomenon arises naturally in problems such as multi-fidelity ranking-and-selection and identifying a Condorcet winner from pairwise comparisons. To address this, we propose a unified framework based on answer-wise acceptance sets, restricted generalized likelihood ratio stopping, and an answer-pitfall decomposition that yields a max-max-min characteristic value and a common sampling principle. We introduce ENDS, a general procedure that combines estimation, nomination, pitfall detection, and cost-aware information-directed selection. We instantiate ENDS for various problems by deriving explicit formulas. Extensive numerical experiments show that this unified recipe performs well across a broad range of pure-exploration problems and offers a practical framework and proof-of-concept algorithmic recipe.

</details>


### [752] [AgroSense 2.0: Cross-Modal Transformer Fusion with Geospatial Raster Integration and Interpretable Multi-Task Learning for Precision Crop Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21892)
*Vishal Pandey,Rishav Tewari,Ruzina Haque Laskar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AgroSense 2.0 提出一种融合多模态（遥感图像+土壤化学数据）的作物推荐框架，通过地理空间土壤栅格、跨模态Transformer融合和多任务学习提升精度与可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决精准农业中视觉土壤表征与化学养分分析长期存在的模态割裂问题，避免简单特征拼接导致的语义融合不足。

Method: 1）引入覆盖印度全域的七波段土壤栅格（含氮、pH、SOC等）作为新空间模态；2）设计跨模态Transformer融合模块，使表格型养分特征通过多头注意力机制关注图像表征；3）采用共享骨干网的多任务学习（土壤分类+作物推荐）；4）用TreeSHAP对表格分支进行可解释性分析。

Result: 模型在作物推荐任务上性能提升，且TreeSHAP揭示了不同作物的关键影响因子：水稻受降雨主导，玉米受氮与钾主导，咖啡受湿度与氮主导，符合农学规律并发现数据特有偏差。

Conclusion: AgroSense 2.0 构建了更原理化、可解释、地理空间感知的精准农业框架，为多模态农业AI提供了新范式。

Abstract: Crop recommendation systems in precision agriculture have long suffered from a fundamental modality gap: visual soil characterization and chemical nutrient profiling are typically treated as independent inference problems, with fusion often reduced to late-stage feature concatenation. AgroSense~2.0 addresses this limitation through three architectural advances. First, we introduce continental-scale geospatial integration via a seven-band soil raster (\texttt{india\_soil\_7bands.tif}) spanning India, encoding Nitrogen, pH, SOC, Clay, Sand, Silt, and Bulk Density as $32\times32$ spatial patches, a modality entirely absent from prior work. Second, we replace naive feature concatenation with a cross-modal Transformer fusion module, where tabular nutrient features attend over image representations via multi-head attention, enabling richer inter-modal dependency modeling than shallow fusion. Third, we adopt a multi-task objective jointly optimizing soil classification and crop recommendation through a shared backbone, improving generalization via complementary cross-task signal. To enhance interpretability, we apply TreeSHAP to the tabular branch, revealing crop-conditioned nutrient sensitivity: humidity and rainfall emerge as the most influential features globally, while crop-specific profiles diverge meaningfully rainfall dominates rice, nitrogen and potassium dominate maize, and humidity and nitrogen dominate coffee. These explanations provide transparency into model decisions and surface both agronomically consistent patterns and dataset-specific divergences worth further study. Together, these contributions establish AgroSense~2.0 as a more principled, interpretable, and geospatially grounded framework for precision agriculture.

</details>


### [753] [Data Pruning: Redundant, Problematic, and Interdependent Samples](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21916)
*Leon Freese,Marthinus W. Theunissen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了数据剪枝方法在有噪声和无噪声条件下的表现，发现现有方法在标签噪声显著时失效，并指出数据冗余、问题样本和样本间依赖性是影响剪枝效果的三大关键因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习模型性能不仅受数据量影响，还受数据质量制约；数据剪枝旨在保留最关键样本以减小数据集规模并维持性能，但其在噪声环境下的鲁棒性尚不明确。

Method: 对两种主流数据剪枝方法进行实证分析，涵盖噪声与无噪声场景，并在多个基准分类数据集及神经网络架构上系统评估冗余性、问题样本和样本间依赖性的影响。

Result: 发现现有剪枝方法在显著标签噪声下失效；数据冗余、问题样本（如错误标注）及样本间依赖性共同决定剪枝效果；该结论在不同数据分布和训练协议下具有一致性。

Conclusion: 数据剪枝的成功高度依赖于数据内在结构特性，单纯基于模型反馈的剪枝策略在噪声环境下不可靠，需针对性建模上述三类因素以提升鲁棒性。

Abstract: The performance of deep learning models is affected by not only data quantity but also data quality. Data pruning is a process by which practitioners can reduce the size of a dataset by only keeping the most important training data points, thereby achieving similar test set performance. We empirically investigate two popular data pruning methods under noisy and noiseless conditions and show that these methods fail in the presence of significant label noise. We highlight that the success of data pruning is distinctly affected by three factors: redundancy in the dataset, the presence of problematic samples, and interdependence between samples. We perform a detailed investigation on commonly used benchmark classification datasets and neural network architectures. We find that our observations are consistent across data distributions and training protocols.

</details>


### [754] [Selective Ensemble Based on Preference-Directed Multi-Objective Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21929)
*Lanjihong Ma,Zhen-Yu Zhang,Masashi Sugiyama,Zhi-Hua Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向偏好导向的多目标赌博机框架（PDMOB），用于在有限评估预算下选择性集成模型，并设计了PrefUCB算法，在理论和实验上均验证其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代机器学习系统中，受限于评估预算，需在部分能力偏好（如准确率、鲁棒性、推理能力）下选择最优模型子集，现有方法难以兼顾多目标与偏好不确定性。

Method: 形式化为偏好导向多目标赌博机（PDMOB），引入Pareto C-最优性概念，并提出基于方向置信区间的PrefUCB算法。

Result: 理论分析给出了指标型与间隙加权遗憾的实例相关对数上界；实验在大模型选择性集成与机构约束下的在线资产配置任务中验证了方法优越性。

Conclusion: PrefUCB能有效处理部分指定线性偏好下的多目标序贯决策问题，统一并推广了经典Pareto最优与标量化方法，在理论保证与实际性能上均有提升。

Abstract: Selective ensemble for modern machine learning systems requires choosing promising model candidates under limited evaluation budgets, while downstream tasks often specify only partial preferences over capabilities such as accuracy, robustness, and reasoning. This setting naturally gives rise to a sequential decision problem under partially specified linear preferences. We formalize it as preference-directed multi-objective bandits (PDMOB), where admissible trade-offs are represented by a polyhedral preference cone. Based on this formulation, we introduce Pareto $C$-optimality, which recovers standard Pareto optimality and single-weight scalarization as special cases. We then propose the preference-directed upper confidence bound (PrefUCB) algorithm, which maintains directional confidence intervals to guide exploration. We analyze both indicator-based and gap-weighted regret, and establish instance-dependent logarithmic bounds for both criteria, recovering the optimal logarithmic dependence on the horizon $T$ in classical special cases. Experiments on large pre-trained model selective ensemble tasks and online asset allocation under institutional mandates validate the efficacy of our method.

</details>


### [755] [DevoTG: Temporal Graph Neural Networks for Modeling C. elegans Developmental Connectomics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21940)
*Jayadratha Gayen,Bradly Alicea*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DevoTG框架，利用时序图神经网络（TGN）建模秀丽隐杆线虫神经发育的细胞谱系与突触连接组动态过程，在谱系预测任务中显著优于静态GNN，并揭示了连接稳定性分类及关键中间神经元的时序中心性演化规律。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解神经系统从出生到成年如何自我构建是发育神经科学的基本挑战，现有方法难以同时刻画细胞分裂动态与突触连接演化。

Method: 构建两种互补时序图：基于细胞谱系数据的连续时间动态图（CTDG）和基于8套电镜重建数据的离散时间突触连接组图（DTDG），并应用时序图神经网络（TGN）进行建模与分析。

Result: 在谱系预测任务中TGN达到0.839±0.007的测试AUC，显著优于静态GNN；在连接组分析中识别出三类连接稳定性模式，并发现AVA/AVB/AVE等中枢神经元的中心性随发育阶段持续增强。

Conclusion: DevoTG为解析神经发育提供了可扩展、可解释的时序图学习框架，兼具计算性能与生物学洞见，支持跨物种推广。

Abstract: Understanding how a nervous system wires itself from birth to adulthood is a fundamental challenge in developmental neuroscience. We present DevoTG, a temporal graph framework that applies Temporal Graph Neural Networks (TGNs) to two complementary representations of C. elegans neural development: a Continuous-Time Dynamic Graph (CTDG) of cell division events derived from cell lineage data, and a Discrete-Time Dynamic Graph (DTDG) of the developing synaptic connectome spanning eight reconstructed electron-microscopy datasets. On the lineage prediction task, our TGN achieves a mean test AUC of 0.839 +/- 0.007 (5 seeds; validation AUC 0.937 +/- 0.001), outperforming a static GNN with the identical architecture by 26 AUC points (0.577 +/- 0.080), demonstrating that temporal memory is the decisive factor. Applied to the connectome DTDG, DevoTG identifies three connection stability classes (stable, developmental, and variable) across 225 neurons and 858 to 2,496 connections over development (L1 birth to adult), providing a temporal-graph-theoretic complement to the individual-variability classification of Witvliet et al. Analysis of hub command interneurons AVA, AVB, and AVE reveals their persistent centrality and how their integration roles are progressively reinforced across larval stages. Accompanying interactive visualizations (3D animated networks, centrality heatmaps, and a spatiotemporal lineage graph) make developmental dynamics accessible for biological hypothesis generation. DevoTG is open-source and designed for extension to other developing nervous systems. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/DevoLearn/DevoGraph/tree/main/DevoTG.

</details>


### [756] [Modularized Reinforcement Learning on LLMs: From MDP Creation to Exploration and Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21943)
*Zhao Yang,Yuxuan Jiang,Ting-Chih Chen,Lincen Yang,Annie Wong,Chao Gao,Jacob E. Kooi,Zhong Li,Jiayang Shi,Kevin Qiu,Qi Huang,Xinrui Zu,Shiping Yang,Hengyuan Zhang,Ngai Wong,Filip Ilievski,Shujian Yu,Aske Plaat,Zhaochun Ren,Mark Hoogendoorn,Vincent François-Lavet*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文综述了强化学习（RL）在大语言模型（LLM）后训练中的应用现状，系统梳理了RL算法设计的三个核心阶段（MDP构建、探索策略、学习范式），揭示了当前主流方法（如PPO、GRPO）之外大量未被充分探索的RL技术路径，指出了价值函数方法、离策略Actor-Critic及基于bootstrapping的信用分配等关键研究空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM后训练过度依赖PPO和GRPO等有限几种RL方法，缺乏对更广泛RL范式的系统性考察与迁移；需建立统一框架以厘清现状、识别空白、促进RL与LLM领域的交叉创新。

Method: 采用三阶段分类法组织分析：1）MDP构建（奖励函数、状态/动作空间等设计）；2）探索策略（温度采样、熵正则、内在动机等）；3）学习维度（模型型/免模型、值函数/策略/Actor-Critic、在线/离线、信用分配方式）。通过该taxonomy映射现有LLM-RL文献。

Result: 发现LLM-RL研究高度集中于无critic的策略梯度和蒙特卡洛信用分配，而价值函数方法、离策略Actor-Critic、bootstrapping等经典RL技术几乎未被探索，构成明确的研究机会。

Conclusion: 该综述为RL与LLM社区提供了共享分析框架，既总结了当前有效实践，也系统指出了可迁移的经典RL技术方向，有望推动LLM训练方法的多样化与性能提升。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become central to LLM post-training, yet the methods that dominate current pipelines, PPO and GRPO, represent only a narrow slice of what RL offers. Understanding why these methods prevail, and what alternatives exist, requires a principled examination of the design decisions that underlie any RL algorithm.
  This survey organizes that examination around three stages of algorithm construction. We begin with MDP creation: how the reward function, state space, action space, termination condition, and discount factor are, or could be, defined for LLM training. We then turn to exploration, covering temperature sampling, entropy regularization, intrinsic motivation, tree search, and curriculum learning. Finally, we address learning along four classical RL dimensions: model-free versus model-based, value-based versus policy-based versus actor-critic, on-policy versus off-policy, and credit assignment, including both Monte Carlo methods, which rely on full return estimates, and bootstrapping methods, which update estimates using other learned predictions.
  Mapping the LLM literature onto this taxonomy reveals a strikingly non-uniform distribution of research effort. Critic-free policy gradients and Monte Carlo credit assignment are densely populated, while value-based methods, off-policy actor-critic training, and bootstrapping-based credit assignment remain largely unexplored despite well-established counterparts in classical RL. These gaps represent concrete opportunities for transferring proven RL techniques to LLM training.
  By making these gaps explicit alongside the methods that have proven effective, this survey offers researchers in both RL and LLMs a shared framework for understanding current practice and identifying promising directions for future work.

</details>


### [757] [On the Curse of Dimensionality in Private Sparse Covariance Estimation and PCA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21951)
*Syamantak Kumar,Shourya Pandey,Purnamrita Sarkar,Kevin Tian*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在差分隐私（DP）约束下，高维稀疏协方差矩阵（k-行列稀疏）的估计与主成分分析（PCA）问题，证明了在DP下存在样本复杂度的指数级差距：非私有情形只需poly(k, log d)样本，而DP情形需poly(d)样本；并首次为稀疏高维统计中的估计问题建立了私有与非私有间的指数分离。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有工作在DP下对稀疏协方差估计和PCA所需样本数高达Ω(d)，远超非私有情形的poly(k, log d)；本文旨在探究该‘维度灾难’是否在DP下不可避免。

Method: 通过构造满足k-RCS结构的协方差矩阵实例，结合信息论下界技术（如fingerprinting codes或packing arguments）推导DP下的poly(d)下界；同时设计基于稀疏投影与噪声注入的DP PCA算法，实现poly(k, log d)上界（假设主导特征向量也稀疏）。

Result: 1) 在主导特征向量稀疏前提下，DP PCA可达到poly(k, log d)样本复杂度；2) 对DP稀疏协方差估计和PCA，均给出poly(d)下界，当k = polylog(d)时形成指数分离；3) 该分离结果亦强化了标准DP PCA（无稀疏假设）的已知下界。

Conclusion: 在差分隐私约束下，即使协方差矩阵本身稀疏，高维PCA与协方差估计仍面临本质性的样本效率下降；稀疏性本身不足以缓解DP带来的维度灾难，除非额外假设特征向量稀疏；这是首个在私有高维统计中证明稀疏估计任务存在指数级私有-非私有分离的工作。

Abstract: We study high-dimensional differentially private (DP) covariance estimation in the operator norm, and principal component analysis (PCA), under $k$-row-column sparsity ($k$-RCS) of the covariance matrix. In the non-private setting, it is known that $\mathsf{poly}(k, \log d)$ samples suffice to solve both of these problems. However, the only comparable result known under DP (Wang et al. 2021) requires $Ω(d)$ samples under standard parameterizations of the problem. We investigate when this curse of dimensionality is inherent for sparse covariance estimation tasks under DP.
  On the upper bound front, we show that a $\mathsf{poly}(k, \log d)$ sample complexity for PCA is possible under DP, if we also posit sparsity of the leading eigenvector. We complement this result with $\mathsf{poly}(d)$ lower bounds under DP for both sparse covariance estimation and PCA, establishing an exponential gap between the private and non-private variants of these problems when $k = \mathsf{polylog}(d)$. To our knowledge, no such separation has previously been demonstrated for any sparse estimation problems in private high-dimensional statistics. Our techniques are flexible enough that they imply stronger lower bounds even for the well-studied problem of standard DP PCA, without sparsity assumptions.

</details>


### [758] [Learning by Shifting: Temporal View Construction for Time Series Contrastive Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21957)
*Abdul-Kazeem Shamba,Kerstin Bach,Gavin Taylor*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为ShiFT的自监督学习方法，通过简单确定性的时序平移不变性视图构建，无需手工设计增强，在多个时间序列基准上达到SOTA性能，并分析了对比学习在时序任务中的训练动态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列自监督学习依赖手工设计的数据增强和掩码策略，引入强领域假设，泛化性差且易产生虚假相关性。

Method: 提出Shift Invariant Feature Training（ShiFT），利用时间结构构造确定性正样本对（时序平移），摒弃手工增强，在对比学习框架中显式建模时序平移不变性。

Result: 在六个真实世界时间序列数据集及UCR/UEA归档上达到SOTA分类性能，同时降低训练耗时；系统分析了批量大小与负样本数对下游任务的影响。

Conclusion: 显式建模时序平移不变性足以学习强表征，挑战了依赖复杂增强的传统范式，为高效时间序列对比学习提供了新思路与实用指导。

Abstract: Supervised learning demands large quantities of labeled data, a bottleneck that is expensive and reliant on domain-specific expertise. Self-supervised learning, particularly contrastive learning, has emerged as a compelling alternative, enabling rich representation learning directly from unlabeled data. Yet its success hinges critically on the design of positive and negative sample pairs. Existing approaches for time series rely on hand-crafted augmentations and masking heuristics that embed strong domain assumptions, often limiting generalization across diverse temporal patterns and potentially introducing spurious correlations. In this work, we challenge this paradigm by demonstrating that explicitly encoding temporal shift invariance through a simple, deterministic view construction is sufficient to learn strong representations for time series classification. By exploiting temporal structure, our method, Shift Invariant Feature Training (ShiFT), achieves state-of-the-art performance on six diverse real-world time series benchmark datasets, as well as the UCR and UEA archives, while reducing training time. Beyond empirical performance, we present a systematic analysis of contrastive learning dynamics in time series settings, examining the effects of batch size and the number of negatives on downstream performance. Our findings provide practical insights for designing efficient contrastive learning frameworks for time series representation learning. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/sfi-norwai/ShiFT.

</details>


### [759] [A Standard Processing Pipeline for High-accuracy Measurement of Few-shot Regression on Laser Induced Breakdown Spectroscopy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21960)
*Hao Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Diffusion-DA-AE的标准化处理流程，结合扩散去噪、注意力自编码器降维、分组混洗数据增强和普通最小二乘回归，显著提升了少样本LIBS定量分析的精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LIBS在少样本场景下因光谱噪声和数据稀缺，难以实现高精度定量测量；传统预处理方法难以兼顾特征保留与非线性相关性建模。

Method: 构建集成扩散去噪（3D UNet）、注意力自编码器降维、分组混洗数据增强及普通最小二乘回归的端到端流程。

Result: 在多个元素浓度预测任务中，平均RMAE达0.2847，相较基线自编码器和PCA-PLS分别提升37.7%和37.6%。

Conclusion: 该框架具有强泛化能力，为少样本LIBS回归建立了新基准。

Abstract: Laser-induced breakdown spectroscopy (LIBS) faces challenges in high-accuracy quantitative measurement under few-shot scenarios due to spectral noise and data scarcity. Traditional preprocessing methods often fail to preserve subtle spectral features or capture nonlinear correlations. This work proposes a standardized processing pipeline integrating diffusion-based denoising, attention-based autoencoder for dimensionality reduction, group shuffling data augmentation, and ordinary least squares regression. The diffusion module employs a 3D UNet architecture to remove spectral noise while preserving essential emission features. The attention-autoencoder captures nonlinear spectral correlations, effectively reducing high-dimensional spectral data to compact latent representations. Group shuffling data augmentation enhances model robustness by creating synthetic samples through feature group permutation. Experimental results on multiple elemental concentrations demonstrate that our Diffusion-DA-AE pipeline achieves superior performance with a mean RMAE of 0.2847, representing 37.7\% and 37.6\% improvements over baseline autoencoder and traditional PCA-PLS regression, respectively. The framework's effectiveness validates its generalizability and establishes a new benchmark for few-shot LIBS regression.

</details>


### [760] [VegSim: A Geospatial World Model for Scenario-Conditioned Vegetation Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21961)
*Irene Iele,Elena Mulero Ayllón,Paolo Soda,Matteo Tortora*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了VegSim，一种用于情景条件下的植被模拟的地理空间世界模型，能够基于用户定义的气象强迫进行概率预测和条件模拟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 植被监测在气候压力下需要回答两个问题：一是给定预期天气时植被将如何演变；二是植被对替代气象条件的响应。现有预测模型无法回答后者，因为其未来天气被固定为观测轨迹。

Method: VegSim从稀疏卫星NDVI历史、过去气象协变量和静态空间上下文中推断潜在植被状态，通过循环潜在动力学在未来的天气强迫下向前传播，并在每个预测时间步解码预测NDVI分位数。未来强迫作为可控输入，使同一模型支持无监督的情景响应模拟。

Result: VegSim在GreenEarthNet数据集上展现出优于时间序列与地球观测预测基线的点预测与概率预测精度，并在空间、时间及联合时空偏移下保持鲁棒性；欧洲四类气象情景模拟及法国2022年夏季案例研究均呈现符合已知温湿敏感性的空间一致模式。

Conclusion: VegSim是一种紧凑、通用且可解释的地理空间世界模型，支持无监督的条件植被模拟，在气候变化适应与风险评估中具有重要应用潜力。

Abstract: Vegetation monitoring under climate stress requires answering not only how it will evolve given the expected weather, but how it would respond to alternative meteorological conditions. Forecasting models return the expected vegetation state for the observed weather and cannot answer these scenario-conditioned questions, because future weather is fixed to the recorded trajectory. We present VegSim, a geospatial world model for scenario-conditioned vegetation simulation. VegSim infers a latent vegetation state from sparse satellite-derived NDVI histories, past meteorological covariates, and static spatial context, propagates it forward under future weather forcing through recurrent latent dynamics, and decodes predictive NDVI quantiles at each lead time. Because future forcing enters as a controllable input, the same trained model supports probabilistic forecasting under observed weather and conditional simulation under user-defined meteorological forcing, without supervision on scenario responses. We evaluate VegSim on GreenEarthNet across in-distribution data and spatial, temporal, and joint spatial-temporal shift, where it achieves strong point and probabilistic accuracy against time series and Earth observation forecasting baselines while using a compact architecture. We then simulate vegetation responses across Europe under four meteorological scenarios, and in a France summer 2022 case study, obtaining spatially coherent patterns consistent with known sensitivity to temperature and precipitation. The code is available at https://github.com/arco-group/vegsim.

</details>


### [761] [SPOTR: Spatio-temporal Pooling One-Token Reconstruction for Universal Physiological Signal Self-supervised Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21973)
*Yiyu Gui,Mingzhi Chen,Yuesheng Zhu,Guibo Luo,Yuchao Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SPOTR框架，通过单令牌全局瓶颈和时空压缩模块，提升生理信号自监督学习效果，在多个数据集上显著优于现有方法，并降低计算和内存开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自监督学习方法在异构生理信号数据集上表现不佳，易扭曲临床有意义的结构或依赖时间/通道冗余；Transformer模型计算开销大且多为单模态设计。

Method: 提出SPOTR（Spatio-temporal Pooling One-Token Reconstruction）框架：将生理波形压缩为单令牌表示，并仅基于该表示重建原始信号；引入高效时空压缩模块以降低计算与内存成本；在20个EEG、iEEG、ECG、PPG数据集上预训练。

Result: 在线性探测下，SPOTR在多个生理信号数据集上平均AUC分别提升18.49%、21.71%、17.86%和4.64%；相比通用时序基础模型，延迟降低约78%，GPU峰值显存降低52%。

Conclusion: SPOTR通过单令牌重建与高效压缩设计，有效提升生理信号SSL的泛化性与效率，更适合临床轻量适配场景。

Abstract: Physiological signals such as EEG, ECG, and PPG are widely used in clinical monitoring. Recent self-supervised learning (SSL) methods offer an attractive way to leverage unlabeled recordings, yet they still fall short in practice. In particular, current SSL methods struggle across heterogeneous datasets, often distorting clinically meaningful structures or learning shortcuts from temporal and cross-channel redundancy. Consequently, existing SSL methods often deliver limited performance under linear probing, a lightweight adaptation setting that better matches real-world medical scenarios. Moreover, most Transformer-based SSL models encode a flattened spatiotemporal token sequence, incurring high computation and memory cost, and are typically developed within a single modality. To address these limitations, we present SPOTR (Spatio-temporal Pooling One-Token Reconstruction), a compress-reconstruct pretraining framework that introduces a single-token global bottleneck for physiological signals. SPOTR compresses each waveform into a single-token representation and reconstructs the signal conditioned only on this representation. Meanwhile, SPOTR introduces an efficient spatio-temporal compaction module to reduce computation and memory cost. Pretrained on 20 datasets spanning EEG, iEEG, ECG, and PPG, SPOTR consistently outperforms the strongest baseline under linear probing, improving average AUC by 18.49%, 21.71%, 17.86%, and 4.64%, respectively. Compared with a representative general-purpose time-series foundation model, SPOTR achieves around 78% lower latency and 52% lower peak GPU memory on average. The code can be found at https://github.com/5GYYYYY/SPOTR.

</details>


### [762] [Prefix-Guided On-Policy Distillation: Mining Golden Trajectories from Rollouts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21994)
*Qingfei Zhao,Huan Song,Shuyu Tian,Jiawei Shao,Xuelong Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Prefix-Guided On-Policy Distillation (PG-OPD)，通过在早期前缀阶段评估师生top-k重叠度，动态分配长程推理的生成预算，从而提升数学推理模型训练的效率与可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准On-policy distillation（OPD）对所有采样轨迹分配相同长程生成预算，导致低兼容性轨迹浪费计算资源并引入噪声；而师生局部兼容性（如前缀top-k重叠）可作为提前终止低价值轨迹的依据。

Method: PG-OPD先将每个采样候选解码至固定长度前缀，在该前缀的探查窗口内计算师生top-k重叠度；仅对高重叠候选继续长程生成，低重叠者截断于前缀，避免冗余后缀生成。

Result: 在AMC、AIME和HMMT基准上，PG-OPD相较基线平均准确率最高提升4.80分，训练时间最多减少2.46倍。

Conclusion: 前缀级师生兼容性是指导OPD计算资源分配的有效信号，能显著提升长程数学推理模型训练的效率与性能。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) improves reasoning models by applying dense teacher supervision on student-sampled trajectories. However, scaling OPD to long-horizon mathematical reasoning exposes a reliability and efficiency problem: standard OPD assigns every sampled candidate the same long rollout budget, even though some trajectories may quickly become weakly aligned with the teacher and provide less useful supervision. Prior analyses suggest that successful OPD depends on local teacher-student compatibility, which can be measured by top-k overlap on student-visited prefixes. When this overlap is low, continuing to generate or train on long suffixes may waste computation and introduce noisy learning signal. To address this, we introduce Prefix-Guided On-Policy Distillation (PG-OPD), a simple rollout-allocation framework that uses fixed-length prefixes to estimate trajectory value before expensive long-horizon generation. PG-OPD first decodes every sampled candidate to the same prefix length, computes teacher-student top-k overlap within an early probe window of that prefix, and selectively continues high-overlap candidates to a fixed long length. Low-overlap candidates stop at the fixed prefix, avoiding unnecessary suffix generation. Across diverse teacher-student combinations on AMC, AIME, and HMMT benchmarks, PG-OPD improves average accuracy by up to 4.80 points while reducing training time by up to 2.46x. These results suggest that prefix-level compatibility provides a practical signal for directing OPD computation toward trajectories that remain learnable from the teacher.

</details>


### [763] [Load Testing for Machine Learning Model Serving Systems at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22013)
*Amr S. Abdelfattah,Nakul Tirumalai,Indu Mohanan,Xiao Li,Pengchao Wang,Dinakar Dhurjati,Eric Sung*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为\sys的工业级ML模型服务负载测试框架，通过自适应、反馈驱动的搜索策略，结合实时性能信号（如阻尼、峰值容忍和收敛检测），系统性地估算在SLO约束下的最大可持续吞吐量；在14个工业案例中验证表明，该方法显著提升了GPU资源效率与运维可靠性，并提炼出6条经验与架构设计指南。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ML模型服务已成为GPU基础设施的主要负载，但其容量规划仍多为经验式；欠配置导致SLO违规和线上事故，过配置则造成资源浪费。

Method: 提出\sys框架，采用基于实时性能信号（含阻尼、峰值容忍、收敛检测）的自适应反馈搜索策略进行系统性容量估算；结合真实流量回放校准工作负载、合理处理预热阶段，并分析模型规模与混部效应等误差影响因素。

Result: 在14个覆盖推荐、排序、视觉和NLP四类模型的工业案例中验证：工作负载校准使估计误差从约30%降至2–6%，正确预热处理提升精度22.2%；显著减少模型上线初期因欠配置引发的事故，提升GPU资源效率与系统可靠性。

Conclusion: ML专用的负载测试设计对容量估算至关重要；本文总结六条实践教训并提出架构指南，为构建高可靠、高效率的ML服务系统提供可落地的技术路径。

Abstract: Machine learning (ML) model serving has become a dominant consumer of GPU infrastructure, yet capacity planning in these systems remains largely ad hoc. Under-provisioning leads to service-level objective (SLO) violations and production incidents, while over-provisioning results in substantial resource waste. This paper presents \sys, an industrial load testing framework for ML serving systems that systematically estimates serving capacity through an adaptive, feedback-driven search strategy. The approach leverages real-time performance signals, incorporating dampening, spike tolerance, and convergence detection to efficiently identify maximum sustainable throughput under SLO constraints. We evaluate \sys through a longitudinal analysis of 14 industrial case studies spanning four ML architecture classes: recommendation, ranking, vision, and NLP. This study demonstrates that systematic load testing leads to substantial improvements in GPU resource efficiency and operational reliability. Prior to adopting \sys, a significant fraction of model launches were under-provisioned, resulting in recurring incidents; these issues were substantially reduced after deployment. Our results show that ML-specific design decisions are critical to accurate capacity estimation: workload calibration using recorded traffic reduces estimation error from approximately 30\% to 2--6\%, while proper warmup handling yields a 22.2\% improvement in accuracy. Further analysis reveals key factors influencing prediction error, including model size and co-location effects. This paper distills six lessons and derive architectural guidelines for ML load testing, offering actionable insights for building reliable and efficient ML serving systems.

</details>


### [764] [Channel Location Constrains the Auditability of Subliminal Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22019)
*Tamas Madl*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了知识蒸馏中隐性特征传递的可审计性，发现通道位置（即特征传递路径）是决定审计有效性的关键因素，并识别出三种不同的传递机制及其对应的审计策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在知识蒸馏过程中，教师模型的隐藏特征如何被学生模型继承，并探讨在训练前能否对这种隐性学习进行可靠审计。

Method: 通过分析不同初始化、模型结构（如untied-head）和训练设置下，特征传递所依赖的通道（body channel、vocabulary geometry、conditional routing），结合覆盖度（coverage）、后验检测与针对性干预等方法进行实证评估。

Result: 发现三种特征传递机制：初始化依赖的body通道（coverage可预测转移）、词表几何驱动的初始化无关通道（需后验检测）、以及条件行为经网络主体路由的masked transfer；并验证了对应审计手段的有效性与局限性。

Conclusion: 通道位置决定了何种审计方法有效，脱离其适用范围的审计可能产生虚假安全感；因此，审计设计必须匹配特征实际传递的通道机制。

Abstract: Subliminal learning lets a student inherit a teacher's hidden trait from distillation data that never names it. We ask when such transfer can be audited before training. The answer is not model identity or scale alone, but channel location: the carrier through which the trait reaches the student. We find three regimes. In a controlled initialization-dependent body channel, a pre-training screen works. Coverage, the cosine between the student's initial distillation update and the teacher's fine-tuning displacement, predicts held-out transfer (Spearman $ρ\approx 0.95$; AUROC 0.997). In pretrained language models, masked single-token traits instead ride convergent vocabulary geometry. This channel is initialization-independent, so initialization-alignment screens, including coverage, are not mechanistic; the useful handles are post-hoc detection and targeted mitigation. Even when a single-token named entity is removed from the loss, the student's held-out probability for that entity rises to 0.40 on average ($\sim 2500\times$), and a related semantic class transfers. In an untied-head model, orthogonalizing the trait's output row against entangled neighbours collapses leakage, while equal-size random-subspace edits do not. Thus removing a target string from distillation labels does not remove the corresponding preference: neighbouring tokens can carry it. Finally, conditional behaviours can route through the network body. For sycophancy, with agreement and correction markers masked from the loss, transfer reaches about 0.63 of the teacher's effect, localizes to body computation, and evades four audits across two model families. We scope this as masked transfer of a condition-present policy. Channel location is necessary for deciding which audits can be sound. It is not a deployment-ready screen: an audit used outside its carrier regime can give false assurance.

</details>


### [765] [Cluster-Specific Localized Drift Detection for Efficient Batch Model Adaptation under Controlled Distribution Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22026)
*Ignacio Cabrera Martin,Marcello Trovati,Almas Baimagambetov,Nikolaos Polatidis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于聚类的分布漂移模拟框架，将静态表格数据集转化为可控的演化数据流，并系统评估了六种漂移适应策略在多个基准数据集和模型上的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有广泛使用的表格基准数据集缺乏明确的时间结构，限制了对漂移适应方法的可重现评估；而实际部署的机器学习系统常面临非平稳数据分布问题。

Method: 提出一种聚类诱导的分布漂移模拟框架，通过对特征空间划分施加结构化扰动，将静态表格数据集转化为可控演化数据流；并系统评估六种适应策略（如滑动窗口重训练、ADWIN全局/局部重训练等）在五种基准数据集及多种模型上的表现。

Result: 实验结果表明不同适应策略在分类与回归任务、不同模型族上的有效性存在显著差异，验证了所提框架对漂移适应研究的实用价值。

Conclusion: 该框架为非平稳环境下表格数据漂移适应方法提供了可控、可复现的评估基准，有助于推动鲁棒自适应机器学习系统的发展。

Abstract: Machine learning systems deployed in dynamic environments frequently operate under nonstationary data distributions, where controlled distribution shift can progressively degrade predictive performance. However, many widely used tabular benchmark datasets lack explicit temporal structure, limiting reproducible evaluation of drift adaptation methods. This work proposes a cluster-induced distribution shift simulation framework that transforms static tabular datasets into controlled evolving data streams through structured perturbations across featurespace partitions. Using this framework, six adaptation strategies are systematically evaluated: static learning, sliding-window retraining, global ADWIN retraining, cluster-local ADWIN retraining, random subspace drift detection, and feature-partitioned drift detection. Experiments are conducted on five benchmark datasets covering both classification and regression tasks using diverse predictive model families, including linear models, k-Nearest Neighbours, tree ensembles, boosting methods, and adaptive online learners.

</details>


### [766] [A Completion-Aware Framework for Impactful Counterfactual Explainability in Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22033)
*Maria Myrto Villia,Filippos Gouidis,Theodore Patkos,Panos Trahanias*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种通用、模型无关、局部级的图神经网络（GNN）反事实可解释性新框架，结合事实可解释性与缺失边预测技术，显著提升了反事实解释的质量、鲁棒性与直观性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有反事实解释器虽能增删边，但在通用性、效率及定性解释生成方面仍存在不足。

Method: 将事实可解释性进展与基于链路预测的缺失边预测模型相结合，构建模型无关的局部反事实解释流水线。

Result: 在真实与合成图分类基准（二分类与多标签）上的多维度实验表明，该方法在多项指标上优于当前最优基线。

Conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了GNN反事实解释的质量、鲁棒性与直观性，具备通用性和实用性。

Abstract: In this study, we propose a novel pipeline for generic, model-agnostic, local-level counterfactual explainability in graph neural networks (GNNs). Although counterfactual explainers capable of both adding and removing edges have emerged in recent years, the need for generic and efficient solutions remains unmet, particularly concerning qualitative explanation generation. Our approach couples progress in factual explainability with missing edge prediction models rooted in link prediction research, in order to enhance the quality, robustness and intuitiveness of explanations. A multi-faceted experimental analysis conducted on real-world and synthetic graph classification benchmarks, both binary and multi-label, demonstrates the advancements in comparison to state-of-the-art baselines across diverse metrics.

</details>


### [767] [Gradient-Descent Steps to Success over Mean Accuracy: A Paradigm Shift for ML](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22053)
*Riccardo Poli,Ahmet Yilmaz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于计算努力（梯度下降步数）的机器学习模型评估新范式，发现大学习率能减少计算努力并促进泛化，并揭示了训练策略的相变现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统ML评估只关注最高精度而忽略计算成本；本文旨在引入并优化‘计算努力’这一新指标，以更实际地衡量模型训练效率。

Method: 将Koza提出的计算努力概念扩展至所有基于梯度下降的ML模型，系统评估11种模型在5个分类数据集上的计算努力，并分析超参（尤其学习率）与努力、泛化及相变行为的关系。

Result: 发现最优超参普遍对应异常大的学习率；大学习率通过快速穿越损失景观既提升泛化（如superconvergence），又显著降低期望计算努力；存在训练策略的相变：低精度目标适合单次训练，高精度极限需大量短重启；该范式可支撑预算约束下的模型选择与精度最大化。

Conclusion: 计算努力是比单纯精度更全面、更具实践指导意义的评估维度；最小化该努力等价于一种新型AutoML；其揭示的学习动力学规律为高效训练与模型选择提供了新理论基础与实用准则。

Abstract: Traditional evaluation of machine learning (ML) models typically focuses on achieving the maximum possible accuracy irrespective of the computational cost. In this article, we propose a paradigm shift towards evaluating performance based on computational effort-explicitly defined here as the total number of gradient descent steps required to reach an acceptable level of accuracy with high probability. Building upon the concept of computational effort originally introduced by Koza for Genetic Programming, we extend this metric to any ML model trained via gradient descent. Furthermore, we demonstrate that minimising this effort acts as a novel form of Automatic Machine Learning (AutoML). By evaluating it across 11 diverse ML models and five standard classification datasets, we uncover significant insights into the dynamics of gradient-based learning. Our findings reveal that optimal hyper-parameters consistently favour unusually large learning rates. Crucially, we demonstrate that the rapid, aggressive landscape traversal enabled by these large rates not only promotes generalisation-as seen in phenomena like superconvergence-but also statistically minimises the expected computational effort for training. Furthermore, we identify distinct phase transitions in the optimal search strategy: while a single training run suffices for lower accuracy targets, reaching a model's performance limit requires a dramatic shift towards conducting numerous independent, short restarts. Finally, we illustrate how this effort-based paradigm provides a robust framework for model selection, allowing practitioners to choose optimal algorithms based on the difficulty of a problem as perceived by different models for a given target accuracy, or to maximise the achievable accuracy for a fixed budget of gradient descent steps.

</details>


### [768] [Provably Efficient Policy-Reward Co-Pretraining for Adversarial Imitation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22056)
*Tian Xu,Zexuan Chen,Zhilong Zhang,Yi-Chen Li,Chenyang Wang,Lei Yuan,Yang Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CoPT-AIL方法，通过策略与奖励联合预训练提升对抗式模仿学习（AIL）效率，并首次给出预训练在AIL中收益的理论保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AIL虽性能优于行为克隆（BC），但需大量在线环境交互；尽管已有工作尝试用BC预训练策略，但缺乏对预训练作用的严格理论分析，尤其忽略了奖励预训练的重要性。

Method: 首先理论分析仅策略预训练的局限性，指出奖励误差是主要次优来源；进而基于奖励塑形分析，提出策略-奖励联合预训练方法CoPT-AIL，仅需一次BC过程即可同时初始化策略与奖励。

Result: 理论证明CoPT-AIL相比标准AIL具有更优的模仿差距界；实验验证其性能优于现有AIL方法。

Conclusion: 奖励预训练至关重要，策略与奖励联合预训练能显著提升AIL效率与性能，且该改进具备坚实的理论基础。

Abstract: Adversarial imitation learning (AIL) achieves high-quality imitation compared to behavioral cloning (BC), but demands substantial online environment interaction. Recent empirical work has explored initializing AIL algorithms with BC pretrained policies to address this limitation, yet a rigorous theoretical understanding of pretraining's role in AIL remains elusive. This paper provides a systematic theoretical analysis and introduces principled pretraining algorithms for accelerating AIL. We begin by analyzing AIL with policy pretraining alone, identifying reward error as the dominant source of suboptimality. This reveals a critical and previously overlooked gap: the absence of reward pretraining. Motivated by this finding, we develop a principled policy-reward co-pretraining approach grounded in a reward shaping analysis. Our analysis uncovers a fundamental connection between expert policies and shaping rewards, which naturally gives rise to CoPT-AIL, an approach that jointly pretrains both policy and reward through a single BC procedure. We prove that CoPT-AIL achieves an improved imitation gap bound over standard AIL, establishing the first theoretical guarantee for the benefits of pretraining in AIL. Experimental results confirm CoPT-AIL's superior performance over existing AIL methods.

</details>


### [769] [New Smooth Loss functions for Robust Regression that Closely Approximate Absolute Error and Provide Improved Performance on Datasets With Significant Outliers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22068)
*Mathew Mithra Noel,Arindam Banerjee,Yug D. Oswal,Geraldine Bessie Amali D,Venkataraman Muthiah-Nakarajan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了两种新的无限可微损失函数（SRL和SMAE），更精确地逼近MAE，在含大量异常值的回归任务中表现更优，并证明了其凸性性质，还提出了两种新型鲁棒线性回归模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有损失函数如MSE对异常值敏感，MAE虽鲁棒但不可微且训练不稳定，Huber和Log-Cosh仅为近似，需更优的可微、鲁棒、稳定损失函数。

Method: 提出两种新损失函数：Square Root Loss（SRL）和Smooth Mean Absolute Error（SMAE），理论分析其凸性（SRL严格凸，SMAE严格拟凸），并在多组基准数据集上对比验证性能。

Result: SRL和SMAE在含大量异常值的回归任务中显著优于MSE、MAE、Huber和Log-Cosh；二者均无限可微、更贴近MAE鲁棒性，且训练更稳定。

Conclusion: SRL和SMAE是更优的MAE可微近似，兼具鲁棒性、稳定性与理论优良性质，所构建的两种新鲁棒线性回归模型进一步验证了其有效性。

Abstract: The performance of supervised machine learning models is directly related to the quality of the training dataset. In particular, the presence of significantly many outliers in the training data can lead to low accuracy because popular loss function like the Mean Squared Error (MSE) assign very high importance to large errors. The Mean Absolute Error (MAE) loss assigns equal importance to all errors and is most robust to outliers, but suffers from being non-differentiable at the origin. MAE also has large derivative values close to its minimum leading to instability and oscillations during training. Thus differentiable approximations to MAE namely Huber and Log-Cosh losses were introduced for robust regression tasks. This paper introduces two new infinitely differentiable loss functions that more closely approximate the MAE loss and provide improved performance on regression tasks with significantly many outliers in the training dataset. A comparison of the performance of regression models with different loss functions on a wide variety of benchmarks and datasets is presented to demonstrate the superior performance of the Square Root Loss (SRL) and Smooth Mean Absolute Error (SMAE) losses proposed in this paper. The SRL loss is shown to be strictly convex and the SMAE loss is shown to be strictly quasi-convex. Given the fundamental importance of linear regression, two new robust linear regression models are presented.

</details>


### [770] [Frequency-Domain Neural ODEs for Modeling Non-Linear Dynamical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22075)
*Mohammed Ashraf,Ayman A. El-Badawy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出频率域神经ODE（FNODE），通过FFT将连续时间动力学映射到频域建模，显著提升对强非线性动力系统的泛化能力与收敛稳定性，并在多个经典混沌系统上优于GRU、LSTM及ANODE等基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准神经ODE在处理高度非线性的复杂动力系统时表现不佳，需增强其建模能力和泛化性能。

Method: 提出频率域神经ODE（FNODE），利用快速傅里叶变换（FFT）将时间域连续动力学投影至频域进行建模，并结合课程学习与集成学习评估收敛性与鲁棒性。

Result: FNODE在Lotka-Volterra、受迫Duffing振子、Van der Pol振子和Lorenz系统上均展现出比GRU、LSTM和ANODE更优的泛化能力和更稳定的收敛性。

Conclusion: 频域建模为连续深度模型提供了新范式，FNODE有效提升了对强非线性动力系统的建模精度与鲁棒性。

Abstract: Standard continuous-depth models, such as Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (NODEs), offer significant advantages in modeling physical systems by learning continuous vector fields rather than discrete temporal steps. However, when applied to complex dynamical systems, standard NODEs frequently struggle with highly nonlinear dynamics. This paper investigates the Frequency-domain Neural ODE (FNODE), an architecture that projects continuous temporal dynamics into the frequency domain using the Fast Fourier Transform (FFT). By operating in the frequency domain, the model provides better generalization to the dynamical system. The architecture is empirically evaluated against discrete models, specifically Gated Recurrent Units (GRUs) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTMs), and other continuous-depth variants, including Augmented Neural ODE (ANODE), across four distinct dynamical systems: the Lotka-Volterra model, the forced Duffing oscillator, the Van der Pol oscillator, and the Lorenz system. To rigorously assess generalization and robustness, curriculum and ensemble learning are used to evaluate the model's convergence by estimating confidence intervals across different ensemble models. The empirical results demonstrate that the FNODE architecture achieves better generalization while exhibiting remarkable convergence stability.

</details>


### [771] [OphthaDT: Generative Digital Twins for Forecasting Visual Acuity Trajectories in Ophthalmology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22101)
*Pietro Belligoli,Nikita Makarov,Sayedali Shetab Boushehri,Fabian Schmich,Raul Rodriguez-Esteban,Michael Menden*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出OphthaDT，一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的眼科数字孪生系统，用于从多模态临床数据中建模患者纵向视觉功能轨迹，显著提升nAMD和DME的BCVA预测精度，尤其在复杂、不规则采样的nAMD病例中表现突出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 眼科精准医学亟需准确的纵向预测能力，但多模态临床数据的碎片化严重阻碍了疾病进展建模。

Method: 构建基于LLM的数字孪生系统OphthaDT，将来自4项III期临床试验共3220例患者的纵向病史序列化为结构化叙事，并直接建模以预测最佳矫正视力（BCVA），无需插补处理不规则采样。

Result: 在长达100周的预测任务中，OphthaDT在nAMD上平均MAE较所有基线降低6.0%；在DME上优于Random Forest和XGBoost，MAE分别降低2.6%和6.9%；其优势随疾病轨迹复杂性增加而增强，且天然支持不规则采样。

Conclusion: OphthaDT验证了LLM驱动的临床轨迹建模在眼科精准预测中的有效性与实用性，有望减轻患者负担并加速眼科新药研发。

Abstract: Precision medicine in ophthalmology requires accurate longitudinal predictions, but the fragmented nature of multimodal clinical data remains a barrier to forecasting. We introduce OphthaDT, an LLM-based digital twin for ophthalmology that serializes longitudinal patient histories from 3,220 patients across four Phase III clinical trials into structured narratives to forecast best corrected visual acuity (BCVA). In benchmarks spanning up to 100 weeks, OphthaDT demonstrated the lowest prediction error in neovascular age-related macular degeneration (nAMD), achieving an average mean absolute error (MAE) reduction of 6.0% compared to all baselines. In diabetic macular edema (DME), OphthaDT demonstrated competitive performance against all baselines while outperforming Random Forest and XGBoost by an average MAE reduction of 2.6% and 6.9%, respectively. Results reveal that OphthaDT's predictive advantage scales with trajectory complexity: whereas linear models remain effective for the more stable treatment responses of DME, OphthaDT's capacity is better suited for capturing the high longitudinal variability of nAMD. Finally, OphthaDT handles irregular sampling without imputation, positioning LLM-based clinical trajectory modeling as a methodology that could reduce patient burden and accelerate drug development.

</details>


### [772] [Meta-Reinforcement Learning via Evolution for Multi-Objective Combinatorial Supply Chain Optimisation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22146)
*Rifny Rachman,Bahrul Ilmi Nasution,Josh Tingey,Richard Allmendinger,Pradyumn Shukla,Wei Pan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于种群的元强化学习框架，通过在标量化权重空间中结合分解与进化搜索，提升多目标优化中的解多样性与Pareto前沿逼近能力，尤其在供应链等高维组合问题中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统少样本元强化学习方法依赖单一共享元策略，导致解多样性不足、Pareto前沿探索受限，尤其在高维组合多目标问题（如供应链优化）中更为明显。

Method: 提出基于种群的元强化学习框架：维护一组标量化权重向量，每个对应一个通过梯度元学习训练的专属元策略；采用精英选择、交叉与变异操作，并以超体积和熵贡献为指导进行迭代优化。

Result: 在多目标供应链优化（经济、环境、社会目标冲突）及标准RL任务上验证：Pareto前沿更均匀多样，跨任务适应性更强，超体积提升最高达32%，平均Hausdorff距离最低。

Conclusion: 该框架有效缓解了单策略元学习的多样性瓶颈，为复杂多目标强化学习任务提供了更具鲁棒性和泛化性的解决方案。

Abstract: Meta-reinforcement learning is a promising approach to multi-objective optimisation because it enables rapid policy adaptation across changing environments and preference settings. However, conventional few-shot methods usually fine-tune from a single shared meta-policy, which can reduce solution diversity and limit exploration of the Pareto front, especially in high-dimensional combinatorial problems such as supply chain optimisation. We propose a population-based Meta-reinforcement learning framework that combines decomposition with evolutionary search in scalarisation weight space. The framework maintains a population of weight vectors, each associated with a distinct meta-policy trained through gradient-based meta-learning, and iteratively refines this population through elitist selection, crossover, and mutation guided by hypervolume and entropy contributions. We evaluate the method in a multi-objective supply chain setting with conflicting economic, environmental, and social goals, and further test its generality on standard reinforcement learning problems. The results show that the proposed approach yields more diverse, better distributed Pareto front approximations, improves cross-task adaptation, increases hypervolume by up to 32\% over Meta-multi-objective reinforcement learning in the complex case, and attains the lowest average Hausdorff distance among all compared methods.

</details>


### [773] [Parameterized Representations via Implicit Stochastic Modulation for High-Dimensional and High-Order Neural PDE Solvers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22150)
*Zhangyong Liang,Huanhuan Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PRISM框架，通过隐式随机调制实现参数化高维高阶PDE求解器，解决传统方法因直接条件参数化导致的内存增长与方差放大问题，支持零样本泛化与百万级维度扩展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有随机导数估计器难以适应不同物理参数，需为每个参数重训练；直接条件参数化会引入高阶自动微分图的纠缠，导致内存增加和参数引起的方差放大。

Method: 提出PRISM框架：使用超生成器将物理参数映射为仿射调制器，对纯空间潜在流形进行缩放与平移；保持参数分支值连通但空间切向不连通，从而解耦参数与高阶空间自动微分。

Result: 理论证明了参数化无偏性、估计误差界与有界随机方差下的收敛性；实验显示PRISM-STDE/SDGD在非线性参数化PDE上具备稳定零样本泛化能力、内存降低、单GPU支持高达10万维，并支持未见参数的低秩SVD高效适配。

Conclusion: PRISM是一种即插即用的参数化高维高阶随机神经PDE求解框架，兼顾无偏性、低方差、低内存与强泛化能力，为复杂物理系统的实时或多参数仿真提供了新范式。

Abstract: Solving high-dimensional and high-order PDEs is challenged by the coupled growth of spatial dimensionality and derivative order. Recent stochastic derivative estimators reduce this cost by replacing full derivative tensors with randomized dimension or Taylor estimators, but they are mostly designed for fixed physical parameters and require retraining for each new parameter. We show that direct conditional parameterization of such solvers entangles physical parameters with the high-order automatic differentiation graph, causing extra memory growth and parameter-induced variance amplification. We propose Parameterized Representations via Implicit Stochastic Modulation (PRISM), a plug-and-play framework for parameterized high-dimensional and high-order stochastic neural PDE solvers. PRISM uses a hyper-generator to map physical parameters to affine modulators that scale and shift a purely spatial latent manifold, while keeping parameter branches value-connected but spatial-tangent-disconnected. This design preserves unbiased stochastic dimension and Taylor estimators, removes the parameter encoder from high-order spatial AD, and provides a variance-aware Lipschitz envelope over the parameter space. We prove parameterized unbiasedness, estimation-error bounds, and convergence under bounded stochastic variance. Experiments with PRISM-STDE and PRISM-SDGD on nonlinear parameterized PDEs show stable zero-shot generalization, reduced memory usage, and scalability up to 100,000 dimensions on a single GPU, with efficient low-rank SVD adaptation for unseen parameters.

</details>


### [774] [Drowning in Routine: Signal Dilution in Multi-Turn Agent Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22164)
*Yann Pernot,Vi Retault*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文探讨了多回合智能体中决策密度对信用分配效率的影响，指出低决策密度会导致信号稀释，增加梯度方差，而高决策密度下轨迹级方法仍具竞争力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决多回合智能体中因大量例行动作导致的轨迹级信用分配效率低下问题，揭示决策密度ρ才是关键影响因素而非单纯的时间跨度。

Method: 理论分析决策密度ρ对梯度信噪比的影响，推导出turn-level与trajectory-level信噪比随ρ变化的标度关系，并在可精确调控ρ的控制环境中进行实验验证。

Result: 理论推导表明信噪比随ρ^{-1/2}缩放；实验验证该标度律（R²=0.999），且当ρ趋近于0时，训练步数差距显著扩大。

Conclusion: 决策密度ρ是决定信用分配效率的核心变量；低ρ场景需避免纯轨迹级方法，高ρ场景下可省去critic以降低成本。

Abstract: Multi-turn agents interleave consequential decisions with routine execution: some actions change the downstream return distribution, while others are necessary but reward-equivalent. The cost of trajectory-level credit assignment, often attributed to long horizons, is in fact governed by decision density $ρ$: the fraction of turns whose actions affect the return. When decision density is low, routine turns create signal dilution: they add gradient variance to trajectory-level estimators such as GRPO without adding expected signal. Under explicit assumptions, the resulting turn-level to trajectory-level signal-to-noise ratio scales as $ρ^{-1/2}$, provided critic error remains controlled. The same analysis identifies the complementary regime: at high decision density, trajectory-level methods can remain competitive while avoiding the cost of a critic. In a controlled environment where $ρ$ is exactly tunable, the predicted scaling is recovered with $R^2 = 0.999$, and the training-step gap widens significantly as $ρ\to 0$.

</details>


### [775] [Early-Exit Graph Neural Networks for Link Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22167)
*Roman Knyazhitskiy,Andrea Giuseppe Di Francesco*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需辅助损失的图神经网络（GNN）早期退出策略，用于加速链接预测任务，在保持甚至提升预测质量的同时显著降低推理延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图神经网络在链接预测中表现优异，但其推理速度与预测质量之间的权衡尚未被深入研究，尤其在大规模场景下延迟成为应用瓶颈。

Method: 提出一种隐式早期退出策略，不引入额外损失函数，使GNN在推理过程中可自然提前终止；适配GCN和SAS-GNN等骨干网络，并在HeaRT基准上验证。

Result: 在HeaRT基准上推动了GCN和SAS-GNN的Pareto前沿，实现了推理加速且预测性能不降反升。

Conclusion: GNN在链接预测任务中可通过早期退出机制有效提升推理效率，同时维持或增强预测质量，为大规模部署提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks are great for link prediction in various network-like structures; however, the question of their speed/quality tradeoff has been barely studied. While in practice the time it takes to do inference matters little for small benchmarks, the latency does limit applicability in large-scale domains. In this work, we explore early-exiting strategies that can be applied to Graph Neural Networks to solve the problem of link-prediction faster. We use no auxiliary losses to enforce early exiting, allowing it to emerge as an implicit property of the architecture.
