We apply a first-order action smoothing filter to prevent hardware damage from high-frequency oscillatory actuation. Pairing this bandwidth-aware filtering with sensitivity-guided domain randomization (DR) and a simple linear curriculum learning (CL) schedule, we obtain a swing-up policy that in all of our experiments injects sufficient energy for handoff into the stabilizer's region of attraction. The stabilization policy rejects disturbances within the tested range, and the swing-up policy can re-engage after larger perturbations and restores the pendulum to the inverted position.

</details>


### [1002] [Full Nonlinear Nonholonomic Dynamics and Motion Analysis of a 3-DoF Underactuated Spherical Rolling Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22169)
*Lakshmesha Krishnapa,Ahnaf Sharaar Mazahar,Seyed Amir Tafrishi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了MonoRollBot（一种由单电机驱动的3自由度球形滚动机器人）的完整非线性约束动力学模型，并基于Lagrange-d'Alembert方法推导了其非完整动力学，考虑了滚而不滑等约束条件；仿真结果与原型行为定性一致，揭示了重力、柔顺性和惯性对运动能力的联合影响，为后续状态估计与混合控制器设计提供了力学一致的基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构建首个针对单驱动、超欠驱动球形滚动机器人MonoRollBot的完整非线性非完整动力学模型，以支撑其运动分析、状态估计与控制器设计。

Method: 采用Lagrange-d'Alembert原理建立动力学模型，将丝杠关系作为完整约束、滚动无滑条件以Pfaff形式引入，保留壳体平移与姿态、丝杠行程、螺母旋转及质量径向运动等全部广义坐标。

Result: 获得了力学自洽的完整非线性动力学模型；仿真验证了其与原型行为的定性一致性，并揭示了重力、柔顺性与惯性对机器人运动能力的耦合影响。

Conclusion: 该模型是首个面向此类单驱动超欠驱动球形机器人的完整非完整动力学描述，为后续状态估计与混合控制提供了坚实基础。

Abstract: This paper presents a full nonlinear constrained dynamic model of MonoRollBot, a novel 3-DoF spherical rolling robot driven by a single motor, a lead-screw transmission, and a spring-coupled internal moving mass, together with motion analysis of its behavior. To the best of our knowledge, this is one of the first full nonlinear nonholonomic models reported for a mono-actuated, super-underactuated spherical rolling robot of this kind. Because rolling without slipping is nonholonomic, the dynamics are derived using the Lagrange--d'Alembert formulation, with the lead-screw relation imposed as a holonomic constraint and the rolling condition imposed in Pfaffian form. The formulation retains the complete generalized coordinates of shell translation, shell attitude, screw travel, nut rotation, and radial mass motion. Simulations and representative motion studies show qualitative agreement with prototype behavior and reveal how gravity, compliance, and inertia jointly shape the locomotion and motion capabilities of this strongly underactuated robot. The resulting model also provides a mechanically consistent basis for future state estimation and hybrid controller design for this nonholonomic mono-actuated rolling robot.

</details>


### [1003] [OpenHLM: An Empirical Recipe for Whole-Body Humanoid Loco-Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22174)
*Yingdong Hu,Haodong Zhu,Boyuan Zheng,Yihang Hu,Tong Zhang,Zunhao Chen,Junming Zhao,Ruiqian Nai,Yang Gao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向人形机器人的全身体视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型OpenHLM，通过系统性实验（分三阶段：全身体遥操作、VLA模型设计、异构协同训练）验证其有效性，在长时序复杂任务中显著优于现有基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有系统通常将人形机器人上下身解耦控制，限制了全身协调能力；本文旨在构建能直接将语言和图像映射到全部自由度的原生全身体VLA模型。

Method: 采用单变量控制的系统性实证研究路线，分为三个阶段：1）基于关节的全身体遥操作接口设计；2）在静态与轮式双臂平台预训练VLA模型并迁移到人形平台；3）利用HuMI（人形版UMI）进行异构协同训练以泛化至新物体与指令。

Result: 发现：1）关节级全身体遥操作接口优于部分自由度暴露方案；2）在非人形平台预训练的VLA模型可良好迁移到人形全动作空间；3）HuMI协同训练无需新增全身体遥操作数据即可扩展策略。OpenHLM在垂直范围广的长时序任务中，仅用不到一半示范时间即超越GR00T N1.6和Ψ₀。

Conclusion: OpenHLM提供了一套开源的全身体人形机器人运动-操作一体化建模与训练范式，验证了跨平台预训练+人形专用协同微调的有效路径。

Abstract: Whole-body humanoid loco-manipulation requires coordinating the robot's entire kinematic chain. However, most existing systems typically decouple the upper and lower bodies into separate controllers, limiting such coordination and yielding behaviors similar to those of a wheeled dual-arm platform. In this paper, we ask what it takes to build a whole-body native vision-language-action (VLA) model that maps language and pixels directly to all of the humanoid's degrees of freedom. We conduct a systematic empirical study organized as a roadmap of one-variable-at-a-time experiments across three phases: whole-body teleoperation, VLA model design, and heterogeneous co-training. Our study yields several intriguing findings: a joint-based whole-body teleoperation interface outperforms alternatives that only partially expose the humanoid's degrees of freedom; a VLA pretrained on static and wheeled dual-arm platforms transfers surprisingly well to a humanoid's full action space; and co-training with HuMI, the humanoid analog of UMI, extends the policy to new objects and instructions without additional whole-body teleoperation on those targets. Following this roadmap yields OpenHLM, an open-source recipe for whole-body humanoid loco-manipulation. In a challenging long-horizon task that spans a wide vertical range of the humanoid, OpenHLM outperforms two state-of-the-art humanoid VLA baselines (GR00T N1.6 and $Ψ_0$) using less than half the total demonstration time. Our code, training data, and model checkpoints are available at [https://openhlm-project.github.io/].

</details>


### [1004] [Geometric Reconstruction of Extrinsic Contact Trajectories using Tactile Sensing and Proprioception for Tool Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22251)
*Seojung Min,Yoonjin Kim,Jeong-Jung Kim,Jung Kim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用抓取级触觉传感和机器人本体感知来在线重建工具尖端外部接触轨迹的方法，在多种实验条件下实现了毫米级精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在工具辅助操作任务中，关键接触发生在远离触觉传感器的工具尖端，且接触点可能移动，导致直接感知困难。

Method: 将工具尖端轨迹重建建模为单点接触假设下的几何推理问题：先通过标定段估计全局接触位置，再结合触觉标记观测与本体运动数据连续重构轨迹。

Result: 在51次试验中，世界坐标系下轨迹RMSE为8.59±2.41 mm，形状RMSE为5.96±1.16 mm，运行频率达14.00±4.11 Hz。

Conclusion: 仅依赖抓取级触觉信号即可稳定恢复工具尖端外部接触轨迹的几何结构，结果对工具类型、腕部姿态和抓取配置具有鲁棒性。

Abstract: Tactile sensing enables robots to perceive rich contact information at the grasp, supporting tasks such as object recognition, in-hand pose estimation, and slip detection. However, in many tool-mediated manipulation tasks, the interaction that determines task success occurs at the tool tip, away from the tactile sensor, making direct sensing of tool-environment contact difficult, particularly when the contact moves during interaction. In this work, we reconstruct the trajectory of extrinsic tool-tip contact using tactile sensing and robot proprioception. We formulate tool-tip trajectory reconstruction as a geometric inference problem under a single-point contact assumption. Our method first estimates the global tool-tip contact location from a calibration segment designed to approximate fixed-point behavior, and then reconstructs the full trajectory by composing relative tool motion estimated from tactile marker observations under continuous contact. Across n=51 trials with multiple trajectories, tools, wrist poses, and grasp configurations, the proposed pipeline achieves a trajectory RMSE of 8.59 +/- 2.41 mm in the world frame and a shape RMSE of 5.96 +/- 1.16 mm, while operating online at 14.00 +/- 4.11 Hz. Overall, the results show that extrinsic tool-tip trajectory geometry can be recovered consistently from grasp-level tactile sensing, with trajectory shape remaining stable across variations in tools, wrist poses, and grasp configurations.

</details>


### [1005] [Any-Body Guard: Universal Safeguarding for Manipulation Policies via Action Masking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22278)
*Alex Beaudin,Hanna Krasowski,Kartik Nagpal,Sanjit A. Seshia,Murat Arcak,Negar Mehr*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为X-Safe的通用安全保护方法，通过在机器人构型空间中直接推理，提供形式化的碰撞规避概率保证，具有跨机器人本体和任务的可迁移性，无需额外数据或工程适配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人学习控制的安全保障方法过于保守、计算昂贵、启发式强或工程依赖度高，难以兼顾安全性与任务性能，且缺乏跨平台可迁移性。

Method: X-Safe在机器人构型空间中进行推理，仅依赖基于物体的准静态场景表示和正向运动学模型，提供形式化的概率碰撞规避保证。

Result: 在仿真与真实硬件上验证了X-Safe对多种机器人本体和策略的有效性：任务性能下降更少、硬件实验零碰撞，并实证支持其形式化安全保证。

Conclusion: X-Safe是一种轻量、通用、可迁移的安全保障框架，兼顾形式化安全保证与实际任务性能，显著降低了跨平台部署的安全工程成本。

Abstract: Ensuring safety of learning-enabled robotic manipulation across diverse embodiments and tasks still requires significant manual engineering. Existing approaches typically rely on heuristically designed fallback controllers or complex forward invariance assessments. These methods are often too conservative for task success, too computationally expensive for real-time execution, too heuristic to provide useful safety guarantees, or too engineering-heavy to transfer between setups. In this paper, we propose a universal safeguarding approach, X-Safe, which reasons directly in the robot's configuration space to provide formal probabilistic guarantees for collision avoidance. By operating in the configuration space, our method transfers across embodiments while relying solely on an object-based, quasi-static scene representation and a forward kinematics model of the robotic manipulator. Thus, X-Safe provides useful formal safety guarantees without requiring additional data, or engineering effort for different embodiments or scenes. We demonstrate X-Safe for diverse embodiments and policies, both in simulation and on hardware. We observe less degradation in task performance compared to state-of-the-art safeguarding, no collisions on hardware experiments, and empirically corroborate our formal guarantees.

</details>


### [1006] [FlowDPG: Deterministic Policy Gradient on Flow Matching Policies for Real-World Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22303)
*Kexin Shi,Junyao Shi,Poorvi Hebbar,Zhuolun Zhao,Tarun Amarnath,Yifan Su,Shikhar Bahl,Deepak Pathak*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出FlowDPG，一种无需BPTT的DDPG风格方法，用于提升流匹配策略在机器人操作任务中的性能，通过将评论家梯度蒸馏至速度场实现稳定训练，并在真实世界AirPods装配任务中达到92%成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于策略梯度的流匹配策略在机器人操作中受限于多步ODE反向传播（BPTT）带来的计算昂贵与数值不稳定问题。

Method: FlowDPG采用DDPG风格框架，将评论家梯度直接蒸馏到流匹配策略的速度场中，避免BPTT；融合示教驱动速度（保障动作可行性）与评论家驱动修正（提升动作价值）。

Result: 在真实长时序、多阶段、双臂AirPods装配任务上实现92%端到端成功率，显著优于价值条件化、辅助模块适配及伴随法评论家梯度等前沿RL方法。

Conclusion: FlowDPG为流匹配策略提供了首个稳定、高效且可落地的策略改进框架，建立了与经典确定性策略梯度的理论联系，并验证了其在复杂真实机器人任务中的有效性。

Abstract: Real-world reinforcement learning for robotic manipulation remains challenging, and this difficulty is amplified for flow matching policies: applying policy gradient methods to these policies is fundamentally limited by the need to backpropagate through time(BPTT) along the multi-step ODE that maps noise to actions, which is computationally prohibitive and numerically fragile. We propose FlowDPG, a DDPG-style method specifically designed for flow matching policies that distills the critic gradient into the velocity field at training time, bypassing BPTT entirely. Intuitively, FlowDPG combines two complementary vectors: the demonstration-driven velocity that keeps the action feasible, and the critic-driven correction that steers it toward higher value. Our contributions are threefold: (1) a BPTT-free distillation framework that enables stable DDPG-style policy improvement on flow matching policies, (2) a formal connection between the FlowDPG update direction and vanilla Deterministic Policy Gradient via three explicit approximations, and (3) real-world validation on a long-horizon, multi-stage, dual-arm AirPods assembly task, where FlowDPG attains a 92% end-to-end success rate, substantially outperforming recent RL methods spanning value-conditioning, auxiliary-module adaptation, and adjoint-based critic-gradient approaches. Videos and more results are provided on the project page https://flowdpg.github.io.

</details>


### [1007] [EmbodiedUS-FS: Fast Slow Intelligence for Ultrasound Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22319)
*Fangzhuo Zhang,Xinyu Wang,Xiao Yang,Jinchang Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种快慢双脑分层式机器人超声扫描系统，通过慢脑进行意图解析与分阶段任务规划，快脑融合多模态反馈实现闭环执行与图像质量引导的恢复行为，并引入安全盾与分级升级策略保障安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床环境中机器人超声扫描需兼顾高层临床流程推理与底层闭环执行，而医生自然语言指令隐含解剖目标、操作逻辑、图像质量要求和安全约束，且执行易受患者运动、接触变化和目标漂移影响。

Method: 构建快慢双脑分层系统：慢脑基于API和手册语料库进行意图解析与任务图构建+结构化验证；快脑融合超声图像、机器人位姿/力状态及患者运动信息，实现局部动作优化与图像质量引导的恢复；集成安全盾与分级升级策略（如重规划或人工确认）以约束风险行为。

Result: 在任务规划评估、动态扰动下的闭环执行及安全机制验证实验中，该分层设计显著提升了任务成功率并降低了安全违规次数。

Conclusion: 快慢分层架构有效兼顾了临床语义理解、鲁棒执行与安全保障，为真实临床场景中的机器人超声辅助提供了可行框架。

Abstract: Robotic ultrasound scanning in real clinical environments requires both high-level clinical workflow reasoning and low-level closed-loop execution. Physicians natural-language instructions often contain implicit anatomical targets, procedural logic, image-quality requirements, and safety constraints, while execution is affected by patient motion, contact variations, and target drift. We propose a fast and slow hierarchical embodied ultrasound system for safe and interpretable robotic ultrasound assistance. The Slow Brain performs intent parsing and stage-wise task planning with knowledge augmentation from an API and handbook corpus, and generates executable plans through task-graph construction and structured plan verification. The Fast Brain fuses multimodal feedback, including ultrasound images, robot pose and force states, and patient-motion information, to refine local actions and perform image-quality-guided recovery behaviors. The system further integrates a Safety Shield and a hierarchical escalation policy to constrain risky actions and trigger replanning or human confirmation under persistent failures or safety-bound violations. Experiments on planning evaluation, closed-loop execution under dynamic perturbations, and safety-mechanism validation demonstrate that the proposed hierarchical design improves task success rates while reducing safety violations.

</details>


### [1008] [Tactile Genesis: Exploring Tactile Sensors at Scale for Learning Dexterous Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22332)
*Trinity Chung,Kashu Yamazaki,Dhruv Patel,Alexis Duburcq,Yiling Qiao,Katerina Fragkiadaki,Aran Nayebi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了Tactile Genesis，一个GPU并行的触觉传感器仿真平台，支持多种触觉模态（如接触、力/扭矩、温度等），用于系统性研究触觉感知对灵巧操作的影响；实验表明传感器覆盖范围比类型和分辨率更重要，且每taxel的力/扭矩信号最有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 触觉感知对接触密集型灵巧操作至关重要，但尚不清楚策略所需的具体触觉抽象形式，以及更丰富的触觉场是否值得其硬件成本；实证研究受限于不同传感器导致机器人平台不一致，难以跨平台复现学习实验。

Method: 构建了Tactile Genesis——一个支持多种触觉模态（二值接触、接触深度、每taxel力/扭矩、弹性体标记位移、几何感知接近度、接触音频、体素化温度场）、可配置布局/分辨率/噪声模型（漂移、滞后、坏点、串扰）的GPU并行触觉仿真平台；在三个灵巧操作任务上开展教师-学生策略训练与消融实验（传感器类型、位置、分辨率、噪声），并在真实XHand1平台上验证迁移效果。

Result: 本体感觉单独使用在所有任务中均不足；传感器布置（覆盖范围）影响远大于类型：仅指尖覆盖显著落后于全手覆盖，加入手掌和近端指节可大幅缩小与特权教师策略的差距；分辨率重要性远低于覆盖范围：200 taxels均匀分布于整只手即足够；每taxel的力/扭矩信号始终是最有效的传感模态。

Conclusion: 研究为未来触觉硬件设计（如优化覆盖而非单纯提升分辨率）和灵巧操作策略中的观测选择提供了具体指导：优先保证全手范围的力/扭矩感知，而非追求高分辨率或复杂模态。

Abstract: Tactile sensing is critical for contact-rich dexterous manipulation, yet it remains unclear which tactile abstractions a policy needs and when richer tactile fields justify their hardware cost. This is hard to study empirically: each sensor effectively defines a new robot, and no lab can replicate the same learning experiment across all of them. We present Tactile Genesis, a GPU-parallel tactile sensor simulation platform that exposes binary contact, contact depth, per-taxel kinematic force/torque, elastomer marker displacement, geometry-aware proximity, contact audio, and a voxelized temperature field (the first of its kind in robot learning physics simulation platforms) under a common interface, with configurable placement, resolution, and a realistic noise model (drift, hysteresis, dead taxels, crosstalk). It scales past 20,000 parallel environments and 1,000 taxels on a single GPU, improving throughput by 3 to 20 times over previous tactile simulators. We train teacher-student policies on three dexterous tasks, ablating sensor type, placement, resolution, and noise, and verify transfer to the real XHand1. Proprioception alone is insufficient on every task. Sensor placement dominates sensor type: fingertip-only coverage trails whole-hand coverage by a wide margin, while adding the palm and proximal phalanges closes most of the gap to the privileged teacher. Resolution matters far less than coverage: placing 200 taxels across the whole hand suffices across tasks. We find that force/torque per taxel is consistently the most useful sensor type. These results give concrete guidance for both future tactile hardware design for improving robot hands and policy-side observation choice in dexterous manipulation. https://neuroagents-lab.github.io/2026-tactile-genesis/

</details>


### [1009] [Multi-AUV Marine Life Tracking with Single Hydrophone Payloads via a Hidden Markov Model Equipped Particle Filter](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22335)
*Christopher Herrera,Kehlani Fay,Christopher Clark,Alberto Soto,Christopher Lowe,Mario Espinoza*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于多AUV协同与单水听器载荷的海洋动物声学标签定位方法，结合带隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）行为运动模型的粒子滤波算法，显著提升定位精度与跟踪灵活性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统固定水听器易因动物移动超出检测范围导致数据丢失；现有AUV系统依赖多水听器大框架，增加阻力、限制跟踪速度，难以适应高机动性海洋动物。

Method: 采用多个配备单紧凑型水听器的AUV协同工作，设计融合多源测量的粒子滤波器，并引入基于历史动物运动数据拟合的隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）作为运动先验，替代通用速度或随机游走模型。

Result: 实测短时部署RMSE约10米，大规模仿真长时部署RMSE约15米；HMM运动模型优于通用速度模型，二者均优于随机游走基线模型。

Conclusion: 该方法在降低AUV系统复杂性与阻力的同时，实现了高精度、长时程的水下动物定位，为生态监测提供了更灵活、鲁棒的自主跟踪解决方案。

Abstract: Researchers tag and track marine animals to study migration patterns, human impacts on behavior, and behavioral shifts due to climate change. Accurate data collection often requires tagging individual animals to collect spatio-temporal state estimates of the animal's geo-position and depth. Acoustic transmitters are prominent due to their continuous communication without requiring retrieval or surfacing to collect data. These transmitters emit underwater acoustic pulses that can be detected by hydrophones. However, the frequent movement of aquatic animals results in high data loss when the animal moves out of the detection range of a stationary hydrophone. Autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV) systems offer a solution for localizing transmitters with higher resolution over longer periods of time. Such systems previously deployed have often required multiple hydrophones mounted on a large frame carried by the AUV. This increases drag, limiting the speed at which the AUV can track highly mobile animals. This work provides an alternative by equipping multiple AUVs with a single compact hydrophone payload. A particle filter algorithm equipped with a hidden Markov model (HMM) behavioral motion model fuses measurements from multiple AUVs to estimate the transmitter's position. Real-world data shows a root mean square error (RMSE) of approximately 10 meters for short-term deployments, and a larger simulated dataset shows an RMSE of approximately 15 meters for longer deployments over a larger area. The HMM fit to historical animal movement data outperforms a generic velocity motion model, and both outperform a baseline random walk motion model.

</details>


### [1010] [Benchmarking Robot Memory Under Interference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22338)
*Soumil Rathi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了RoboMME-Interference基准，用于评估机器人长时程记忆系统在跨会话、含干扰场景下的性能，发现现有视觉语言动作（VLA）模型的记忆能力随无关会话增加而显著下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实部署中机器人需跨多轮会话记忆信息，但现有机器人记忆基准多局限于单次或短上下文，缺乏对长上下文及干扰鲁棒性的评估。

Method: 基于RoboMME构建RoboMME-Interference跨会话基准：对每个查询会话，提供相关先验演示+可控数量的无关会话作为记忆输入，测试VLA模型（如π₀.₅变体）在不同干扰程度下的任务成功率。

Result: 未修改的感知记忆增强型π₀.₅模型在无干扰时性能提升，但随无关会话增多，成功率持续显著下降，表明当前系统在长上下文与抗干扰方面表现薄弱。

Conclusion: 长上下文记忆及其抗干扰能力是现实机器人部署的关键瓶颈，现有系统在此类能力上普遍不足，亟需新方法与基准推动发展。

Abstract: Robots deployed in realistic settings will accumulate experience across many sessions and tasks over their deployment. The robot's tasks may often require it to remember information from multiple sessions ago, making long-context robot memory important for real-world deployments. However, most robot-memory benchmarks today are based on single episodes or a short context. To measure how current robot memory systems perform on longer sessions with more distractions, we introduce RoboMME-Interference, a cross-session benchmark built on RoboMME. For each query episode, we construct a session history using the query's relevant prior demonstration followed by a controlled number of unrelated sessions, which we provide to the VLA as memory and measure accuracy. Running RoboMME's released memory-augmented $π_{0.5}$ variants unmodified through this benchmark, we find that while perceptual memory variants improve success when given the history without any distractors, they decay strongly and steadily as unrelated sessions accumulate. With this release, we emphasize the importance of long-context memory and robustness to interference and show that current systems largely fail on such capabilities. The project page, videos, code, and data are at https://robotmemorybench.com.

</details>


### [1011] [A Taxonomy of Conceptual Alignment in Human-Robot Dialogue](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22360)
*Shengchen Zhang,Xiaohua Sun,Weiwei Guo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种以设计为中心的概念对齐理解框架，强调其为双向、共建过程，并构建了分类法与对话行为模式，为人类-机器人交互中的概念对齐分析与设计提供结构化基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对‘概念对齐’术语解释不一，且多为单向、孤立探究，阻碍了对其形成过程的深入理解。

Method: 提出设计中心视角，构建涵盖触发机制与理解层级的分类法，并设计用于刻画对齐交互动作的对话行为模式。

Result: 形成了系统化的概念对齐分析与设计工具：一个分类法和一个对话行为模式。

Conclusion: 概念对齐应被视作双向共建过程；所提出的分类法与对话行为模式为HRI中概念对齐的研究与实践提供了可操作、可比较、可扩展的结构化基础。

Abstract: Successful conversations require speakers to align on the meaning of concepts, a challenging but crucial task for human-robot interaction. Understanding the process of establishing such alignment is hindered by competing interpretations of the term and isolated, unidirectional investigations of its design space. This paper argues for a design-centric understanding of conceptual alignment as a bidirectional and co-constructive process. We introduce a taxonomy that characterizes conceptual alignment dialogues along what triggers its initiation and what level(s) of conceptual understanding it concerns. We further present a dialogue act schema as an operational tool that captures the interactional moves through which alignment is achieved. Together, these contributions provide a structured foundation for analyzing, comparing, and designing conceptual alignment in human-robot interaction.

</details>


### [1012] [Do Rigid-Body Simulators Dream of Soft Robots? Learning Contact-Rich Manipulation for Tendon-Driven Continuum Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22397)
*Chengnan Shentu,Nicholas Baldassini,Tongjia Zheng,Priyanka Rao,Jessica Burgner-Kahrs*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于连续介质力学的离散化方法，将肌腱驱动连续体机器人（TDCR）原生集成到MuJoCo中，实现了物理准确、支持接触与学习的仿真，并成功实现仿真到实物的零样本迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有软体机器人仿真器缺乏接触处理、驱动支持和学习集成能力，而刚体近似虽具备这些能力却牺牲了物理真实性，限制了接触丰富场景下的全身体操作学习。

Method: 推导了基于连续介质力学的离散化方法，使TDCR原生嵌入MuJoCo，统一建模肌腱力、本体接触与动力学；在Cosserat杆基准和真实硬件上验证仿真器；通过仿真中基于状态的示教学习训练策略，并零样本部署至3段TDCR+Franka机械臂平台。

Result: 实现了首个面向接触丰富操作任务的连续体机器人仿真到实物（sim-to-real）零样本迁移，在两个接触丰富任务中成功部署。

Conclusion: 该工作弥合了软体机器人仿真在物理保真度与学习友好性之间的鸿沟，为接触丰富的全身体操作提供了可扩展、可学习的仿真基础设施。

Abstract: Learning contact-rich, whole-body manipulation for soft continuum robots is held back by the lack of simulation infrastructure that has accelerated rigid-robot manipulation. Existing soft robot simulators are physically grounded but lack the contact handling, actuation support, or learning integration needed for contact-rich manipulation; rigid-body approximations offer these capabilities but sacrifice physical grounding. We bridge this gap for tendon-driven continuum robots (TDCRs) by deriving a continuum-mechanics-informed discretization that places the soft robot natively inside MuJoCo, unifying tendon forces, body contact, and dynamics in a single physics pipeline. We validate the simulator against a Cosserat rod reference (static and dynamic) and real TDCR hardware. We then train state-based imitation learning policies via teleoperation in simulation and deploy them zero-shot to a physical 3-segment TDCR on a 7-DoF Franka arm across two contact-rich manipulation tasks. To our knowledge, this is the first demonstration of sim-to-real transfer for contact-rich manipulation with continuum robots.

</details>


### [1013] [SPiralRoll: A Novel Adjustable-Stiffness Underactuated 3-DoF Joint with Torsion Springs for Rolling Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22443)
*Louis Keith,George Ripper,and Seyed Amir Tafrishi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为SPiralRoll的新型基于扭转弹簧的欠驱动柔顺机构，用于滚动机器人和柔顺机器人驱动，具有旋转、径向伸缩和轴向自旋三种输出运动，通过全弧和单弧两种构型实验验证，展现出在滚动机器人中的应用潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 柔顺机构在机器人中能提升适应性、安全性和能量效率，并降低硬件复杂度，但现有设计在多功能输出与低成本制造方面仍有挑战。

Method: 提出SPiralRoll机制，采用弧形分布弹性元件和双电机输入，实现三种物理可观测输出运动；设计并实验对比全弧与单弧两种构型；集成至球形滚动机器人进行实地滚动验证。

Result: 全弧构型提供更好结构支撑与更平滑变形，单弧构型产生更大变形与更强惯性激励，更适合摆锤驱动滚动；机制可完全3D打印、成本低、结构紧凑。

Conclusion: SPiralRoll为欠驱动柔顺滚动机器人和自适应机器人关节提供了一种低成本、紧凑且易制造的解决方案。

Abstract: Compliant mechanisms are important in robotics because they can improve adaptability, safety, and energy efficiency while reducing hardware complexity. This paper presents SPiralRoll, a novel torsion-spring-based underactuated compliant mechanism for rolling robots and compliant robotic actuation. The mechanism uses arc-distributed elastic members and two motor inputs to realize three physically observable output motions: rotational motion, radial expansion/contraction, and axial spin induced by nonlinear compliant deformation. Two configurations, namely full-arc and single-arc designs, are developed and experimentally evaluated. Beyond benchtop validation, the mechanism is integrated into a spherical rolling robot, where proof-of-concept experiments demonstrate forward rolling and turning. The results show that the full-arc design provides better structural support and smoother deformation, whereas the single-arc design yields larger deformation and stronger inertial excitation, making it more suitable for pendulum-driven rolling locomotion. Overall, SPiralRoll provides a low-cost, compact, and fully 3D-printable solution for underactuated compliant rolling robots and adaptive robotic joints.

</details>


### [1014] [BLENDS: Bayesian Learning-Enhanced Deep Smoothing for GNSS-Denied Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22456)
*Nadav Cohen,Itzik Klein*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出BLENDS框架，结合贝叶斯平滑与深度学习（Transformer），通过学习协方差自适应和状态校正，在GNSS中断期间显著提升低成本IMU导航精度，位置RMSE最高改善25.6%，并能校正传统GNSS与RTK真值间的系统偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低成本惯性传感器在GNSS中断时导航精度不足，经典平滑方法受限于传统GNSS测量精度，亟需融合数据驱动与统计建模优势的新型导航方法。

Method: 提出基于Transformer的BLENDS框架，将贝叶斯平滑与深度学习结合，实现学习型协方差适配和状态修正，保留贝叶斯估计统计基础的同时引入数据驱动优化。

Result: 在四旋翼GNSS中断数据集上，BLENDS相较传统两滤波器平滑和RTS平滑，位置RMSE最高提升25.6%，估计不确定性降低，并可自动补偿传统GNSS与RTK真值间的系统偏差。

Conclusion: BLENDS验证了学习增强型贝叶斯平滑在GNSS拒止环境下的有效性，为高精度、鲁棒导航提供了新范式。

Abstract: Maintaining accurate navigation during GNSS outages remains a significant challenge for autonomous systems relying on low-cost inertial sensors. While classical smoothing methods, such as the two-filter smoother and Rauch-Tung-Striebel smoother, exploit measurements collected before and after an outage, their performance remains limited by the accuracy of conventional GNSS measurements. This paper presents Bayesian learning-enhanced navigation with deep smoothing (BLENDS), a transformer-based framework that augments Bayesian smoothing with learned covariance adaptation and state correction. The proposed method preserves the statistical foundations of Bayesian estimation while leveraging data-driven learning to improve navigation accuracy. Evaluations on the quadrotor dataset with GNSS outages demonstrate that BLENDS consistently outperforms both model-based smoothers, achieving up to 25.6% improvement in the position root mean square error while also reducing estimation uncertainty. Furthermore, BLENDS learns to compensate for the systematic bias between conventional GNSS positioning and RTK ground truth, enabling accuracy beyond that achievable with conventional GNSS measurements alone. The results demonstrate the potential of learning-enhanced Bayesian smoothing for resilient and high-accuracy navigation in GNSS-challenged environments.

</details>


### [1015] [Scalable Multi-Task Data Generation via Reinforcement Learning for Language-Conditioned Bimanual Dexterous Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22471)
*Zechu Li,Yufeng Jin,Puze Liu,Jan Peters,Georgia Chalvatzaki*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的系统性合成数据生成流程，用于解决双手机器人灵巧操作中高质量大规模数据集缺乏的问题，通过通用奖励设计、域随机化和语言条件任务标注，生成多样化高质量数据，并提升多任务策略的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 训练双手机器人灵巧操作通用策略面临高质量大规模数据集缺乏的关键瓶颈，现有方法（如人类遥操作和传统强化学习）存在任务多样性不足或奖励设计依赖人工等问题。

Method: 提出一种基于强化学习的数据生成流程，整合通用可迁移奖励设计、有效域随机化和语言条件任务标注，以在仿真中合成多样化、高质量的双手机器人操作数据集。

Result: 生成的数据显著提升了语言条件多任务策略在三个代表性操作任务上的跨任务泛化能力。

Conclusion: 该RL-based数据生成管道为双手机器人灵巧操作提供了可扩展、高质量的数据来源，支持训练更通用、更具泛化性的多任务策略。

Abstract: A key bottleneck in training generalist policies for bimanual dexterous manipulation is the lack of large-scale, high-quality datasets. Synthetic data generation in simulation provides a scalable alternative to human video demonstrations by overcoming challenges such as morphology mismatch, missing physical interactions, and the generation of robot actions. However, existing approaches based on human teleoperation offer limited task diversity, as object-centric trajectory matching often neglects the feasibility of robot execution. Reinforcement learning (RL) enables broader scalability but is often constrained by handcrafted, task-specific rewards. In this work, we propose a systematic RL-based data generation pipeline that integrates generalizable reward design, effective domain randomization, and language-conditioned task annotations. This pipeline synthesizes diverse, high-quality datasets for dexterous bimanual manipulation and enables training of language-conditioned multi-task policies. Our experiments show that the generated data significantly improves generalization across three representative manipulation tasks.

</details>


### [1016] [ARP: Enhancing Quantized Skill Abstractions via Visual Alignment and Iterative Refinement for Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22480)
*Yuntian Wang,Zesheng Jia,Yuhui Duan,Qibing Wang,Yang Liu,Song Wang,Siao Liu,Jin Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Aligned Refinement Policy（ARP），一种结合语义对齐与执行级精细化的离散技能框架，通过视觉-动作对比对齐和迭代残差头提升长视野操作策略的视觉语义接地能力与动作精度，在LIBERO、Meta-World及真实人形机器人上均取得SOTA效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于离散量化的技能模仿学习方法存在视觉-语义接地弱、难以利用视觉信息选择技能，以及离散化导致连续动作生成精度损失的问题。

Method: 提出ARP框架：（i）设计视觉-动作对齐目标，在共享隐空间中对比对齐视觉嵌入与预量化动作表征，同时保持状态无关的技能解码器；（ii）引入轻量级迭代残差头（IRH）进行两步精细化，恢复细粒度控制。

Result: 在LIBERO和Meta-World基准上达到SOTA性能；在Kuavo 4 Pro人形机器人上完成两项挑战性操作任务，显著优于多个基线。

Conclusion: ARP有效缓解了离散技能方法在视觉语义接地和动作精度方面的局限，为长视野具身操作提供了更鲁棒、精确的策略学习范式。

Abstract: Learning visuomotor policies for long-horizon manipulation remains a fundamental challenge. Recent skill-based imitation learning methods based on discrete quantization have shown promising results by representing complex behaviors as temporally extended skills. However, most existing approaches primarily encode action trajectories into latent skills, yielding weak visual-semantic grounding and limiting the ability to leverage visual observations for skill selection. Moreover, discrete tokenization inevitably incurs precision errors during continuous action generation. To alleviate these issues, we propose Aligned Refinement Policy (ARP), a discrete-skill framework that couples semantic grounding with execution-level refinement. Specifically, ARP introduces (i) a visual--action alignment objective that contrastively aligns visual embeddings with pre-quantized action representations in a shared latent space while preserving a state-independent skill decoder, and (ii) a lightweight Iterative Residual Head (IRH) that performs a two-step refinement to recover fine-grained control for precise execution. Extensive experiments show that ARP achieves state-of-the-art performance on the LIBERO and Meta-World benchmarks. Moreover, real-robot experiments on the Kuavo 4 Pro humanoid platform further validate its effectiveness, yielding consistent performance gains over several baselines on two challenging manipulation tasks.

</details>


### [1017] [PenduMorph: Development and Motion Analysis of Pendulum-Actuated Rolling Reconfigurable Spherical Robot with Magnetic-Coupling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22491)
*Aung Myat,Peter Noyce,May Forgan,Qing Yu,Seyed Amir Tafrishi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为PenduMorph的无线可重构球形滚动机器人，采用全封闭球形结构与2自由度内摆、磁性对接等设计，支持独立滚动与模块间协同运动，在复杂环境中展现出稳定无线运行与可重构能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为在接触丰富且严苛的环境中实现模块化球形机器人的可靠运动与模块交互，需兼顾独立滚动能力、硬件防护性与可重构性。

Method: 设计全封闭球形机器人PenduMorph，集成2-DoF内摆驱动、板载控制、电池供电与磁性对接；通过解析建模分析磁耦合机制，并开展单/双模块实验验证滚动、耦合与协同运动行为。

Result: 实验表明该平台能实现稳定无线运行及多种独特可重构滚动行为，包括独立滚动、磁性耦合与协调耦合运动。

Conclusion: PenduMorph为未来面向复杂环境的模块化球形机器人提供了可行的设计范式与实验基础。

Abstract: This paper presents "PenduMorph", a wireless reconfigurable rolling spherical robot designed as a modular platform for enclosed locomotion and inter-module interaction in challenging environments. The proposed robot extends our previous pendulum-actuated rolling disk concept to a fully enclosed spherical architecture integrating a 2-DoF internal pendulum, onboard control, battery-powered operation, and magnetic docking. The design aims to combine independent rolling mobility with protected hardware and reliable reconfigurability. We first present the robot design and an analytical study of the magnetic coupling mechanism to evaluate retention and interaction between coupled modules. We then experimentally investigate key motion behaviors at both the single-module and dual-module levels, including independent rolling, magnetic coupling, and coordinated coupled motion. The results show that the proposed platform enables stable wireless operation and a set of distinctive reconfigurable rolling behaviors, providing a useful foundation for future modular spherical robots operating in contact-rich and demanding environments.

</details>


### [1018] [Semantic-Aware Autonomous Exploration for UAVs in Unknown Indoor Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22670)
*Duc-Thien Nguyen,Ngoc Minh Do,Xiem HoangVan,Thanh Nguyen Canh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种语义感知的无人机自主探索框架，通过在基于路线图的探索策略中引入语义信息，提升探索效率与环境理解能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于几何信息的探索方法缺乏语义感知，导致探索效率低、环境理解有限。

Method: 在动态探索规划器（DEP）构建的概率路线图（PRM）基础上，增加语义层，并设计语义奖励函数以优先选择含重要物体/结构的区域；路线图持续更新以支持前沿点选择与路径规划；系统基于ROS Noetic和Gazebo实现，使用RGB-D传感器同步获取几何与语义信息。

Result: 在多个仿真环境中，该方法实现了90%–94%的探索覆盖率，并显著减少了探索时间与飞行距离。

Conclusion: 语义增强的路线图探索框架能有效提升无人机自主探索的效率与智能性，优于传统纯几何方法。

Abstract: Autonomous exploration in unknown environments requires unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) to efficiently generate informative trajectories while simultaneously constructing accurate maps. Although many existing exploration methods rely on geometric information, they often lack semantic awareness, resulting in suboptimal exploration efficiency and limited environmental understanding. To address this limitation, this paper proposes a semantic-aware exploration framework that adds semantic information to a roadmap-based exploration strategy. The proposed method builds on the Dynamic Exploration Planner (DEP), which incrementally constructs a Probabilistic Roadmap (PRM), and augments this roadmap with a semantic layer. A semantic reward function is introduced to prioritize regions containing meaningful objects and structures, enabling the UAV to focus on areas with higher information value. Furthermore, the roadmap is continuously updated to support efficient frontier selection and path planning during exploration. The proposed framework is implemented in ROS Noetic and Gazebo using an RGB-D sensor for simultaneous acquisition of geometric and semantic information. Experimental results in multiple simulated environments demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves exploration coverage rates between 90% and 94% while reducing exploration time and travel distance compared with conventional geometry-based exploration methods.

</details>


### [1019] [Efficient Continuous Semantic Mapping based on Spatio-Temporal Awareness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22672)
*My Le Pham,Dinh Trieu Duong,Xiem HoangVan,Thanh Nguyen Canh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种引入时空关系的语义建图方法，通过根据局部语义不确定性动态调整推理范围，并进行时序标签融合，提升了建图精度与稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语义建图方法计算开销大、在动态场景中鲁棒性差，主要因忽略体素间空间关联与时间一致性。

Method: 将时空关系引入语义推理过程，依据局部语义不确定性自适应调整推理范围，并对语义标签进行时序融合。

Result: 在SemanticKITTI数据集上，映射精度提升约12%，mIoU达54.92%，较纯空间方法提高13.18个百分点。

Conclusion: 时空联合推理能显著提升连续语义建图的准确性、稳定性与计算效率，适用于自主机器人系统。

Abstract: Continuous semantic mapping allows autonomous robots to understand both the spatial structure and the semantic content of complex environments. However, most existing methods process the entire space, treat voxels as independent units, and do not keep the semantic labels consistent over time. This leads to high computational cost and reduced robustness in dynamic scenes. This paper proposes a semantic mapping method that brings spatial and temporal relationships into the semantic inference process. The method adjusts the inference range according to the local semantic uncertainty and fuses labels over time to improve map stability and computational efficiency. Experiments on the SemanticKITTI dataset show that the proposed method improves mapping accuracy by about 12% and reaches an mIoU of 54.92%, which is 13.18 percentage points higher than spatial-only mapping. These results show that spatiotemporal reasoning is effective for continuous semantic mapping in autonomous robotic systems.

</details>


### [1020] [Integrated cloud-based architecture for robot-robot and human-robot collaboration using ROS 2--MQTT in Mediterranean Greenhouses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22682)
*F. Cañadas-Aránega,M. Muñoz,J. C. Moreno,J. L. Blanco-Claraco*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于云的混合架构，结合ROS 2（边缘计算）与iVeg决策支持系统（DSS），利用MQTT和FIWARE平台实现多机器人在地中海温室复杂环境下的可靠、低延迟通信与协同，验证了其在仿真与真实温室中维持连接性与数据完整性能力，并提出了‘温室模型即服务’（GMaaS）新范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 地中海温室环境狭窄、植被密集、金属结构干扰严重，导致传统ROS 2等框架出现节点发现失败和延迟激增，阻碍多机器人实时协同，亟需鲁棒可扩展的通信解决方案。

Method: 设计云边协同的混合架构：ROS 2作为边缘平台处理本地控制，iVeg作为云端DSS提供高层决策支持；通过MQTT协议与欧洲FIWARE平台构建双向通信桥，支持高阶遥测、点云及农户识别等数据同步；在高保真仿真与真实温室中验证。

Result: 该架构在强干扰、动态障碍与密集植被下仍保持持久连接与数据完整性；MQTT有效打破信息孤岛，实现去中心化、可扩展的复杂任务管理；边缘执行+云端决策模式运行稳定。

Conclusion: 本工作确立了Greenhouse Models as a Service（GMaaS）方法论先例，成功弥合了农业机器人底层控制与云端IoT高层决策之间的鸿沟，为可持续智慧农业中的多机器人系统部署提供了可推广的技术路径。

Abstract: The imperative to develop more sustainable agriculture demands a transition from isolated automation toward the deployment of multi-robot systems (MRS) in agrifood environments. However, Mediterranean greenhouse settings-characterized by narrow corridors, dense biomass, and structural metallic interference-pose significant challenges for robust and scalable communication between agents. Traditional robotic frameworks, such as ROS 2, frequently encounter node discovery issues and latency spikes due to dynamic obstacles, dense foliage, and other characteristic greenhouse elements, creating a critical bottleneck for real-time coordination. This paper proposes an innovative cloud-based hybrid architecture that establishes a two-way communication bridge between ROS 2, acting as an edge computing platform, and iVeg as a Decision Support System (DSS), using MQTT and the European FIWARE platform. The proposed framework enables seamless interoperability between fleets of multiple robots in environments with communication constraints, facilitating the synchronised exchange of high-level telemetry, point cloud data and farmer identification for collaboration, amongst other critical data. The architecture was validated in a high-fidelity simulation environment and subsequently tested in a real-world greenhouse scenario, demonstrating its ability to maintain persistent connectivity and data integrity under adverse network conditions. The results indicate that the integration of MQTT effectively eliminates information silos, providing a scalable and decentralised solution for managing complex robotic missions, which are executed locally via Edge Computing. This work sets a new methodological precedent for the concept of Greenhouse Models as a Service (GMaaS), bridging the gap between low-level robotic control and high-level, cloud-based IoT decision-making.

</details>


### [1021] [Temporal Logic Guidance for Action-Only Diffusion Policies with World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22729)
*Moritz Zoellner,Anastasios Manganaris,Rohan Paleja*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对仅生成动作的扩散策略的新引导方法，利用独立学习的世界模型对信号时序逻辑（STL）约束进行可微评估，并将梯度注入扩散过程，从而在不重训练的情况下提升约束满足率并保持任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散策略虽能实现多模态机器人行为，但在推理阶段缺乏对行为模式的显式控制能力，而这种控制在人机协同场景中至关重要。

Method: 提出一种新引导方法：使用单独训练的世界模型对STL约束进行可微鲁棒性评估，并将评估梯度注入动作-only扩散策略的采样过程，实现无需重训练的约束引导。

Result: 在Robomimic的Can Transport任务上，任务成功率保持100%，约束违反率从基线方法的80%以上降至4%。

Conclusion: 该方法有效提升了动作-only扩散策略对STL约束的遵循能力，在不牺牲任务性能的前提下显著增强可控性与安全性，为更复杂、鲁棒的人机交互提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Diffusion policies enable multimodal robot behavior but offer limited ability to choose among behavior modes at inference time, even though such control is desirable in human-robot settings. Prior solutions to this lack of control have utilized Signal Temporal Logic (STL) to express human intentions and provide corresponding guidance for diffusion policy inference. However, these approaches can only guide diffusion policies that jointly generate future actions and states, increasing both complexity and runtime. We propose a novel guidance method for action-only diffusion policies that uses a separate learned world model to enable differentiable evaluation of STL robustness, with its gradient then injected into the diffusion process. This steers behavior toward constraint satisfaction without retraining, improving constraint adherence while preserving task performance. On the Can Transport task from Robomimic, our method maintains 100% task success while reducing constraint violations from over 80% for baseline methods to 4%. We also discuss extensions toward improved robustness and more complex constraints.

</details>


### [1022] [Cooperative-ORCA*: Real-Time Proactive Deadlock Avoidance for Continuous-Space Multi-Agent Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22757)
*Junfeng Wu,Jiaqi Chen,Hongkun Lyu,Kevin Zheng,Andy Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了C-ORCA*和C-ORCA*-MAPF两种连续空间多智能体路径规划算法，通过提前建模智能体的完整空间轨迹及其空间依赖关系，主动避免死锁，显著提升了求解率、运行时间和总流程时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ORCA*是实时MAPF求解器，但具有短视性，无法预见未来死锁；ORCA*-MAPF虽引入回退机制，但事后干预带来高flowtime开销。

Method: 提出C-ORCA*和C-ORCA*-MAPF算法，在连续空间中显式建模各智能体的完整空间轨迹及其相互空间依赖关系，以实现死锁的前瞻性预防。

Result: C-ORCA*系列算法在求解率、运行时间和flowtime方面均显著优于当前最先进方法。

Conclusion: 通过将空间轨迹与空间依赖纳入连续空间MAPF规划过程，可有效规避死锁及后续修正开销，为实时协同机器人导航提供更优解决方案。

Abstract: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) is a problem that requires computing collision-free paths for a set of agents from their start locations to designated goal locations. The problem has broad applications in domains where teams of robots must operate in a coordinated manner. ORCA* is a real time MAPF solver that assigns for each timestep a velocity for each agent. Due to its real time nature, it is myopic to future deadlocks that result from current decisions. ORCA*-MAPF attempts to remedy this limitation by introducing fallback mechanisms when deadlocks are detected. However, post hoc interventions often introduce significant flowtime overhead. In this paper, we introduce C-ORCA* and C-ORCA*-MAPF, continuous space MAPF algorithms that incorporate agents' entire spatial trajectory and their spatial dependencies to proactively prevent deadlocks from occurring, thus avoiding the high flowtime overhead associated with post hoc corrections in ORCA*-MAPF. The C-ORCA* family of algorithms significantly outperform previous state-of-the-art in terms of solve rate, runtime, and flowtime.

</details>


### [1023] [UniFS: Unified Fast-to-Slow Hierarchical Architecture for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22794)
*Lin Sun,Zhiwei Guan,Conglin Wang,Zihong Chen,Jianhai Yu,Zongsheng Li,Boyong He,Tao Sun,Jiale Cao,Lige Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出UniFS统一架构，通过分层更新频率、潜在向量逆向机制和多级监督策略，解决视觉-语言-动作模型中的频率失配与信息丢失问题，在LIBERO上达到98.3%成功率并实现2.1倍推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主流Fast-Slow双系统VLA模型存在频率失配问题：更新间隔过大导致语义漂移，过小则削弱计算优势；且动作专家仅接收VLM最终层单频特征，丢失中间丰富表征。

Method: 1）将VLM分层按递减频率更新；2）引入潜在向量逆向机制重排多尺度特征与动作专家交互顺序；3）设计粗到细的多级时序监督策略。

Result: 在LIBERO上平均成功率98.3%，较VLA-Adapter提升2.5%；推理延迟从36.5ms降至17.8ms（2.1×加速）；Franka机器人实验证实实用性。

Conclusion: UniFS通过统一快慢架构实现更丰富的跨频信息传递与长期时序上下文保持，兼顾性能与效率，为VLA模型设计提供新范式。

Abstract: Mainstream Fast-Slow dual system vision-language-action models decouple a high-frequency action expert from a low-frequency vision-language model for efficiency, yet they face a fundamental frequency dilemma: large update gaps cause semantic drift from stale context, while small gaps erode the intended computational savings. Moreover, because the action expert receives only the VLM's final-layer representation at a single fixed frequency, rich intermediate features are discarded, limiting both information coupling and manipulation precision. Inspired by multi-timescale neural processing in the human brain, we introduce UniFS, a unified fast-to-slow architecture that resolves these challenges through three key designs. First, we stratify the VLM layers into groups with progressively decreasing update frequencies, enabling shallow layers to capture fast-changing dynamics while deeper layers cache stable semantic context. Second, a latent vector inversion mechanism re-routes the interaction order between multi-scale VLM features and the action expert, aligning fast-varying representations with fine-grained action decoding and slow-varying ones with coarse planning. Third, a multi-level supervision strategy enforces a coarse-to-fine learning hierarchy across temporal scales. Together, these designs enable richer cross-frequency information transfer within a single backbone, while the low-frequency pathways additionally preserve temporal context across steps. Experiments on LIBERO show that UniFS achieves state-of-the-art performance (98.3\% average success rate, a 2.5\% gain over VLA-Adapter baseline) while reducing average inference latency from 36.5~ms to 17.8~ms (2.1$\times$ speedup). Real-robot experiments on a Franka platform further validate its practical applicability. Code is opensourced at https://github.com/linsun449/UniFS.

</details>


### [1024] [Cloak: Zero-Shot Cross-Embodiment Manipulation by Masking the End-Effector from the VLA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22836)
*Michael Piseno,Guy Tevet,C. Karen Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Cloak训练方法，通过在腕部相机视角中遮蔽末端执行器，使视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型具备零样本跨本体迁移能力，无需新硬件的数据收集即可泛化到多种未见机器人本体。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决VLA模型因腕部视角中末端执行器占据大面积且形态固定而导致的本体依赖问题，提升模型跨硬件泛化能力。

Method: 在仿真中基于机器人已知几何结构实时生成精确掩码以遮蔽末端执行器，并在训练中增强掩码以提升对未见本体的泛化性；在单种平行夹爪数据集上训练Cloak-VLA模型。

Result: Cloak-VLA可在零样本情况下成功迁移到多种未见本体（如其他夹爪、机械臂、五指手），同时保持原始本体性能。

Conclusion: Cloak通过解耦腕部视觉输入与特定本体，实现了数据对硬件的独立性，使训练数据可复用于未来不同机器人平台。

Abstract: We present Cloak, a training recipe that endows a Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model with zero-shot cross-embodiment transfer by cloaking the end-effector from its own wrist camera. The end-effector occupies a large and consistent region of the wrist view and masking it allows for embodiment-agnostic visual reasoning. Cloak renders a mask in simulation from the robot's known geometry, accurately and in real time, with no segmentation or generative models. During training, we augment the mask so the model generalizes to embodiments unseen at training time. We demonstrate the recipe with Cloak-VLA, a VLA trained with Cloak on a single parallel-jaw gripper dataset. No data of new embodiments is ever collected. Cloak-VLA transfers zero-shot to various unseen embodiments, including another gripper, another arm, and a five-fingered hand, while preserving the source embodiment's performance. By decoupling the wrist view from its own embodiment, Cloak allows data to outlive the hardware it was collected on.

</details>


### [1025] [FPAS: Frontier-Based Path Planning with Adaptive Sampling for Large-Scale Unknown Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22838)
*Jinwoo Choi,Yeonkyu Lee,Jung-Taak Kim,Jisung Bae,Seung-Woo Seo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为基于前沿的路径规划与自适应采样（FPAS）的新框架，用于在大规模未知环境中高效到达目标。该方法通过重新定义前沿概念指导前向探索和回溯子目标选择，并引入基于前沿开放度度量的自适应采样机制，在开放区域稀疏采样以降低计算负担，在狭窄通道密集采样以保障连通性。实验表明FPAS显著提升了计算效率，同时保持优异的目标到达性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有路径规划器在大规模未知环境的长距离导航中常面临计算瓶颈或路径低效问题。

Method: 提出FPAS框架，利用前沿概念指导前向探索与死胡同回溯的子目标选择，并设计基于前沿开放度度量的自适应采样机制，在开放区域稀疏采样、狭窄通道密集采样。

Result: FPAS在大量实验中显著提升计算效率，同时保持高度竞争力的目标到达性能。

Conclusion: FPAS是一种高效且鲁棒的路径规划框架，适用于大规模未知环境中的目标导向导航任务。

Abstract: In this work, we propose Frontier-based Path Planning with Adaptive Sampling (FPAS), a novel framework designed for efficient goal-reaching in large-scale, unknown environments. While existing planners often struggle with computational bottlenecks or inefficient paths during long-range navigation, FPAS overcomes these challenges by reinterpreting the frontier concept for goal-directed tasks. Specifically, our method leverages frontiers to effectively guide forward progression into unobserved regions and to select promising subgoals for backtracking from dead-ends or inefficient paths. Furthermore, FPAS introduces an adaptive sampling mechanism based on a frontier-derived openness metric. This mechanism dynamically adjusts the global graph's density by employing sparse nodes in open areas to alleviate computational burdens, while preserving denser sampling in narrow passages to ensure connectivity. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that FPAS substantially improves computational efficiency over baseline methods while maintaining highly competitive goal-reaching performance.

</details>


### [1026] [HiL-ResRL: A Model-Agnostic Finetuning Adapter via Human-in-the-loop Residual Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22860)
*Jingyi Liu,Zhaohong Mai,ShunSen He,Hang Ren,Chao Wang,Shunbo Zhou,XiaoDong Wu,Heng Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种即插即用的微调框架，通过残差策略和人在环指导，提升视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在真实机器人上的部署鲁棒性，仅需1.5小时在线训练即可实现95%以上成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于行为克隆（BC）的生成式模仿学习模型存在误差累积和分布偏移问题，难以在工业场景中可靠部署。

Method: 提出模型无关的微调框架：将VLA模型输出作为统一动作接口，训练一个残差策略来修正次优动作，并引入人在环机制保障安全探索与训练效率。

Result: 在真实机器人上仅用1.5小时在线强化学习训练，平均任务成功率超过95%。

Conclusion: 该方法为行为克隆模型在工业环境中的实际部署提供了高效、鲁棒且通用的解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advancements in generative imitation learning have significantly propelled the field of robotic manipulation. However, the majority of existing models rely heavily on Behavior Cloning (BC), a paradigm that suffers from compounding errors and distributional shift. Consequently, the efficacy of these models in practical industrial deployments remains limited. To address these challenges, we introduce a novel, plug-and-play fine-tuning pipeline designed to facilitate the robust deployment of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models in real-world environments. In contrast to contemporary reinforcement learning (RL) fine-tuning strategies, which are often constrained by specific model architectures, our proposed framework is model-agnostic and adaptable to a diverse range of VLA models. We conceptualize VLA-generated actions as a unified interface, upon which we train a residual policy. This policy is designed to rectify suboptimal actions and address the distributional shift inherent in imitation learning. Additionally, we incorporate human-in-the-loop guidance to ensure safe exploration and maximize training efficiency. We conduct experiments directly in real-world robotic settings. The results demonstrate that within only 1.5 hour of real-world online RL training, the average success rate exceeds 95% on real robots. Our work presents a practical solution for deploying behavior cloning models in industrial scenarios.

</details>


### [1027] [A Vendor-Agnostic LiDAR Data Conversion System with Multi-Signal Detection and Multi-Format Output](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22881)
*Param Patel,Jay Dave,Pratyush Chakraborty*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种通用的LiDAR PCAP文件解析框架，能自动识别Ouster、Velodyne、Hesai和Livox四类传感器来源，并统一转换为五种标准点云格式，无需手动配置厂商SDK。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不同厂商LiDAR传感器的PCAP文件结构、UDP端口和编码方式差异大，导致需维护多个独立解析流程，缺乏统一基础设施。

Method: 采用加权多信号方法自动识别PCAP来源；对Ouster和Velodyne使用C++ SDK解析，对Hesai和Livox采用Python dpkt库解析；支持统一输出至五种标准点云格式。

Result: 在i3/8GB设备上实测：Ouster达2.08M点/秒，Velodyne达1.47M点/秒（C++原生解析）；Hesai和Livox分别为110K和150K点/秒（Python解析），性能差距稳定在8–10倍。

Conclusion: 该框架显著降低LiDAR数据处理门槛，实现跨厂商PCAP文件的自动化识别与标准化输出，提升3D感知流水线的可复用性与部署效率。

Abstract: LiDAR (Light Detection and Ranging) sensors capture the surrounding environment as dense 3D point clouds by measuring the time-of-flight of emitted laser pulses, making them foundational across autonomous vehicles, robotics, and large-scale mapping. PCAP (Packet Capture) files from these sensors are the starting point of most 3D perception pipelines, yet internal packet structures, UDP (User Datagram Protocol) port conventions and encoding schemes differ enough across manufacturers that no single tool reads them all. Ouster, Velodyne, Hesai, and Livox each require their own SDK (Software Development Kit), their own environment setup, and their own conversion workflow. Supporting all four means maintaining four disconnected pipelines with no shared infrastructure. The pipeline described here takes a raw PCAP as input and handles vendor identification automatically, scoring six independent file characteristics through a weighted multi-signal approach to determine the source sensor. C++ SDKs handle Ouster and Velodyne, while Hesai and Livox rely on Python-based dpkt parsing where no open source SDK exists. From there, a single command writes output to any of five industry-standard formats. We tested on real outdoor captures. Ouster peaks at 2.08M points per second, Velodyne at 1.47M, both running through native C++ packet decoding. Hesai and Livox land at 110K and 150K respectively, where Python-layer parsing introduces overhead that compounds under sustained load. The 8-10x gap held consistently across runs. Tested on a consumer-grade i3 with 8GB RAM, no vendor configuration required

</details>


### [1028] [Improving Robotic Imitation Learning via Trajectory Standardization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22907)
*Licheng Yang,Lingfeng Qian,Fei Zheng,Yonghao He,Wei Sui,Shuangshuang Li,Hu Su*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为信息标准化轨迹重采样（ISR）的离线预处理方法，通过在信息调制的黎曼流形上进行测地线等距参数化，提升机器人模仿学习中噪声、非均匀人类演示轨迹的质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类示范轨迹常因操作速度变化、间歇性停顿和动作密度不一致而产生时间非均匀性和冗余，传统时间均匀下采样无法有效解决该问题，影响策略学习效果。

Method: 提出ISR方法：将轨迹映射到信息调制的黎曼流形，构建基于速度与加速度范数的信息强度场，并进行测地线等距重采样，使相邻点间信息距离近似相等。

Result: 在三个真实世界操纵任务上，相比3倍时间均匀下采样基线，ISR将任务成功率提升约25%，对不同操作员采集的数据具有鲁棒性，并减小数据集规模与训练开销。

Conclusion: ISR是一种有效的轨迹预处理方法，能显著提升模仿学习性能，兼顾数据压缩与关键运动阶段保留。

Abstract: Imitation learning for robotic manipulation relies on large sets of human demonstration trajectories, which are often noisy and temporally irregular due to variable operator speed, intermittent pauses, and inconsistent action density. A common preprocessing strategy is time-uniform downsampling to shorten sequences, but it cannot effectively remove speed-induced non-uniformity or redundant pauses. This mismatch degrades data quality and hinders policy learning. To address this issue, we propose Information-Standardized Trajectory Resampling (ISR), an offline preprocessing method for effective imitation learning. ISR resamples each trajectory by enforcing approximately equal information distance between adjacent points. Specifically, we map trajectories onto an information-modulated Riemannian manifold and perform geodesic-equidistant parameterization. We construct an information-intensity field from velocity and acceleration norms: the velocity term removes small-motion redundancy, while the acceleration term preserves high-curvature and fine-manipulation phases. We evaluate ISR on three real-world manipulation tasks with mainstream imitation learning policies. Compared with the baseline time-uniform 3x downsampling, ISR improves task success rates by about 25%, remains robust across datasets collected from different operators, and reduces both dataset size and training cost. The code and videos are publicly available at https://d-robotics-ai-lab.github.io/isr.page.

</details>


### [1029] [PanoVine: Whole-Body Visuomotor Control for Soft Growing Vine Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22923)
*Yimeng Qin,Xiaomeng Xu,William Heap,Aditi Oak,Shuran Song,Allison Okamura*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的数据驱动控制框架，用于首个自主式藤蔓机器人系统，通过19个分布式摄像头实现全身体感反馈，并利用示范学习训练端到端的视觉运动策略，实现在复杂环境中的鲁棒导航与操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 藤蔓机器人因迟滞、系绳干扰和形变难以建模与预测，传统规划与控制方法效果受限。

Method: 构建集成19个分布式摄像头的视觉反馈系统，采集机器人状态与环境信息；基于演示数据训练端到端的视觉运动策略，实现闭环自主控制。

Result: 实验表明该策略可在分支结构中转向、上坡攀爬、跨越无支撑地形、精确定位目标、穿越狭窄空间与障碍物等挑战场景中实现鲁棒导航与操作。

Conclusion: 该数据驱动、视觉主导的控制框架显著提升了藤蔓机器人在复杂受限环境中的自主性与适应性，为软体生长机器人提供了新范式。

Abstract: Vine robots, a class of soft, growing robots, are suitable for navigating complex and confined environments due to their compliant bodies and self-supporting growth mechanism. However, hysteresis, tether interactions, and deformations make them difficult to predict and model, which in turn limits the effectiveness of conventional planning and control approaches. In this work, we present a data-driven, vision-based control framework for the first autonomous vine robot system. Our system integrates 19 cameras distributed along the robot's body to provide comprehensive feedback of both the robot state and the surrounding environment. Using this rich whole-body vision feedback, we train an end-to-end visuomotor policy from demonstrations for closed-loop autonomous control in complex environments. The policy efficiently aggregates information from distributed sensing while maintaining robustness to inaccurate robot states and actuation. Experimental results demonstrate that the learned policy enables robust navigation and manipulation in challenging scenarios, including steering through branched structures, climbing up slopes, traversing unsupported terrain, reaching objects precisely, and maneuvering through confined spaces and obstacles. Project website https://panovine-bot.github.io

</details>


### [1030] [Humanoid-OmniOcc: Stereo-Based Full-View Occupancy Dataset for Embodied AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22971)
*Xianda Guo,Bohao Zhang,Chenwei Huang,Shiyuan Chen,Ruilin Wang,Yiqun Duan,Cong Yang,Qin Zou,Wei Sui*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Humanoid-OmniOcc——首个面向人形机器人、基于全景双目视觉的大规模体素级占据预测数据集与模型，采用Real2Sim2Real闭环范式，并设计了利用深度先验的立体引导占据预测模型，在仿真与真实场景中均取得优异泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有占据预测数据集主要面向自动驾驶，存在车端视角、远场几何和静态道路先验等偏差，难以适配人形机器人在复杂室内环境中的具身感知需求。

Method: 构建了包含15个仿真室内场景和5个真实环境的全景双目占据数据集Humanoid-OmniOcc；提出Real2Sim2Real闭环范式（真实传感器→高保真仿真→大规模标注→实机验证）；设计Humanoid-OmniOcc模型，利用鲁棒深度先验实现精准2D到3D提升。

Result: Humanoid-OmniOcc在未见仿真测试场景和真实世界环境中均显著优于单目基线，验证了Real2Sim2Real范式的有效性与模型的强泛化能力。

Conclusion: 该工作填补了人形机器人占据感知领域高质量数据与专用模型的空白，为具身智能在复杂室内环境中的安全导航与交互提供了新基准与技术路径。

Abstract: Occupancy prediction at voxel-level granularity is essential for safe robotic navigation and interaction in complex environments. Existing occupancy datasets, however, are predominantly designed for autonomous driving with vehicle-centric biases -- forward-facing cameras, far-field geometry, and static road priors -- limiting their applicability to embodied humanoid perception. We present Humanoid-OmniOcc, a large-scale panoramic stereo-based occupancy dataset tailored for humanoid robots. The dataset encompasses 15 diverse simulated indoor scenes and 5 real-world environments, yielding over 155K samples with broad scene and style diversity. Importantly, the dataset is designed around a Real2Sim2Real closed-loop paradigm: real sensor specifications drive physically accurate simulation, simulation produces large-scale annotated training data, and models trained in simulation are directly evaluated on real-world captures -- enabling iterative refinement of the sim-to-real pipeline. We further propose \textbf{H}umanoid \textbf{S}urround \textbf{S}tereo-guided \textbf{Occ}upancy model (Humanoid-OmniOcc) that exploits robust depth priors for accurate 2D-to-3D lifting. Extensive experiments show that Humanoid-OmniOcc consistently outperforms monocular baselines and generalizes well to both unseen simulated test scenes and real-world environments, validating the effectiveness of the Real2Sim2Real design. Code and data will be available upon acceptance at https://d-robotics-ai-lab.github.io/humanoid-omniocc.

</details>


### [1031] [Distilling Collaborative Dynamics into Latent Space for Implicit Coordination in Decentralized Multi-Agent Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22982)
*Chanyoung Park,Minsung Yoon,Andrew Jeong,Sung-eui Yoon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为CLS-DP的去中心化多智能体框架，用于多臂协同操作任务。该方法在CTDE范式下，将多智能体动力学蒸馏为共享协作潜变量，使各智能体仅凭本地RGB观测与任务指令即可隐式协同，无需通信或全局状态，且计算开销不随智能体数量增长。在RoboFactory基准上显著优于集中式和去中心化基线，并展现出良好的参数效率与可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多臂协同操作需精确时空协调，但集中式方法随智能体数量增加而扩展性差；现有去中心化方法难以在部分可观测、无通信条件下实现有效隐式协调。

Method: 提出CLS-DP框架：在CTDE范式下，通过蒸馏学习一个协作潜变量；部署时每个智能体基于本地RGB观测和共享任务指令推断该潜变量，并将其作为条件输入扩散模型的去噪过程，从而实现去中心化隐式协调。

Result: 在6个RoboFactory任务（2–4智能体）上平均成功率达38%，显著高于最佳集中式基线（20%）和无协作潜变量的消融（9%）；参数效率更优；归因图显示智能体能关注自身及队友的关键关节与夹爪，验证潜变量有效编码协作动态。

Conclusion: CLS-DP证明了仅依赖局部观测与共享任务指令、无需显式通信即可实现高效隐式多智能体协同的可行性，为真实部分可观测场景下的多机器人协作提供了新范式。

Abstract: Multi-arm manipulation demands precise spatiotemporal coordination, yet many centralized approaches scale poorly as team size increases. To address this, we propose CLS-DP, a decentralized multi-agent framework that enables implicit coordination under partial observability without shared global views, explicit state information, or inter-agent communication. Under the centralized training and decentralized execution (CTDE) paradigm, CLS-DP distills privileged multi-agent dynamics into a latent space. At deployment, each agent infers a collaborative latent from its local RGB observation and a shared task instruction; it then conditions the diffusion denoising process on this latent. This design enables implicit coordination with a per-agent cost independent of team size. Across six RoboFactory benchmark tasks spanning two to four agents, CLS-DP achieves a 38% mean success rate, outperforming the best centralized baseline (20%) and a decentralized ablation without the collaborative latent (9%). It also maintains superior parameter efficiency across all agent configurations. Attribution maps show that an agent conditioned on the collaborative latent places high attribution on the joints and grippers of both itself and its teammates throughout execution. This suggests that the learned latent efficiently encodes collaborative dynamics from local observation, which facilitates implicit coordination in realistic settings characterized by partial observability.

</details>


### [1032] [TEXEDO : Test Time Scaling for Controller-aware Language-conditioned Humanoid Motion Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22998)
*Jianuo Cao,Yuxin Chen,Yuzhen Song,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Chenran Li,Thomas Tian*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TEXEDO 是一种测试时缩放框架，用于提升文本条件下的拟人机器人运动生成质量，通过在预训练生成器采样的多个候选动作中，结合动态可行性验证与语义对齐验证，筛选出既可执行又与文本高度匹配的动作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本驱动的运动生成模型依赖于从人类动作数据集重定向到机器人形态的数据，忽略了机器人控制器特有的平衡、接触动力学、执行器限制及失败模式，导致生成动作虽语义合理但难以实际执行。

Method: TEXEDO 在测试时对预训练文本条件生成器采样的多个候选动作进行评估：使用基于全身跟踪仿真蒸馏出的动态可行性验证器作为硬约束，结合在联合嵌入空间中衡量文本-动作对齐度的语义对齐验证器，从中选出最优可行动作。

Result: 在大规模仿真和 Unitree G1 实体机器人上的实验表明，TEXEDO 显著提升了动作跟踪保真度与文本对齐度。

Conclusion: 引入以物理可执行性为硬约束、语义对齐为目标的接地式验证机制，是实现可部署的语言引导拟人机器人运动生成的有效路径。

Abstract: Text-conditioned motion generation is a promising interface for programming humanoid robots, yet current generators are often trained on human motion datasets retargeted to robot morphologies. Although such data provides rich semantic and kinematic priors, it fails to capture the nuances of whole-body tracking controllers, including balance, contact dynamics, actuation limits, and controller-specific failure modes. As a result, generated motions can be semantically plausible but difficult or impossible for the robot to execute. We introduce TEXEDO, a test-time scaling framework for humanoid motion generation that improves motion quality without requiring a stronger underlying generator. Given a text prompt, TEXEDO samples multiple candidate motions from a pretrained text-conditioned generator and selects the best motion that is both executable and task-aligned. The reward model combines a dynamic feasibility verifier, distilled from whole-body tracking rollouts to predict physical executability, with a semantic alignment verifier that measures text-motion alignment in a learned co-embedding space. Our pipeline treats dynamic feasibility as a hard constraint and semantic alignment as the selection objective within the feasible set. Through large-scale simulation studies and real-world deployment on a Unitree G1 humanoid robot, we show that TEXEDO consistently improves both tracking fidelity and text alignment. These results demonstrate that grounded verification is an effective path toward deployable language-guided humanoid motion generation. Project website: https://jianuocao.github.io/TEXEDO/

</details>


### [1033] [ISOPoT: Imaging Sonar Odometry by Point Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23006)
*Jaša Samec,Vid Rijavec,Marko Peljhan,Aleksander Grm,Andrej Androjna,Danijel Skočaj,Matej Dobrevski*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出ISOPoT，一种基于现代点跟踪技术的前视声呐里程计方法，通过多帧点轨迹建模与轻量级优化提升鲁棒性，在真实水下数据集上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水下环境能见度低、声呐图像噪声大且缺乏语义结构，导致传统视觉关键点匹配方法性能差，亟需可靠的声呐里程计算法。

Method: 提出ISOPoT声呐里程计框架，以多帧点轨迹作为核心对应表征，并引入轻量级优化增强鲁棒性。

Result: 在Aracati 2017公开数据集和内部真实水下声呐数据集上，ISOPoT在纯声呐及多传感器融合场景中均持续超越现有最优方法。

Conclusion: ISOPoT验证了基于点跟踪的声呐里程计在复杂水下环境中的有效性与鲁棒性，为水下机器人导航提供了新思路。

Abstract: Reliable navigation in underwater environments remains a key challenge in marine robotics. In such scenarios, forward-looking sonars are a natural choice for long-range perception, offering wide coverage even in turbid, low-visibility conditions. However, sonar images are inherently noisy, contain artifacts, and lack rich semantic structure, causing standard computer vision methods for keypoint detection and matching to perform poorly. In this paper, we introduce ISOPoT, an imaging sonar odometry method based on modern point tracking techniques. We propose a sonar odometry pipeline that uses multi-frame point tracks as its primary correspondence representation, augmented with lightweight optimizations to improve robustness. We evaluated the proposed method on the Aracati 2017 dataset, as well as on an internal sonar dataset collected in real-world underwater environments. Our results show that ISOPoT outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods consistently in both sonar-only scenarios and in multi-sensor settings.

</details>


### [1034] [AdaReP:Adaptive Re-Planning under Model Mismatch for Neural World-Model Predictive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23079)
*Yutian Cheng,Xiaojian Ma,Xianhao Wang,Min Yang,Rongpeng Su,Hangxin Liu,Xi Chen,Shuai Li,Qing Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出AdaReP方法，在不修改已有世界模型和规划器的前提下，通过在线自适应调整重规划容忍度，显著降低规划计算开销，同时保持任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经世界模型与MPC结合虽能控制预测误差，但每步重规划带来巨大计算开销；缓存计划可缓解该问题，但其有效性受限于预测误差在局部动力学中的传播特性。

Method: 基于扰动分析的动态遗憾框架建模 stale-plan 惩罚，并设计无需训练的AdaReP包装器，利用当前轨迹偏差与局部敏感性估计在线调整重规划容忍度。

Result: 在图像空间规划、潜在空间控制及真实机器人操作任务中，AdaReP大幅降低规划侧计算量（物理机器人实验中查询次数减少超80%），同时保持相近任务性能。

Conclusion: AdaReP提供了一种轻量、通用且即插即用的优化方案，有效平衡规划精度与计算效率，适用于多种基于学习的世界模型控制系统。

Abstract: Neural world models coupled with model predictive control (MPC) replan at every environment step to bound accumulated prediction error, but this incurs substantial computational overhead. Reusing a cached plan reduces this overhead, yet its effectiveness depends on how prediction mismatch propagates through the local dynamics. We analyze this trade-off with a perturbation-based dynamic-regret framework and show that stale-plan penalties scale with the reuse tolerance, the accumulated mismatch since the last replanning step, and the local dynamics sensitivity. Based on this structure, we propose AdaReP, a training-free wrapper that adapts the replanning tolerance online using the current deviation from the cached rollout and a local sensitivity estimate, without modifying the learned world model or planner. Across image-space planning, latent-space control, and real-world robotic manipulation, AdaReP substantially reduces planner-side computation while maintaining comparable task performance, including over 80% fewer queries on a 50-trial physical robot study.

</details>


### [1035] [Foresight: Failure Detection for Long-Horizon Robotic Manipulation with Action-Conditioned World Model Latents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23085)
*Haoran Zhang,Yifu Lu,Boyang Wang,Xuhui Kang,Yen-Ling Kuo,Zezhou Cheng,Mengdi Wang,Odest Chadwicke Jenkins*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Foresight框架，利用动作条件世界模型的潜在表示进行长时程机器人任务失败检测，仅需任务级成功/失败标签训练，并通过功能共形预测自适应校准检测阈值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长时程机器人任务中失败检测具有挑战性，因失败起始模糊且缺乏密集时间标注。

Method: 基于动作条件世界模型的潜在表示监控操作轨迹，仅用最终任务级标签训练，并结合功能共形预测（FCP）自适应校准检测阈值。

Result: 在LIBERO-Long、ManiSkill-Long和BEHAVIOR-1K仿真基准及ReactoX-200与Franka真实机械臂上验证有效，性能优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 动作条件世界模型嵌入为长时程操作中的可靠失败监控提供了可扩展表征。

Abstract: Long-horizon tasks are common in real-world robotic deployments, yet failure detection for such tasks remains underexplored. Detecting failures in long-horizon robotic tasks is particularly challenging because failure onset is often ambiguous and dense temporal annotations are typically unavailable. We present Foresight, a failure detection framework that monitors manipulation trajectories using latent representations from an action-conditioned world model. Foresight is trained using only final task-level success or failure labels. By leveraging predictive world-model embeddings, our method provides a unified framework for failure detection across different policies. We further use functional conformal prediction (FCP) to calibrate detection thresholds adaptively. We evaluate Foresight with state-of-the-art vision-language-action policies in simulation on LIBERO-Long, ManiSkill-Long, and BEHAVIOR-1K, compare it against state-of-the-artfailure detection methods, and validate it on real robots with three long-horizon tasks on a ReactorX-200 arm and one task on a Franka arm. Our results suggest that action-conditioned world-model embeddings provide a scalable representation for reliable failure monitoring in long-horizon manipulation.

</details>


### [1036] [Flow as Flow: Modeling Robot Velocity Fields as Probability Velocity Fields for Flow-Based Object Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23090)
*Koki Seno,Daichi Yashima,Yusuke Takagi,Kento Tokura,Komei Sugiura*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Flow as Flow框架，将机器人运动建模为基于流匹配的概率流，以密集速度场形式表示机器人流，显著提升生成效率与质量，并在多个基准和真实实验中验证其优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将机器人流建模为稀疏关键点位移，未能充分反映运动的连续时间特性；需一种能自然建模密集速度场的通用、高效表示方法。

Method: 提出Flow as Flow框架，采用概率流建模机器人流，基于流匹配（flow matching） formulation 直接学习连续密度速度场。

Result: 在标准基准上超越代表性基线方法，生成速度快约33倍；真实世界260次/方法×9种方法×13任务实验中，平均成功率高于基线。

Conclusion: 将机器人流建模为概率流是有效且可扩展的跨具身表征方式，为机器人基础模型训练提供更优运动表示。

Abstract: Cross-embodiment data have become central to training robotic foundation models. To leverage such heterogeneous data, we focus on flow-based object manipulation, where robot flows (robot velocity fields) serve as embodiment-agnostic motion representations. Previous studies do not formulate robot flows as dense velocity fields, but as displacements of sparse keypoints, while such velocity fields better match the continuous-time nature of motions. We propose Flow as Flow, a framework that models robot flows as probability flows based on a flow matching formulation. By naturally modeling such velocity fields within this formulation, our method achieves efficient and high-quality robot flow generation. Across standard benchmarks, our method outperforms representative baseline methods on standard metrics, while achieving approximately 33$\times$ faster generation. Furthermore, through real-world experiments evaluating 9 methods with 260 trials per method across 13 manipulation tasks, we show that our method achieves a higher average success rate than the baseline methods. Our project page is available at https://flow-as-flow-u0n5y.kinsta.page.

</details>


### [1037] [Assistron: Bayesian Shared Autonomy with Off-the-shelf Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23147)
*Pinhao Song,Ze Fu,Yutong Hu,Renaud Detry*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Assistron是一种共享自主模型，结合视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，在用户语音指令下自动执行宏观动作，并在接触密集型任务的关键失败点主动请求人工干预，无需微调VLA模型，兼顾高效性与泛化性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 减少用户在日常辅助操作中的认知与体力负担，同时避免VLA模型因微调导致的灾难性遗忘和泛化能力下降。

Method: 提出基于VLA的共享自主框架Assistron：利用语音指令驱动宏观运动；设计相位感知交互检测机制识别接触密集场景；在关键失败点请求人工干预，并通过流匹配（flow matching）引导调整VLA动作生成；全程不进行VLA微调。

Result: 在多任务场景恢复基准测试中，Assistron显著提升任务成功率（相比纯自主基线），并大幅降低人类认知与体力负荷（相比传统遥操作）。

Conclusion: Assistron提供了一种可扩展、平滑且省力的辅助操作新范式，平衡了自动化程度与人类控制权，且保护了VLA模型的通用先验知识。

Abstract: We propose Assistron, a shared autonomy model that leverages Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models to assist the user in daily activities. Our approach is grounded in two core principles: (1)~minimizing human cognitive and physical effort by leveraging VLA-driven autonomy for macro-movements, and (2)~prioritizing human intervention specifically at critical failure points. Driven by the user's verbal language commands, Assistron utilizes the VLA to autonomously execute macro-reaching trajectories, saving users' effort. In contact-rich interactions where VLAs tend to fail, Assistron employs a phase-aware interaction detection mechanism and solicits the user to intervene, in turn adjusting the VLA's action generation via flow matching guidance. Critically, our formulation eliminates the need for VLA fine-tuning, protecting its broad behavioral priors from catastrophic forgetting and ensuring the model does not become a narrow specialist. We validate our approach on a comprehensive multi-task scene recovery benchmark encompassing diverse daily manipulation skills. Empirical results demonstrate that Assistron significantly improves task success rates over pure autonomous baselines while significantly reducing human cognitive and physical workload compared to traditional teleoperation, offering a scalable, smooth, and effortless paradigm for assistive manipulation. The code is available in https://github.com/mousecpn/Assistron.git.

</details>


### [1038] [ShotcreteDepth: A Bi-modal Dataset for Robust Robotic Depth Perception in Shotcrete Construction Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23152)
*Jakub Gregorek,Lars Arnold Dethlefsen,Patrick Schmidt,Mads Essenbæk,Jonas Flink Bentzen,Lazaros Nalpantidis*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文介绍了ShotcreteDepth数据集，一个来自建筑领域的双模态数据集，包含在恶劣现实条件下采集的立体RGB图像和LiDAR点云，支持立体匹配、深度补全和深度估计等研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为解决在高浑浊度和低照度等恶劣现实条件下，传感器测量不完整和噪声大导致的自主应用感知系统挑战，构建了ShotcreteDepth数据集。

Method: 采集了11,252个时间同步的立体RGB图像与LiDAR点云样本，并开发了轻量级LiDAR点云标注工具；其中220个样本进行了人工标注用于评估。

Result: 发布了ShotcreteDepth数据集及其配套标注工具，提供了真实工业场景下具有挑战性的多模态感知基准。

Conclusion: ShotcreteDepth填补了建筑领域复杂环境下双模态感知数据的空白，为深度估计等相关任务提供了可靠的数据支撑和评估基准。

Abstract: We introduce ShotcreteDepth, a bi-modal dataset from the construction domain that captures both an active shotcreting process and general construction environments. The dataset comprises stereo RGB imagery and LiDAR point clouds acquired under harsh real-world conditions, including high turbidity and poor illumination. Such conditions adversely affect sensor measurements, leading to incomplete and noisy observations that pose significant challenges for perception systems in autonomous applications. Alongside the dataset, we release a lightweight annotation tool designed for time-efficient labeling of LiDAR point clouds. ShotcreteDepth consists of 11,252 temporally synchronized data samples, of which 220 are annotated for evaluation purposes. The dataset supports research in stereo matching, depth completion, and depth estimation under conditions that closely reflect the operational complexities found in industrial settings. Project repository: https://github.com/dtu-pas/shotcrete-depth

</details>


### [1039] [Asymmetric physics enables efficient learning in quadrupedal robot swarms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23153)
*Yuang Zhang,Yunlong Song,Zhihao He,Zelin Ni,Kangyu Wang,Tianchi Liu,Yu Hu,Feng Yu,Danping Zou,Weiyao Lin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于非对称物理建模的端到端学习方法，使大规模四足机器人集群能在障碍密集环境中实现无需通信、地图或中央规划的分布式视觉导航，并成功迁移到真实机器人平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人集群难以在物理世界中复现动物群体在复杂环境中的局部协同导航能力，而传统基于采样的强化学习在联合学习视觉感知、密集个体交互与接触式运动时效率低下。

Method: 采用高保真但不可微分的仿真器建模真实运动与接触动力学，同时使用可微分代理模型提供导航与运动策略的梯度；训练过程中支持最多512台四足机器人在共享环境中协同学习，部署时每台机器人仅依赖前向深度相机输入，完全去中心化。

Result: 策略在森林、桥梁、围栏、窄道和迷宫等多种仿真场景中泛化良好，并实现零样本迁移至6台真实四足机器人，在5种真实场景中成功运行；集群展现出预测避障、右侧让行、瓶颈前暂停及沿墙行走等类生物行为。

Conclusion: 非对称物理建模（即混合使用不可微仿真与可微代理模型）可显著提升端到端学习效率，为大规模四足机器人集群的可扩展、去中心化视觉导航控制提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Animal collectives navigate cluttered environments through local coordination, yet robot swarms still struggle to reproduce this capability in the physical world. End-to-end learning offers a route to such coordination, but scaling it to embodied swarms remains difficult: standard sampling-based reinforcement learning becomes inefficient when visual perception, dense robot-robot interaction, and contact-rich locomotion must be learned together. Here we show that asymmetric physics enables efficient end-to-end learning of vision-based, decentralized control in large swarms of quadrupedal robots. During training, quadrupeds interact in shared environments, where a high-fidelity, non-differentiable simulator generates realistic motion and contact dynamics, and differentiable surrogate models provide gradients for navigation and locomotion policies. This separation enables up to 512 quadrupeds to learn coordinated navigation policies in obstacle-rich environments. At deployment, each robot acts from a single forward-facing depth camera, without explicit communication, centralized planning, or global maps. The policies generalize across forests, bridges, enclosures, narrow passages, and mazes, and zero-shot transfer to six physical quadrupeds across five real-world scenarios. The resulting swarms exhibit predictive avoidance, right-side yielding, pausing before bottlenecks, and wall following, showing that asymmetric physics enables efficient training of scalable decentralized control policies for quadrupedal robot swarms.

</details>


### [1040] [Bridging Semantics and Kinematics: A Modular Framework for Zero-Shot Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23157)
*Ali Alabbas,Dipshikha Das,Camillo Murgia,Sainul Ansary,Alaa Elkamash,Philip Long*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需训练的模块化框架，用于零样本、语言引导的机器人操作，通过视觉感知、语义解释和任务执行三阶段分解实现高阶推理与低阶运动学的衔接；利用FastSAM和SoM生成视觉锚点，LLM作为语义路由器解析自然语言指令，并由任务协调器生成无碰撞轨迹；在两种零样本实验中达到62%的整体任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决标准视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在机器人操作中存在空间模糊性和语义幻觉的问题，弥合高层语义推理与底层运动控制之间的鸿沟，实现无需领域特定训练的语言引导零样本操作。

Method: 将视觉-动作流程分为三阶段：1）基于FastSAM和Set-of-Mark（SoM）提示的视觉感知模块，生成接地的视觉锚点；2）复用同一基础模型作为纯大语言模型（LLM），充当语义路由器，将自然语言指令转化为可验证、可重构的配置；3）由Task Orchestrator动态解析配置并输入MoveIt Task Constructor（MTC）生成无碰撞轨迹。
