Result: 在两种零样本实验设置（开放世界顺序操作与密集关系空间推理）中，端到端任务成功率平均达62%，验证了框架在无需域内训练或手动坐标编程下执行复杂物理动作的可靠性。

Conclusion: 该训练-free、模块化框架有效提升了语言引导机器人操作的泛化性与鲁棒性，为零样本具身智能提供了一种可扩展、可验证的架构范式。

Abstract: This paper presents a modular training-free framework for zero-shot, language-guided robotic manipulation in semi-structured environments. The architecture bridges the gap between high-level reasoning and low-level kinematics by decomposing the vision-action pipeline into three stages: visual perception, semantic interpretation, and task execution. To overcome the spatial ambiguity and semantic hallucinations inherent in standard Vision-Language Models (VLMs), the perception module employs FastSAM and Set-of-Mark (SoM) prompting to dynamically generate grounded, alphanumeric visual anchors. The same foundation model then operates purely as a Large Language Model (LLM) to act as a semantic router, translating unconstrained human directives into verifiable, reconfigurable configurations. Finally, these configurations are dynamically parsed by a Task Orchestrator into MoveIt Task Constructor (MTC) to generate collision-free trajectories. The framework is evaluated across two zero-shot experimental setups: unconstrained open-world sequential manipulation and dense relational spatial reasoning, achieving a 62% end-to-end task success rate across both scenarios, demonstrating its capacity to reliably execute complex physical actions without domain-specific training or manual coordinate programming.

</details>


### [1041] [Lessons from the Field: A Case Study of Robotic Intervention in an Industrial Emergency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23246)
*Jonathan Lichtenfeld,Frederik Bark,Robert Grafe,Oskar von Stryk*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文报告了一次在化工厂火灾后成功部署机器人任务组中和爆炸性气体危害的实地案例，其中配备定制操作工具的无人地面车辆（UGV）在危险环境下成功开启关键阀门，避免了大规模爆炸；同时分析了救援机器人在真实应急响应中的重要性及当前研究平台存在的通信限制与操作辅助功能不足等局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 化工厂事故对一线救援人员构成高风险和恶劣环境，污染与爆炸威胁常使人类无法进入现场，亟需可靠的机器人系统支援。

Method: 通过实地部署一支由定制化操作工具的无人地面车辆（UGV）组成的机器人任务组，在真实化工厂火灾后的爆炸性气体环境中执行关键阀门开启任务。

Result: UGV成功在高危条件下远程开启关键阀门，有效消除大规模爆炸风险；任务过程揭示了通信受限、操作辅助功能不足等现实部署瓶颈。

Conclusion: 该成功部署验证了救援机器人在真实工业应急场景中的可行性与价值，但也凸显了将实验室研究平台转化为可靠实战系统所需的关键改进方向，如鲁棒通信与增强人机协同能力。

Abstract: Incidents in chemical plants can pose a high level of risk and harsh environments for first responders. Contamination and explosion hazards can deny human access to the affected infrastructure, underscoring the need for capable robot systems. This field report documents the successful deployment of a robotic task force to neutralize an explosive gas hazard at a chemical plant after a fire incident. An Unmanned Ground Vehicle (UGV) with a custom manipulation tool opened a critical valve under hazardous conditions, averting the threat of a large-scale explosion. We provide insights into robot deployment and use the mission results to highlight both the importance of rescue robotics and limitations of using research platforms in real emergency deployments, such as communication constraints and the need for enhanced operator-assistance functions.

</details>


### [1042] [LP-NavOA: Integrated Local Navigation and Obstacle Avoidance for Humanoid Robots under Limited Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23249)
*Yukun Luo,Jianjun Ma,Yuyao Min,Jinzhe Li,Kaihong Huang,Peng Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出LP-NavOA框架，结合基于raycast感知的PPO运动控制与蒸馏得到的递归局部规划器，在有限感知下实现人形机器人在杂乱环境中的高效避障与目标恢复，显著提升到达率并验证于仿真与Unitree G1硬件平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人形机器人在杂乱环境中需同时解决避障、稀疏目标恢复和稳定全身运动，而传统显式规划-控制分离方法存在延迟与跟踪失配，纯反应式控制器易在障碍遮挡后丢失目标。

Method: 提出LP-NavOA：先训练一个raycast条件化的PPO全身运动策略（输入为机器人中心圆形航向-速度指令+安全滤波），冻结该骨干网络后，利用A*与路径点教师生成数据，蒸馏出仅改写航向指令的递归局部规划器；运行时仅依赖本体感知、短程测距与机体坐标系目标方向。

Result: 在MuJoCo开放墙与室内场景中，目标到达率从38–40%提升至85–97%，显著减少碰撞与拖行行为；消融实验验证动态路径塑形、教师主动采样及圆形指令接口对导航效率与3.0 m/s高速运动训练至关重要；Unitree G1实机部署证实无需持续手柄干预即可执行。

Conclusion: LP-NavOA实现了有限感知下的端到端局部导航闭环，兼顾实时性、鲁棒性与硬件可行性，为人形机器人在真实非结构化场景中的自主导航提供了新范式。

Abstract: Humanoid local navigation in cluttered environments must jointly resolve obstacle avoidance, sparse-goal recovery, and stable whole-body locomotion under short-range and partially observable sensing. Explicit planner-control decompositions introduce latency and can mismatch agile humanoid command-tracking limits, while purely reactive controllers may lose the goal after obstacle occlusion. We present LP-NavOA, a limited-perception navigation and obstacle-avoidance framework for humanoid robots. A raycast-conditioned perception-action proximal policy optimization (PPO) locomotion backbone is first trained with a robot-centered circular heading-speed command and a shared command-side safety filter. With this backbone frozen, A-star and waypoint teachers generate rollouts for distilling a recurrent local planner that overwrites only the heading command at deployment, leaving the whole-body policy intact. At runtime, LP-NavOA uses proprioception, short-range local range sensing, and a body-frame goal direction, requiring no global map, waypoint stream, or external planner. In MuJoCo open-wall and indoor layouts, the distilled planner produces obstacle bypassing and post-avoidance goal recovery, raising teacher-calibrated on-time arrival from 38--40\% to 85--97\% and reducing brush/contact-heavy progress relative to a backbone-only controller. Ablations show that dynamic route shaping, teacher-active data collection, and the circular command interface are important for navigation efficiency and for training the 3.0\,m/s backbone. A Unitree G1 deployment analysis demonstrates hardware executability without continuous joystick steering.

</details>


### [1043] [Conceptual Design of an Ecosystem for Real Farm Data Collection toward Agricultural AI Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23258)
*Junsei Tanaka,Yoshihiro Sato*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种可持续的农田真实数据收集与分发生态系统，通过自动定价、收益共享和设备认证上传保障数据真实性与经济可持续性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 农业机器人AI模型面临数据稀缺问题，现有开源平台缺乏对数据提供者的长期激励，且生成式AI兴起使验证数据是否真实来自农田环境变得困难。

Method: 构建包含自动定价（基于需求与稀有性）、收益共享（向农民分配收入）和认证设备上传（确保数据真实性）的数据生态系统。

Result: 通过估算农业机器人潜在经济价值，验证了农民、AI公司与平台三方的经济可持续性。

Conclusion: 该生态系统能有效激励农民持续提供真实农田数据，同时保障AI公司获得高质量数据，实现多方共赢。

Abstract: Data scarcity is a fundamental challenge in developing AI and foundation models for agricultural robots. Existing open-source data platforms do not provide sufficient incentives for data providers so long-term data collection remains difficult. Furthermore, advances in generative AI have introduced a new challenge of verifying that collected data genuinely originates from real farm environments. We propose an ecosystem for the sustainable collection and distribution of real farm data, integrating automatic pricing driven by demand and rarity, revenue sharing that distributes earnings to farmers as an incentive to keep providing data, and data authenticity guarantees through authenticated device uploads. To demonstrate the economic sustainability for all three parties among farmers, AI companies, and the platform, we estimate the economic value that agricultural robots stand to generate.

</details>


### [1044] [Causal Reward World Models: Zero-shot Reward Design for Automated Skill Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23280)
*Yang Yang,Yuchuang Tong,Zhengtao Zhang,Xu Ding,Ning Yang,Yifan Zhang,Haipeng Li,Kehu Yang,Miao Xin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出因果奖励世界模型（CRWM），通过离线多任务数据预训练显式建模奖励组件与物理变量间的因果关系，实现零样本、无需环境反馈的语言驱动奖励函数生成，提升效率、鲁棒性与跨任务泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的自动奖励设计方法依赖环境反馈迭代优化，效率低且易受因果虚假关联干扰，缺乏对奖励组件与物理变量间因果结构的建模。

Method: 提出因果奖励世界模型（CRWM），采用粗到细预训练策略，结合显式机制解耦与置信度感知软融合模块，在多任务交互数据上离线学习奖励组件与物理变量间的因果拓扑结构，形成可迁移的因果先验。

Result: 在复杂连续控制基准上，CRWM实现零样本奖励生成，无需反馈优化，显著降低奖励设计延迟，性能媲美或超越SOTA，并在未见任务和不同机器人平台上展现强泛化能力。

Conclusion: CRWM开创了自动奖励设计的白盒范式，将因果推理引入奖励合成，提升了奖励函数的可解释性、可靠性与通用性。

Abstract: Automated Reward Design (ARD) aims to replace manual reward engineering in reinforcement learning with language-driven reward function synthesis. However, existing approaches based on large language models (LLMs) remain inherently correlation-driven, relying on iterative environmental feedback to refine reward hypotheses for each specific task. This paradigm not only results in inefficient reasoning but also makes LLMs susceptible to semantically plausible yet causally spurious reward components, leading to ineffective optimization. To address these limitations, we propose the Causal Reward World Model (CRWM), which explicitly models the causal topological relationships between candidate reward components and task-targeted physical variables through offline pre-training on multi-task interaction data. Based on a coarse-to-fine pre-training strategy, we introduce a joint optimization module that integrates Explicit Mechanism Decoupling with Confidence-Aware Soft Fusion to refine coarse structural priors using micro-level trajectories, thereby constructing a robust and interpretable causal skeleton. During inference, LLMs leverage CRWM as a task-irrelevant causal prior to constrain the reward generation, enabling zero-shot reward function design. Our work opens up a new white-box paradigm for the ARD problem. Extensive experiments on complex continuous control benchmarks demonstrate that CRWM generates executable reward functions without feedback-driven reward refinement, significantly reducing the design latency for acquiring new robotic skills while matching or surpassing state-of-the-art performance, and further exhibits strong generalization capabilities across unseen tasks and diverse robotic embodiments.

</details>


### [1045] [IOI: Decoupling Kinematics and Physics for Interactive World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23296)
*Chengyu Bai,Peidong Jia,Tiecheng Guo,Yukai Wang,Rui Ma,Fangyuan Zhao,Chunkai Fan,Xiaobao Wei,Jintao Chen,Hao Wang,Ying Li,Xiaozhu Ju,Jian Tang,Shanghang Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种混合交互式世界模型IOI，结合解析运动学先验与学习的物理动力学，以提升具身智能体仿真中的运动精度、泛化能力与策略评估可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有纯数据驱动的交互世界模型难以保证精确的动作对齐和物理合理的视觉反馈，缺乏显式的结构约束。

Method: IOI将解析运动学先验（前向运动学计算动作序列生成的确定性轨迹）与学习的物理动力学相结合；通过多视角正交投影渲染轨迹，并设计多视角运动学聚合与注入模块，将几何线索注入视频生成器，实现几何一致性引导。

Result: 在RoboTwin基准上，IOI在运动学保真度、分布外（OOD）泛化和策略评估三方面均取得SOTA性能；具备强零样本泛化能力；策略评估结果与真实物理仿真器高度一致；基于IOI合成数据训练的策略在真实平台上表现媲美遥操作示范训练的策略。

Conclusion: IOI通过解耦确定性运动与随机物理交互，提升了世界模型的可控性、鲁棒性与实用性，为通用具身智能体的开发提供了可靠仿真基础。

Abstract: Developing generalist embodied agents requires interactive environments providing visually realistic feedback and accurate action-conditioned dynamics. Interactive world models address this by simulating such complex dynamics. However, purely data-driven methods struggle to ensure precise control alignment and physically plausible visual feedback due to a lack of explicit structural constraints. To address this, we propose IOI, a hybrid interactive world model integrating analytical kinematic priors with learned physical dynamics. Unlike data-driven approaches prone to spatiotemporal drift, IOI introduces explicit kinematic guidance, computing forward kinematics from action sequences for accurate motion trajectories. These trajectories are rendered into synchronized front, side, and top orthographic projections, eliminating the need for extrinsic camera calibration. A Multi-view Kinematic Aggregation and Injection module fuses these geometric cues and injects them into the video generator, providing geometry-consistent guidance. Conditioning video generation on these deterministic trajectories establishes a synergy between the analytical simulator and the world model. Decoupling deterministic motion into the kinematic prior frees the generator to model stochastic physical interactions. Experiments on the RoboTwin benchmark validate IOI across kinematic fidelity, out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization, and policy evaluation. IOI achieves state-of-the-art simulation performance and robust zero-shot generalization to unseen OOD tasks. Furthermore, IOI serves as a reliable policy evaluator, yielding success rates closely aligning with ground-truth physics simulators. On real-world platforms, policies trained on IOI-synthesized data match those trained on teleoperation demonstrations, solidifying its practical value for embodied policy learning.

</details>


### [1046] [From Pixels to Concepts: Growing Rich 3D Semantic Scene Graph Forests utilizing Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23312)
*David Oberacker,Meike Deitersen,Niklas Spielbauer,Tristan Schnell,Georg Heppner,Arne Roennau*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种利用基础模型（VLM和LLM）构建开放语义关系的3D场景图森林的方法，以提升机器人对复杂环境的功能性语义理解与任务执行能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D场景图方法受限于预定义的刚性关系类别，忽视因果关系、环境上下文等重要语义连接，难以满足机器人在真实复杂环境中进行功能性语义理解的需求。

Method: 首先用视觉语言模型（VLM）识别实例级概念节点和关系，再由大语言模型（LLM）进行推理扩展，生成更抽象的概念节点与关系；最终构建包含对象节点、概念节点及多层关系的3D场景图森林。

Result: 在uHumans2和ScanNet数据集上验证了生成关系的准确性与相关性，并在开放词汇物体检索任务中（含真实部署于Boston Dynamics Spot机器人）证明了该场景图森林的有效下游适用性。

Conclusion: 基于基础模型构建的语义更丰富、层次更深入的3D场景图森林，显著提升了机器人对场景的语义与环境理解能力，为具身智能提供了新范式。

Abstract: Operating in complex real-world environments requires robots to understand their surroundings on a functional semantic level. This demands a detailed multi-layer world model capturing the complex relations of its surroundings. Hierarchical 3D scene graphs address this challenge by integrating geometric, semantic, and relational data within a unified spatial framework. However, current 3D scene graph approaches often restrict themselves to rigid structures of pre-determined relationship classes, mostly neglecting important semantic connections, like causal connections or environmental contexts. This paper explores the potential of foundation models to build forests of 3D scene graphs with open semantic relationships to improve scene understanding and robotic task execution. We propose a method where instance-specific concept-nodes and relationships are first identified by a VLM and extended upon by a LLM, inferring broader, more abstract concept-nodes and relationships through reasoning. These object-nodes, concept-nodes, and relationships are then assembled into a forest of hierarchical 3D scene graphs, enhanced with concept-nodes to represent abstract concepts. Evaluations were conducted on the uHumans2 and ScanNet indoor dataset, validating the accuracy and relevance of the generated relationships. Downstream suitability of scene-graph forests for robotics applications is demonstrated in an open-vocabulary object-retrieval task utilizing both ScanNet data and a real-world indoor deployment using a Boston Dynamics Spot. This paper leverages foundation models to create more expressive, semantically deep 3D hierarchical scene graphs and demonstrates their potential to advance semantic and environmental understanding in robotics.

</details>


### [1047] [When Robots Rate Their Own Interactions: Engagement Validity and the Strangeness Failure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23339)
*Victor Lockwood,Hasan Mahmud,Mohammad Javad Khojasteh,Prabu David,Jamison Heard*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种‘反向评估’方法，让大语言模型（LLM）驱动的机器人从自身视角完成人类常用的HRI问卷，发现LLMs在‘参与度’维度上与人类评价有中到强一致性，但在‘舒适/怪异’维度上系统性反转（负相关），表明当前LLM缺乏感知内在情感状态的能力，需结合生理信号等多模态补充。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有HRI评估仅依赖人类问卷，忽视机器人视角；本文旨在探索LLM能否作为可靠的机器人自我评估工具，并检验其与人类评价的一致性边界。

Method: 采用‘反向评估’范式：让5种LLM及实体Nao机器人运行Claude Sonnet 4.5，完成HRI-CUES、Godspeed和RoSAS问卷，分别在25个交互录像（Study 1）和4次真实交互（Study 2）中进行；使用皮尔逊相关系数（r）和组内相关系数（ICC）评估一致性与重测信度。

Result: LLMs在满意度（r≤.65）和享受度（r≤.72）上与人类中至强相关，重测信度高（ICC≥.82）；但在舒适/怪异维度上显著负相关（r=−.44~−.67, p<.05），且该现象跨模型、合成对照及实体部署稳定复现。

Conclusion: 当前LLM无法准确评估涉及内在情感体验的构念（如怪异性），‘反向评估’需融合生理、行为等多模态信号以弥补纯文本推理的局限；该研究划定了LLM作为HRI评估工具的适用边界。

Abstract: Human-robot interaction (HRI) evaluation relies almost exclusively on human-completed questionnaires, leaving the robot's perspective unexamined. We propose an \textit{inverted evaluation}, in which LLM-powered robots complete the same standardized instruments from their own perspective, and test whether these ratings agree with human ground truth. In Study~1, five LLMs completed HRI-CUES, Godspeed, and RoSAS questionnaires for 25~interactions ($N = 1{,}522$ evaluations) from the HRI-CUES dataset. LLMs achieved moderate-to-strong agreement on engagement dimensions (satisfaction $r$ up to $.65$ and enjoyment $r$ up to $.72$) with excellent test-retest reliability (ICC $\geq .82$), but \textit{systematically inverted} the comfort/strangeness dimension ($r = -.44$ to $-.67$, all $p < .05$), conflating engagement with comfort. In Study~2, a Nao robot running Claude~Sonnet~4.5 replicated these patterns in live interactions ($N = 4$), including real-time turn-by-turn assessment. The strangeness failure persisted across five models, synthetic controls, and embodied deployment for two participants. We argue that current LLM-based robots lack access to the internal affective states needed to assess constructs like strangeness, and that inverted evaluation requires supplementary modalities (e.g., physiological signals, gaze, proxemics) to move beyond behavioral proxies. These findings establish boundary conditions for using LLMs as interaction evaluators in HRI.

</details>


### [1048] [A Relaxed Quadratic-Program-based Framework for Trajectory Tracking of Unicycle Robots with Singularity Avoidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23355)
*Hamza Tariq,Usman Ali,Adeel Akhtar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于二次规划（QP）的最优控制框架，解决了传统动态反馈线性化（DFL）在速度为零时出现奇异性的问题，适用于停-倒车等机动，并保证反馈律局部Lipschitz连续。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统DFL方法在机器人线速度为零时产生奇异性，无法支持停-倒车等典型机动，限制了其实际应用。

Method: 将DFL约束重构为含松弛变量的等式约束QP问题，引入可调参数以避免奇异配置，确保控制器对所有状态和参考信号均可行。

Result: 所提QP-DFL方法在ROS 2-Gazebo中TurtleBot3 Waffle平台上验证有效，能稳定实现轨迹跟踪，且反馈律具有局部Lipschitz连续性。

Conclusion: 该QP框架成功规避DFL奇异性，拓展了其在低速/零速场景下的适用性，为非完整移动机器人提供了更鲁棒、通用的跟踪控制方案。

Abstract: Dynamic feedback linearization (DFL) is a classical technique for trajectory tracking of unicycle-type mobile robots, but the resulting DFL-based controller becomes singular when the linear velocity vanishes, rendering standard DFL-based controllers unsuitable for stop-and-reverse maneuvers. This paper proposes a quadratic-program (QP)-based optimal control framework that avoids this singularity, while establishing local Lipschitz continuity of the resulting feedback law. Our approach reformulates the DFL constraints as an equality-constrained QP with a slack variable, ensuring feasibility for all states and reference signals, including at points where the robot's velocity vanishes. By introducing slack variables and tunable parameters, we demonstrate that the singular configuration can be avoided for a large class of reference trajectories. The effectiveness of the proposed approach for trajectory tracking is demonstrated through ROS 2-Gazebo simulations on a TurtleBot3 Waffle robot. The code is available at https://gradslab.github.io/DFL_QP_Unicycle/

</details>


### [1049] [TSD: A Physics-Inspired Trajectory Saliency Detector for Efficient Imitation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23371)
*Yiming Zhao,Gongrui Ma,Qingkai Li,Mingguo Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需训练、即插即用的轨迹显著性检测器（TSD），通过空间熵和向心加速度两个物理驱动指标识别操作任务中关键的精确与敏捷运动，从而压缩/扩展数据集，在减少25%数据量的同时保持甚至提升模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人模仿学习中高质量数据采集成本高、数据稀缺；而操作轨迹中存在大量不关键的过渡运动，需识别并利用其中关键的显著性运动以提升数据效率。

Method: 提出Trajectory Saliency Detector（TSD），基于物理意义明确的两个指标——空间熵（刻画精细操作）和向心加速度（检测敏捷机动）——无监督地识别轨迹显著性；进而用于数据集压缩与扩展。

Result: 在仿真与真实场景实验中，使用TSD压缩后的数据集训练模型，平均仅用75%的数据即达到或超越基线性能；验证了TSD在数据高效利用上的有效性。

Conclusion: TSD为构建信息密集、低成本的机器人学习数据集提供了可扩展且实用的新范式。

Abstract: For imitation learning in robotic manipulation, high data collection costs result in the scarcity of high quality data. In this paper, we leverage the inherent heterogeneity of trajectories to address this challenge. Based on our observations of manipulation tasks, we categorize motions into transitional, precise, and agile types, defining the latter two as trajectory saliency due to their criticality to task success in contrast to the prevalent but less relevant transitional motions. Therefore, we propose the Trajectory Saliency Detector (TSD), a training-free and plug-and-play framework to identify trajectory saliency. TSD employs two physically-grounded metrics: spatial entropy to capture fine-grained manipulation and centripetal acceleration to detect agile maneuvering. We further leverage TSD to develop a dataset compression method that reduces training costs and a dataset expansion strategy that improves data collection efficiency. Extensive experiments in both simulation and real-world settings demonstrate that models trained on TSD-condensed datasets achieve comparable or even superior performance with 25% less data on average. These results validate the effectiveness of our dataset compression and expansion strategies, thereby confirming the utility of TSD. Consequently, TSD offers a scalable and cost-effective pathway to synthesize information-dense datasets for efficient robot learning. Project page: https://trajectory-saliency-detector.github.io/trajectory-saliency-detector/

</details>


### [1050] [Flowing With Purpose: Latent Action Guided Flow Matching Policies For Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23420)
*Bruno Machado,Alexandre Chapin,Emmanuel Dellandrea,Liming Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Latent Action Guided Flow Matching (LAFM)，通过用自适应的、基于潜在动作建模的先验分布库替代传统流匹配中固定的各向同性高斯源分布，缓解了动作空间结构不匹配问题，显著提升机器人操作行为克隆性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有流匹配策略采用全局固定各向同性源分布，与机器人动作空间的碎片化、异方差特性严重不匹配，导致学习到的向量场高度纠缠，制约训练效率和策略性能。

Method: 提出LAFM框架：利用潜在动作模型将观测映射为离散运动基元，并据此动态选择专用的先验分布作为去噪初始化，实现对动作分布结构的自适应对齐。

Result: 在真实机器人部署中任务成功率提升23.4%，LIBERO-90基准上提升10.4%；且以更小模型规模超越大规模预训练视觉-语言-动作模型，达到SOTA性能。

Conclusion: LAFM通过结构感知的自适应先验设计，有效解决了流匹配在机器人行为克隆中的结构性瓶颈，为高效、高性能模仿学习提供了新范式。

Abstract: Flow matching has recently become a new standard for behavior cloning in robotic manipulation. However, state-of-the-art flow matching policies suffer from a systematic structural mismatch: they rely on a globally fixed isotropic source distribution despite the strongly fragmented and heteroscedastic structure of robotic action spaces. This agnostic initialization forces the model to learn highly entangled vector fields, bottlenecking training efficiency and limiting overall policy performance. To address this limitation, we introduce Latent Action Guided Flow Matching (LAFM), a novel framework that replaces the monolithic Gaussian with an adaptive library of learned prior distributions. By grounding these distributions using a latent action model, LAFM maps current observations to discrete motion primitives, selecting a specialized base distribution that provides an informed, structurally aligned initialization for the denoising process. This dynamic adaptivity naturally accommodates heteroscedasticity in human demonstrations and makes transport trajectories shorter and less entangled. Empirically, LAFM substantially outperforms standard flow matching formulations, increasing task success rates by 23.4% in real-world robotic deployments and by 10.4% on the LIBERO-90 benchmark. Furthermore, we demonstrate that LAFM achieves state-of-the-art results, surpassing massively pre-trained vision-language-action models while utilizing significantly smaller architectures.

</details>


### [1051] [DexTeleop-0: Force-Aware Bimanual Dexterous Teleoperation with Ego-Centric Perception towards Shared Autonomy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23431)
*Haichao Liu,Yuyao Jiang,Hyunsun Park,Yuanjiang Xue,Ziwei Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于触觉驱动的自适应策略，用于提升双臂灵巧机器人遥操作中的精细、双手灵巧操作能力，通过实时优化和触觉反馈缩小人机运动学映射差距，显著提高了任务成功率和执行效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统遥操作系统在接触丰富的精细操作任务中表现不佳，主要受限于人机具身差距导致的运动学映射不准，以及缺乏触觉与力反馈，致使高精度任务的数据采集效率极低。

Method: 提出触觉驱动的自适应策略，集成于双臂灵巧遥操作框架DexTeleop-0中；构建实时优化环路，利用触觉传感器估计接触点与指尖力分布，结合操作空间雅可比矩阵动态计算关节角度修正量，实现粗粒度人类意图到精确、力兼容机器人指令的转化。

Result: 在仿真与真实硬件平台上验证，相比基线方法，在鲁棒抓取、抗扰操作及复杂灵巧任务中均取得更高任务成功率与执行效率。

Conclusion: 触觉驱动的自适应策略有效弥合了遥操作中的具身差距，提升了双臂灵巧操作的精度、鲁棒性与实用性，为高精度机器人操作提供了新范式。

Abstract: Fine-grained, bimanual dexterous manipulation remains a foundational challenge in robotics. Traditional teleoperation systems often fail in contact-rich tasks because embodiment gaps hinder accurate kinematic mapping, while tactile and force feedback remain absent. Consequently, data collection efficiency for high-precision tasks remains prohibitively low. To address these limitations, we propose a tactile-driven adaptation strategy designed to enable fine-grained manipulation on top of teleoperation pipelines. Instantiated within our bimanual dexterous framework, DexTeleop-0, this strategy introduces a real-time optimization loop that bridges the embodiment gap by translating coarse human tracking intents into precise, force-compliant robotic commands with tactile sensing. By estimating accurate contact points and leveraging a tactile-enabled fingertip force-sensing profile, the system dynamically computes localized corrections using the operational space Jacobian with respect to joint angle updates. We rigorously evaluate this tactile-driven adaptation strategy across both simulated environments and real-world hardware. Compared with representative baselines, the proposed method consistently achieves higher task success rates and improved execution efficiency in robust grasping, disturbance-resilient manipulation, and complex dexterous tasks.

</details>


### [1052] [SkyJEPA: Learning Long-Horizon World Models for Zero-Shot Sim-to-Real Control of Quadrotors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23444)
*Pratyaksh Rao,Wancong Zhang,Randall Balestriero,Yann LeCun,Giuseppe Loianno*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于联合嵌入预测架构（JEPA）的实时四旋翼控制方法，通过物理启发的探针机制实现可解释的长时域预测，并结合采样型最优控制与自动化数据生成流程，在仿真到真实环境零样本迁移和多种工况下展现出强泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经网络动力学模型在长时域预测中因自回归误差累积而性能下降；JEPA虽具潜力，但此前多用于运动学规划，缺乏在高频控制层面的应用探索。

Method: 提出JEPA风格的潜空间动力学模型，设计物理启发的冻结潜变量映射探针以实现可解释状态预测；结合采样型最优控制器用于嵌入式实时控制；构建自动化结构化数据生成管道以减少对真实世界数据的依赖。

Result: 在开环及户外闭环实验中验证了高精度预测能力、鲁棒的零样本仿真到真实迁移效果，以及在不同运行条件下的强泛化性。

Conclusion: 该JEPA-style方法为敏捷空中机器人提供了高效、可靠且可解释的长时域建模与实时控制新范式。

Abstract: Accurate dynamics models are critical for informed decision-making in robotic systems, particularly for agile aerial vehicles operating under uncertainty. Neural network dynamics models are attractive for capturing complex nonlinear effects, but existing predictive approaches struggle with long-horizon forecasting because their autoregressive rollout mechanism amplifies errors over time. Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) offer a compelling alternative by modeling dynamics in latent space, yet prior JEPA-style methods for robot navigation have been studied primarily for kinematic-level planning, with limited investigation in high-frequency control. In this work, we introduce the JEPA-style model for real-time quadrotor control. The proposed approach combines a latent dynamics model with a novel physics-inspired prober that maps frozen latents to interpretable state, enabling physically grounded long-horizon prediction. Additionally, we combine the learned model with a sampling-based optimal control solution to take advantage of its predictive capabilities for real-time control on embedded hardware. Finally, to reduce the dependence on expensive and unsafe real-world data collection, we develop a structured pipeline for automated dataset generation. Extensive open-loop and outdoor closed-loop experiments demonstrate accurate prediction, robust zero-shot sim-to-real transfer, and strong generalization across diverse operating conditions.

</details>


### [1053] [DVL-DeepONet: A Physics-Guided Operator Learning for Resilient Underwater Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23502)
*Arup Kumar Sahoo,Itzik Klein*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为DVL-DeepONet的物理引导深度神经算子框架，用于在DVL信号缺失或噪声干扰等恶劣条件下，提升AUV的水下导航鲁棒性与精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DVL在实际任务中常因障碍物、海底反射或环境干扰导致测量不完整或噪声大；部分低成本平台甚至无惯性传感器，使得速度估计困难，影响导航性能。

Method: 提出DVL-DeepONet，一种物理引导的深度神经算子，通过学习从时序惯性/DVL观测到速度向量的非线性映射，并引入DVL物理一致性约束，支持三种场景：(i) 惯性/DVL耦合下的抗噪估计，(ii) 纯DVL学习，(iii) DVL波束测量恢复。

Result: 在累计约10,000米的真实AUV实验中验证，相比基线模型和学习方法，速度估计精度提升40%。

Conclusion: DVL-DeepONet显著提升了AUV在传感退化条件下的速度估计鲁棒性与精度，为低成本、高可靠性水下导航提供了新范式。

Abstract: Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) rely heavily on the fusion of inertial sensors and Doppler velocity logs (DVLs) for navigation. In standard autonomous navigation systems, the DVL measures four beam velocities, thereby enabling the estimation of the AUV velocity vector. However, during real-world missions, the DVL may receive noisy or incomplete beam measurements due to marine obstacles, seabed reflections, or environmental disturbances. Furthermore, some low-cost underwater platforms operate without inertial sensors to reduce system complexity and cost. In such cases, reliable estimation of the AUV velocity vector in real-world missing beam scenarios becomes challenging, leading to degraded navigation solutions. To circumvent these challenges and enable resilient underwater navigation, we propose DVL-DeepONet, a physics-guided deep neural operator framework along with three variants. The proposed models are designed to estimate DVL-based velocity information under multiple operational scenarios, including (i) noise-resilient estimation in coupled inertial/DVL measurements, (ii) DVL-only learning, and (iii) beam measurement recovery. By learning a nonlinear operator that maps temporal inertial/DVL observations directly to vehicle velocity while enforcing DVL measurement physics through a consistency constraint, the proposed approach enables robust velocity estimation even under degraded sensing conditions. The proposed framework is validated using real-world AUV experiments, comprising a cumulative path length of approximately 10,000 m. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed DVL-DeepONet architectures outperform baseline model-based approaches and learning-based algorithms by 40%.

</details>


### [1054] [BiliVLA: Scene-Aware Vision-Language-Action Model with Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Biliary Endoscopic Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23531)
*Jinsong Lin,Chi kit Ng,Zhiyong Xiong,Zikang Pan,Yihan Hu,Tabassum Tamima,Ziyi Hao,Eddie Cheung,Jiewen Lai,Huxin Gao,Hongliang Ren*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出BiliVLA，一种面向胆道内镜导航的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）框架，通过结合语义定位、场景感知学习与奖励引导优化，实现高精度、高成功率的自主内镜导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人系统和视觉辅助技术在解剖结构变异大、关键视觉伪影多时性能下降，难以实现可靠自主插管。

Method: 提出BiliVLA框架，将胆道内镜导航建模为指令条件下的视动学习问题；引入场景感知监督与安全感知恢复监督，并采用两阶段训练（接地增强监督微调+SFT + 组相对策略优化GRPO）。

Result: 在三个ERCP子任务的实物仿体实验中，平均动作精度达91.96%，整体成功率84.85%。

Conclusion: 语义定位、场景感知学习与reward-guided优化的融合可提升感知-动作对齐能力，支持鲁棒的自主内镜导航。

Abstract: Endoscopic retrograde cholangiopancreatography (ERCP) demands precise endoscopic navigation and stable biliary cannulation within a narrow monocular field characterized by specular reflections, partial occlusions, and frequent tissue contact. Although recent robotic systems and vision-based assistance techniques improve operator ergonomics and provide perceptual cues, their performance degrades under pronounced anatomical variability and safety-critical visual artifacts, which hinders reliable autonomy in cannulation-grade procedures. Here, we present BiliVLA, a scene-aware Vision-Language-Action (VLA) framework that formulates biliary endoscopic navigation as an instruction-conditioned visuomotor learning problem. Given an endoscopic observation and a stage-specific language instruction, BiliVLA jointly predicts the target category, a grounded bounding box, and a discrete three degrees of freedom (DoF) motor command for a continuum endoscope. The proposed framework incorporates scene-aware supervision to enhance semantic target consistency and safety-aware recovery supervision to induce conservative retreat behaviors under luminal wall contact. A key component of BiliVLA is a two-stage training paradigm that combines grounding-enhanced supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), which significantly improves action reliability and decision consistency during closed-loop navigation. Across three ERCP subtasks, BiliVLA achieves an average action precision of 91.96\% and an overall success rate (SR) of 84.85\% in real-world phantom experiments. These results indicate that integrating semantic grounding, scene-aware learning, and reward-guided optimization improves perception-action alignment and enables robust autonomous endoscopic navigation.

</details>


### [1055] [HoloAgent-0: A Unified Embodied Agent Framework with 3D Spatial Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23565)
*Xiaolin Zhou,Liu Liu,Tingyang Xiao,Wei Feng,Fa Fu,Xinrui Meng,Xinjie Wang,Jialiang Han,Boyang Yu,Yun Du,Wei Sui,Zhizhong Su*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出HoloAgent-0，一个面向真实机器人部署的统一具身智能体框架，通过Embodied AgentOS、3D空间记忆和具身技能三层耦合架构，实现语言指令到物理动作的闭环执行，并在真实硬件上验证了其空间记忆、长时序导航与闭环执行能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将大语言模型代理的执行循环扩展至物理机器人面临连续性、具身依赖性、不确定性与安全性约束等挑战，现有具身AI系统多为专用模块或松耦合决策环，缺乏统一框架。

Method: 提出HoloAgent-0框架，包含三层：Embodied AgentOS（负责指令解析、技能图生成、资源调度与运行时反馈驱动的重规划）、3D空间记忆（实现物理世界具身表征）、具身技能库（封装机器人动作能力）。

Result: 在真实机器人硬件上成功部署，验证了空间记忆构建、长时序导航、运动生成、物体搜索、跨机器人协同及移动操作等任务的闭环执行能力。

Conclusion: HoloAgent-0提供了一种可扩展、安全且闭环的具身智能体架构，推动大语言模型代理从数字环境向真实物理世界可靠迁移。

Abstract: LLM agents follow a practical execution loop in digital environments: they reason over structured states, invoke tools, inspect feedback, and revise actions. Extending this loop to physical robots is difficult because physical execution is continuous, embodiment-dependent, uncertain, and constrained by safety. Existing embodied-AI systems have advanced manipulation, spatial understanding, navigation, and humanoid control, but these capabilities often remain specialized modules or loosely coupled decision loops. In this work, we introduce HoloAgent-0, a unified embodied agent framework for real-world robot deployment. Embodied AgentOS converts language instructions into executable skill graphs, schedules robot resources, monitors execution, and triggers clarification or re-planning from runtime feedback. HoloAgent-0 organizes heterogeneous robot models and controllers through three coupled layers: Embodied AgentOS for closed-loop execution, 3D spatial memory for physical world grounding, and embodied skills for robot action. We deploy HoloAgent-0 on real hardware and evaluate its spatial memory, long-horizon navigation, and closed-loop execution across motion generation, object search, cross-robot coordination, and mobile manipulation.

</details>


### [1056] [A Generative Model for Closed-Loop Microsimulation of Signalized Intersections](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23588)
*Yash Ranjan,Rahul Sengupta,Anand Rangarajan,Sanjay Ranka*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Enactor，一种以车辆为中心的生成式模型，用于信号交叉口的闭环微观交通仿真。该模型通过极坐标编码动态参与者和车道线，并利用具有空间与时间注意力机制的Transformer预测车辆下一步运动，同时采用闭环课程学习进行训练，在仿真和真实数据中均展现出优于现有基线的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有交通微观仿真器依赖手工设计的行为模型，虽能复现宏观流量但无法捕捉车辆在信号交叉口的异质交互；而学习型轨迹预测器虽能捕获更丰富的交互，却存在短时域、闭环运行不稳定等问题。

Method: 提出Enactor模型：以车辆为焦点，行人仅作为上下文；将动态参与者和车道多边形以交叉口中心为参考系编码为极坐标；使用分离空间与时间注意力的Transformer预测每个参与者的下一时刻运动分布（s, α）；训练采用闭环课程学习策略。

Result: 在4000秒仿真测试中，Enactor显著优于近期Transformer基线：旅行时间KL散度低一个数量级以上，速度KL散度约低5倍（Site 1），闯红灯行为减少超一个数量级；消融实验表明‘前车后保险杠’特征对交叉口安全指标影响最大；在鱼眼相机真实轨迹预测任务中，Enactor在所有预测时域均优于匀速基线。

Conclusion: Enactor实现了高保真、稳定、闭环的交叉口微观仿真，兼顾交互建模能力与实际部署鲁棒性，为基于学习的交通仿真提供了新范式。

Abstract: Traffic microsimulators rely on hand-crafted behavior models that reproduce aggregate flow but miss the heterogeneous interactions between vehicles at signalized intersections. Learned trajectory predictors capture richer interactions but are short-horizon and tend to be unstable when run in closed loop. We present Enactor, an actor-centric generative model for closed-loop intersection microsimulation. The model focuses on vehicles; pedestrians are included as context that can influence vehicle decisions but not predicted. Dynamic actors and lane polylines are encoded in polar coordinates referenced to the intersection center. A transformer with separate spatial and temporal attention blocks predicts a distribution over each actor's next-step motion ($s$, $α$). Training uses a closed-loop curriculum so the model is exposed to its own predictions. We evaluate Enactor in two regimes. In a 4000-second simulation-in-the-loop test at two intersection geometries, Enactor controls every dynamic vehicle against a continuously refreshing actor set rather than the fixed cohort that learned trajectory predictors are usually evaluated against. It recovers the SUMO data generator's speed and travel-time distributions with KL divergence over an order of magnitude lower than a recent transformer baseline on travel time, and substantially lower on speed (roughly $5\times$ lower at Site 1), and reduces red-light violations relative to the same baseline by more than an order of magnitude. An ablation isolates the leader rear-bumper feature as the change with the largest effect on intersection-aware safety metrics. We also evaluate on real-world field data and apply the same architecture to naturalistic vehicle trajectories from a fish-eye camera at a signalized intersection and evaluate it on multi-horizon predictive tasks. Enactor outperforms a constant-velocity baseline at every horizon evaluated.

</details>


### [1057] [KEMO: Event-Driven Keyframe Memory for Long-Horizon Robot Manipulation with VLA Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23589)
*Yihan Zeng,Minghao Ye,Yiyuan Chen,Yide Shentu,Philipp Wu,Zike Yan,Zhongyu Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出KEMO，一种轻量级插件式记忆框架，通过结合机器人运动学与视觉过滤自动选择关键帧，以提升长时程机器人操作任务的成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长时程机器人操作中，相似观测可能出现在不同执行阶段，而正确动作依赖于已完成的操作，现有记忆增强方法存在历史压缩或仅依赖近期上下文的问题。

Method: KEMO利用机器人运动学与视觉过滤检测任务相关状态变化事件，将对应关键帧编码为紧凑有序的记忆token，并通过交叉注意力与门控残差融合集成到当前视觉特征中；同时在关键转换附近设置高权重训练样本。

Result: 在多个真实双臂操作任务上，KEMO相较无记忆基线（如π₀.₅）使任务成功率提升23.6%，阶段完成率提升34.1%；消融实验证明事件驱动的关键帧选择、门控融合及关键帧对齐的损失加权均有效。

Conclusion: KEMO通过事件驱动的关键帧记忆机制，显著提升了VLA策略在长时程复杂操作任务中的性能，兼具轻量性与有效性。

Abstract: Long-horizon robot manipulation remains challenging because similar observations may occur at different execution stages, while the appropriate action depends on previously completed operations. Memory can address this ambiguity by enabling policies to infer task progress from execution history. However, existing memory-augmented approaches often either retain dense histories that require compression or rely primarily on recent context that may discard earlier task-relevant events. In this work, we propose propose KEMO, a lightweight plug-in memory framework that automatically selectively preserves keyframes associated with task-relevant state changes for VLA policies. KEMO combines robot kinematics with visual filtering to detect events, encodes the selected keyframes as compact temporally ordered memory tokens, and integrates them with current visual features through cross-attention and gated residual fusion for VLA training. The detected events also define higher-weight training samples near critical transitions. We evaluate KEMO on various real-world dual-arm manipulation tasks spanning 2 to 6 scored subtasks, and trajectory length ranging from 830 steps to 2846 execution steps (durations from 28 to 95 seconds). Compared with the memory-free baseline (e.g., $π_{0.5}$), KEMO improves aggregate Task Success Rate by 23.6\% and Stage Completion Rate by 34.1\%. Ablations show that event-driven keyframe selection outperforms uniform sampling and recent-frame retention, while the proposed gated fusion and keyframe-aligned loss weighting provide complementary gains.

</details>


### [1058] [Real-Time Multimodal Activity-Aware Error Detection in Robot-Assisted Surgery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23593)
*Seyed Hamid Reza Roodabeh,Zongyu Li,Homa Alemzadeh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用视频、运动学数据和文本提示的多模态执行错误检测框架，通过活动提示和活动感知视觉嵌入提升手术错误识别精度，在JIGSAWS和SAR-RARP50数据集上F1分数分别提升5%和16.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于视频的手术执行错误检测方法忽略了手术流程中细粒度的活动上下文和错误类型层级结构，且未充分利用多模态信息。

Method: 构建统一多模态框架，融合视频、运动学数据和描述性文本提示；引入活动提示机制整合手势级活动、器械-物体交互及错误定义；采用在手术活动标签上预训练的视觉编码器生成活动感知视觉嵌入，并对比分析对比语言-图像嵌入与传统图像嵌入的效果。

Result: 在JIGSAWS和SAR-RARP50数据集上F1分数分别较当前最优基线提升5%和16.6%。

Conclusion: 结合精心设计的文本提示与多模态数据能显著提升手术执行错误检测的准确性，活动感知嵌入和多模态融合是关键。

Abstract: Robot-assisted minimally invasive surgery improves surgical precision but introduces complexity, making technical error detection essential for ensuring patient safety. Current executional error detection methods using video data often overlook fine-grained contextual descriptions of activities and error types within the hierarchical structure of surgical procedures. They also under-utilize complementary multimodal information. We propose a unified framework for executional error detection that leverages multimodal input, including video, kinematics, and descriptive textual prompts. Through activity prompting, we integrate descriptive language in gesture-level activities, instrument-object interactions, and error definitions. We also introduce activity-aware visual embeddings derived from vision encoders pretrained on surgical activity labels to compare the effectiveness of contrastive language-image embeddings with traditional image-based embeddings for error detection. By seamlessly integrating kinematic data with video and textual modalities, our framework significantly improves error detection performance. Achieving up to 5\% and 16.6\% F1 score improvements over state-of-the-art baselines on the JIGSAWS and SAR-RARP50 datasets, respectively, we demonstrate the value of combining curated textual prompts with multimodal data for accurate error detection.

</details>


### [1059] [Autonomous Subsea Cable Search and Tracking with Graph-Optimised Priors and Visual Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23606)
*Ibrahim Fadhil Djauhari,Adrian Bodenmann,Samuel Simmons,Cailei Liang,David White,Susan Gourvenec,Tom Bennetts,Darryl Newborough,Blair Thornton*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用不确定先验路由图、结合图优化与物理驱动的悬链线模型进行水下光缆搜索与跟踪的新方法，并在AUV实测中验证了其鲁棒性与有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全球海底光缆易受自然灾害和人为活动破坏，而现有AUV巡检面临路由图不准、光缆细小且部分掩埋导致连续跟踪困难的问题。

Method: 提出基于图优化的动态路由更新方法，融合视觉观测与物理悬链线模型约束搜索空间；采用机载实时半监督分类器进行光缆检测，并支持跟踪丢失后的高效恢复。

Result: 在Smarty200 AUV实地试验中，系统在初始路由图存在故意误差下仍成功定位光缆，更新路由以匹配观测，并完成120米测试段中59%的视觉巡检，且能有效恢复跟踪。

Conclusion: 该方法显著提升了AUV对不确定环境下海底光缆的自主搜索与鲁棒跟踪能力，为水下基础设施巡检提供了实用化新范式。

Abstract: Global communications rely on subsea cable infrastructure that remains vulnerable to damage from natural hazards and human activity. Autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) offer an efficient means to inspect long sections of exposed cable, but uncertainty in cable route maps, small cable diameters and partial burial makes continuous tracking a challenge. This paper presents a novel cable search and tracking method that leverages uncertain prior cable route maps. Graph-based optimisation continuously update the cable route to remain consistent with visual observations. Route uncertainty is constrained as a function of distance from observations using physics-based catenary models that account for cable parameters (i.e., lay depth, diameter, and density), bounding the search space to physically feasible regions and improving search efficiency. Cable detection is performed using a semi-supervised classifier running in real-time on-board a camera-equipped AUV. These detections both update the graph-based optimisation and enable visual cable tracking. When tracking is lost due to misclassification, burial or imperfect control, the bounded search space enables efficient recovery. The approach was demonstrated in field trials using the University of Southampton's Smarty200 AUV. The system successfully located the cable despite deliberate errors in it initial cable route map, updating this to be consistent with observations and using visual tracking to inspect up to 59% of a 120m test cable, with successful recovered after tracking loss.

</details>


### [1060] [RECALL: Recovery Experience Collection for Active Lifelong Learning in Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23617)
*Ulas Berk Karli,Tesca Fitzgerald*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的主动式持续学习范式，利用不确定性引导的数据采集提升微调效率，但发现仅使用恢复性数据会导致灾难性遗忘；通过对比重放机制和弹性权重固化等持续学习方法，揭示了在大型机器人策略中融合目标新数据时的可塑性与稳定性权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型依赖被动模仿学习进行微调，需机器人先失败才收集数据，缺乏对关键状态的监督指导，且浪费人类演示者在已掌握任务段上的精力。

Method: 提出基于不确定性的主动、持续学习范式，结合不确定性引导的数据采集，并评估重放数据混合与弹性权重固化等持续学习技术以缓解灾难性遗忘。

Result: 不确定性引导的恢复性数据采集显著提升微调效率，但单独使用该类数据导致灾难性遗忘；重放机制与弹性权重固化各有优劣，在可塑性与知识保留间存在权衡。

Conclusion: 主动持续学习可有效提升VLA模型适应效率，但如何在引入目标新数据的同时保持既有能力仍是开放挑战。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are commonly fine-tuned through passive imitation learning, where additional demonstrations are collected for tasks where the policy performs poorly. This approach incurs several downsides: it requires the robot to fail before data collection is triggered, provides little guidance about which states require supervision, and wastes demonstrator effort on redundant parts of the task where the policy already performs well. In this paper, we propose an active, continual learning paradigm for VLAs. We demonstrate that active, uncertainty-guided data collection leads to more efficient fine-tuning than when using passively-collected demonstrations. However, we also find that fine-tuning only on actively-collected recovery data leads to catastrophic forgetting. We evaluate techniques for continual learning, including replay-based data mixing and elastic weight consolidation, and identify tradeoffs between plasticity to uncertainty-guided recovery data and retention of previously learned behaviors. Overall, our work contributes an empirical study of active continual learning for autoregressive VLAs, establishing that uncertainty-guided recovery demonstrations can improve adaptation efficiency while also revealing open challenges when targeted new data is incorporated into large robot policies.

</details>


### [1061] [dVLA-RL: Reinforcement Learning over Denoising Trajectories for Discrete Diffusion Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23623)
*Yuhao Wu,Yitian Liu,Weijie Shen,Mishuo Han,Wenjie Xu,Haotian Liang,Zhongshan Liu,Yinan Mao,Lei Xu,Xinping Guan,Ru Ying,Ran Zheng,Wei Sui,Xiaokang Yang,Wenbo Ding,Yao Mu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出dVLA-RL方法，将离散扩散型视觉-语言-动作（dVLA）模型的强化学习目标从难以计算的最终动作边际概率转向生成路径的联合概率，通过将去噪过程建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），实现轨迹级优化，并引入统一的步数调度策略以适配多任务复杂度，在LIBERO和RoboTwin 2.0上取得显著性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散扩散VLA（dVLA）模型仅采用监督微调（SFT），未探索强化学习（RL）对策略的进一步优化；而其最终动作的边际概率不可行，阻碍了RL直接应用。

Method: 提出dVLA-RL：将dVLA的去噪过程建模为MDP，以生成路径的联合概率（即各步转移概率乘积）替代不可行的边际动作概率作为RL优化目标；并设计统一的步数调度机制，根据任务复杂度动态调整去噪步数。

Result: 在LIBERO上达到99.7%的成功率；在RoboTwin 2.0上相较SFT基线提升30.6%，且性能媲美强World-Action Model基线。

Conclusion: 轨迹级RL目标与自适应步数调度使dVLA能有效利用强化学习提升泛化与效率，为离散VLA模型的策略优化开辟新路径。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have established a powerful paradigm for generalist robotic manipulation by grounding control into the semantic reasoning of VLMs. Prevailing architectures typically model actions continuously via diffusion or flow processes, or discretely through either autoregressive generation or parallel decoding. Recently, Discrete Diffusion VLAs (dVLAs) have emerged as a distinct alternative, unifying vision, language, and action into a single discrete token space via masked generative modeling. While combining iterative refinement with unified representations, its training has thus far been restricted to Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), leaving the potential of Reinforcement Learning (RL) for further policy refinement largely unexplored. A fundamental challenge in RL for dVLAs is that the marginal probability of the final action generated by dVLAs remains intractable. To solve this problem, we propose \textbf{dVLA-RL}, shifting the learning objective from the marginal action probability to the joint probability of the sampled generation path. Specifically, by modeling the denoising process as a Markov Decision Process (MDP), we mathematically formulate this path probability as a product of step-wise transitions. This trajectory-level objective provides a unified formulation that natively accommodates variable denoising steps. Leveraging this intrinsic fexibility, we introduce a unified step scheduling approach for complex multi-task learning, tailoring denoising steps to specific task complexities to maximize both success rates and computational effciency. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our approach achieves a success rate of \textbf{99.7\%} on LIBERO. Furthermore, it establishes strong VLA-based results on RoboTwin 2.0 by delivering a \textbf{30.6\%} improvement over the SFT baseline, remaining competitive with strong World-Action Model baselines.

</details>


### [1062] [Learning to See While Learning to Act: Diffusion Models for Active Perception in Robot Imitation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23625)
*Kuancheng Wang,Vaibhav Saxena,Shuo Cheng,Yotto Koga,Danfei Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出See2Act，一种在部分可观测环境下（如物体被遮挡）进行模仿学习的新方法，通过将动作预测与主动视角推理耦合，实现搜索与操作的联合优化，并在仿真和真实世界中验证了其鲁棒性与泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模仿学习方法通常假设完全可观测，但在实际场景中物体常被遮挡，机器人需同时决定‘看哪里’和‘做什么’，而从有限示范中学习这种耦合行为仍具挑战性。

Method: 提出See2Act方法，将动作去噪与视角精炼耦合，在测试时基于主动推断的视角序列预测动作；训练时使用锚定于关键帧动作的相机位姿，隐式学习最优观测位置。

Result: 在Ravens和RLBench仿真环境中显著提升性能（最高+34%），并在真实世界中通过数字孪生收集50个示范，实现零样本sim-to-real迁移，成功完成深度图像驱动的抓取放置任务。

Conclusion: Learned viewpoint reasoning enables robust robotic manipulation under partial observability, bridging the gap between imitation learning and active perception.

Abstract: Most imitation learning methods assume full observability in table-top settings. In practice, objects are often occluded, requiring robots to both search and act, and learning this coupled behavior from limited demonstrations remains challenging. We propose See2Act, an imitation learning approach that conditions action prediction on a sequence of actively-inferred viewpoints at test time, by coupling action denoising with viewpoint refinement. The policy is trained using camera poses anchored to keyframe actions from offline demonstrations, enabling implicit learning of where to see, while learning how to act. We empirically demonstrate that in Ravens the policy recovers informative viewpoints under severe occlusions, and on RLBench tasks it improves performance by up to 34% over prior methods. In the real world, we collect 50 demonstrations in a digital twin and achieve zero-shot sim-to-real transfer on pick-and-place tasks using depth observations. The policy handles significant occlusions, showing that learned viewpoint reasoning enables robust manipulation under partial observability.

</details>


### [1063] [Flatness Preserves Instruction Following in Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23641)
*Haochen Zhang,Yonatan Bisk*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出通过保持平坦性优化（flatness-preserving optimization）来缓解视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在有限机器人数据微调中出现的“指令盲”问题，仅用sharpness-aware minimization（SAM）即可在多个仿真与真实世界基准上将指令遵循能力提升超60%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLA模型在下游有限机器人数据微调时易退化预训练的视觉-语言表征，导致忽略语言指令、依赖视觉捷径，即‘指令盲’；作者认为这是因标准微调在稀疏数据下产生高曲率、尖锐损失极小值所致。

Method: 在相同微调数据上引入sharpness-aware minimization（SAM）进行平坦性保持优化，不改变模型结构、不增加数据、不重新预训练。

Result: 在多个仿真和真实世界基准上，指令遵循性能提升超60%；分析了选择性尖锐度的影响，并验证该方法与现有引导技术互补。

Conclusion: 保持损失景观平坦性是提升VLA模型泛化性与指令鲁棒性的有效途径，SAM作为一种简单即插即用策略，显著缓解指令盲问题。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have the potential for open-world generalization by leveraging pretrained vision-language representations, yet downstream finetuning on limited robot data often degrades these representations, leading to brittle policies that ignore language instructions in favor of visual shortcuts, a failure mode we term instruction blindness. We hypothesize that standard finetuning with limited data applies gradients to a sparse set of points, which manifests as a sharp loss landscape with high-curvature minima. We propose to address this directly through flatness-preserving optimization while finetuning on the exact same data, where learning a flatter landscape results in a model more robust to perturbations in the weight space. Specifically, we demonstrate that simply applying sharpness-aware minimization during VLA finetuning significantly improves instruction following by over 60% across multiple simulation and real-world benchmarks without additional data, architectural modification, or retraining. We further analyze the effect of selective sharpness, quantify its effects, and show that our approach is complementary to existing guidance techniques. Project page can be found at https://haochenz11.github.io/papers/flatness-vla/.

</details>


### [1064] [A Reduced Order Model for Emergent Mechanics in Woven Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23658)
*Anvay A. Pradhan,Evgueni T. Filipov,Talia Y. Moore*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于描述编织结构力学行为的降阶模型，通过节点与四个物理可解释的刚度元件（轴向变形、面内解卷曲、织物间剪切和摩擦滑移）捕捉其几何驱动机制，并在实验数据上验证了其准确性，展现出对泊松效应、拉出行为、撕裂应力局域化及各向异性编程等现象的建模能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型要么过度均质化编织结构的相互作用，要么因计算成本过高而难以应用，亟需一种兼顾物理可解释性与计算效率的建模方法。

Method: 构建基于节点和四个物理刚度元件的降阶模型；通过单元胞特征值分析验证模式对应性；利用三点弯曲和剪切实验数据标定参数。

Result: 模型在不同织物宽度和间距下误差控制在5%以内；成功再现了 crimp interchange 引起的泊松响应、渐进式拉出力衰减、三种撕裂构型下的应力局域化及空间梯度刚度诱导的可编程各向异性。

Conclusion: 该模型兼具物理透明性与计算高效性，为可编程编织架构材料的设计与分析提供了实用工具。

Abstract: Woven structures exhibit rich mechanical behaviors including anisotropic stiffness, shear-induced locking, and crimp interchange that emerge purely from the geometric arrangement of individual weavers rather than from constituent material properties. Existing models either homogenize these interactions or resolve them at prohibitive computational cost. We introduce a reduced-order model that bridges this gap by representing individual weaver interactions through a system of nodes and four physically interpretable stiffness elements capturing axial deformation, in-plane uncrimping, inter-weaver shear, and frictional slip. Eigenvalue analysis of the unit cell confirms that the lowest-energy deformation modes correspond directly to known weave-specific phenomena, and that each element is necessary for a complete kinematic and mechanistic description. Element stiffness parameters are calibrated against empirical three-point bending and shear data, achieving agreement within 5% across varied weaver widths and spacings. The validated model is then applied to demonstrate capabilities beyond the reach of continuum approaches including: the emergent Poisson's response arising from crimp interchange, stepwise force reduction during progressive weaver pullout, stress localization under three distinct tearing configurations, and programmable mechanical anisotropy through spatially graded weaver stiffness. The physical transparency and computational efficiency of the framework position it as a practical tool for the analysis and design of woven architected materials with programmable mechanical response.

</details>


### [1065] [CoorDex: Coordinating Body and Hand Priors for Continuous Dexterous Humanoid Loco-Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23680)
*Sikai Li,Shuning Li,Zhenyu Wei,Yunchao Yao,Chenran Li,Mingyu Ding*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出CoorDex学习框架，将高维全身与灵巧手控制转化为协调的潜在残差控制，实现人形机器人边走边进行高自由度灵巧操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法常将人形机器人运动-操作简化为停-走-停模式，并依赖低自由度末端执行器，难以实现动态、高自由度的协调操作。

Method: CoorDex基于仿真中全身与手部演示，训练特权运动跟踪教师模型，蒸馏为本体感知条件下的潜在先验，并将其作为下游残差强化学习的动作空间；通过共享任务上下文与分离的躯干-手部残差头实现协调控制。

Result: 在Unitree G1人形机器人搭载20自由度WUJI灵巧手上，成功实现边走边开冰箱门、非停顿抓取携带水瓶、立方体抓取旋转等任务；消融实验证明其潜在先验接口与协调残差结构对训练高维接触密集型任务至关重要。

Conclusion: CoorDex有效解决了高自由度人形机器人动态灵巧操作的控制难题，为具身智能体实现自然、鲁棒的全身协调操作提供了新范式。

Abstract: Humanoid loco-manipulation is often simplified into a stop-and-go process: walking to an object, stopping to manipulate it, and then resuming locomotion. It also commonly relies on low degree-of-freedom (DoF) end effectors that behave like an open-close grasp primitive. We introduce CoorDex, a learning pipeline that converts high-dimensional body and dexterous hand control into coordinated latent residual control, enabling high-DoF dexterous loco-manipulation on the move. Starting from simulated whole-body and hand demonstrations, CoorDex trains privileged motion tracking teachers for the humanoid body and dexterous hand, distills them into proprioception-conditioned latent priors, and uses the frozen priors as the action space for downstream residual reinforcement learning. A coordinated latent residual policy composes these priors through shared task context and separate body-hand residual heads, preserving natural whole-body motion while improving finger-level contact reliability. CoorDex enables a Unitree G1 humanoid with a 20-DoF WUJI hand to execute dexterous manipulation while in motion, including non-stop bottle grasping and carrying, fridge door opening on the move, and cube pick-and-turn. Ablations on the walk-grasp-carry task show that joint-space PPO, joint-space hand control, and monolithic latent prediction all fail under the same reward budget, while the latent-prior interface and coordinated residual structure make high-dimensional contact-rich loco-manipulation trainable. Project Page: https://skevinci.github.io/coordex/

</details>


### [1066] [LaST-HD: Learning Latent Physical Reasoning from Scalable Human Data for Robot Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23685)
*Jiaming Liu,Yinxi Wang,Chenyang Gu,Siyuan Qian,Xiangju Mi,Hao Chen,Jiawei Chen,Qingpo Wuwu,Xiaoqi Li,Nuowei Han,Yiming Zhang,Xuheng Zhang,Yang Yue,Yeqing Yang,Lei Wang,Peng Jia,Hao Tang,Shanghang Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出LaST-HD范式，通过在共享隐空间中对齐人类手部与机器人动作的物理动力学（而非仅几何运动），结合低成本OOL手套采集高精度手部数据及渐进式混合训练策略，仅用20分钟人类演示即实现>90%任务准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类手部示范是机器人学习的重要数据源，但跨形态迁移需超越运动学匹配，解决人类与机器人操控中物理动力学的对齐问题。

Method: 提出LaST-HD范式：构建动作条件化的辅助世界模型，在无配对的人类手部与机器人轨迹上合成统一隐空间目标；在该前向动力学空间中对齐跨形态表征，并以此监督隐式推理过程；配套开发低成本OOL手套采集手部关键点；采用混合人机共训练+人类在线校正的渐进训练流程。

Result: LaST-HD仅用20分钟OOL手套数据即可在新环境中达到90%以上准确率；混合共训练显著提升对新物体、场景和位姿的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 物理动力学对齐比纯运动学映射更有利于人类示范到机器人动作的有效迁移；隐式推理空间与高质量人类数据结合可大幅降低机器人学习对真实机器人交互数据的依赖。

Abstract: Human-hand demonstrations provide a direct and scalable source of physical interaction data for robot learning. While manual retargeting is indispensable for establishing kinematic action correspondence across different morphologies, robust transfer requires going beyond geometry to address the underlying alignment of physical dynamics between human and robot manipulation. To address this, we introduce LaST-HD, a novel human-to-robot action learning paradigm that extends reasoning-before-acting VLA by aligning human-hand and robot demonstrations in a shared latent reasoning space. Rather than mimicking human kinematics, LaST-HD trains an auxiliary action-conditioned world model on unpaired human-hand and robot trajectories to synthesize unified latent targets. After aligning cross-embodiment representations in this shared forward-dynamics space, these targets supervise LaST-HD's latent reasoning process, enabling it to internalize shared physical dynamics and drive efficient human-hand action learning. Moreover, we develop Out-of-Lab (OOL) Glove, a low-cost motion-capture glove tailored to LaST-HD for human-hand data collection. The captured human data provide precise keypoints and serve as universal action supervision across grippers and dexterous hands. Armed with the aligned latent space and high-fidelity human-hand data, we develop a progressive mixed-to-human training recipe comprising mixed human-robot co-training and human-hand online correction post-training. Through mixed co-training, LaST-HD improves generalization to novel objects, scenes, and positions using only human-hand demonstrations. With online correction, LaST-HD further adapts to novel environments and achieves over 90\% accuracy using only 20 minutes of OOL glove data.

</details>


### [1067] [LIBERO-Safety: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Physical and Semantic Safety in Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23686)
*Rongxu Cui,Zongzheng Zhang,Jingrui Pang,Haohan Chi,Jinbang Guo,Saining Zhang,Shaoxuan Xie,Xin Jin,Yao Mu,Jiaolong Yang,Guocai Yao,Xianyuan Zhan,Ya-Qin Zhang,Hao Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出LIBERO-Safety，一个面向视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的安全性基准，包含参数化安全场景生成、keypose驱动的数据生成流程，以及大规模无碰撞演示数据集；系统评估发现安全性与泛化能力存在张力，并揭示了轨迹合成与语义对齐等关键失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在严格安全约束下的操作安全性尚未得到充分验证，亟需可扩展、可复现的安全评估基准。

Method: 构建参数化安全基准以生成具有强随机性的安全关键场景；设计keypose驱动的数据生成流水线，替代人工遥操作；构建含19,664条严格无碰撞演示、具备广泛域随机化的数据集；对8个VLA模型和2个具身基础模型开展跨范式系统评估。

Result: 发现高多样性训练虽提升轨迹安全性，但任务成功率受限于次优轨迹合成与语义错位；识别出若干典型安全失败模式；发布可扩展的评估基础设施与高质量安全数据集。

Conclusion: LIBERO-Safety为安全可靠的VLA模型研发提供了关键基础，强调需协同优化安全性、轨迹规划与语义理解。

Abstract: Despite the impressive manipulation capabilities of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, their operational safety under strict constraints remains largely unverified. To address this, we introduce a parametric safety benchmark to procedurally generate safety-critical scenarios with comprehensive stochasticity. To overcome the scalability bottlenecks of human teleoperation, we develop a novel keypose-driven data generation pipeline. Leveraging this infrastructure, we curate a large-scale dataset of 19,664 strictly collision-free demonstrations with extensive domain randomization. We then conduct a systematic cross-paradigm evaluation of eight VLA and two embodied foundation models. Our analysis reveals a critical generalization-safety tension: although high-diversity training fosters safer trajectories, task success remains fundamentally bottlenecked by sub-optimal trajectory synthesis and semantic misalignment. By providing a scalable pipeline, a robust dataset, and profound failure-mode insights, LIBERO-Safety establishes a crucial foundation for developing safe and reliable VLA models.

</details>


### [1068] [AutoDex: An Automated Real-World System for Dexterous Grasping Data Collection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23689)
*Mingi Choi,Gunhee Kim,Jisoo Kim,Taeksoo Kim,Taeyun Ha,Jongbin Lim,Hanbyul Joo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出AutoDex系统，实现全自动、无人干预的真实世界灵巧抓取数据采集，显著提升数据规模与质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实世界灵巧抓取数据稀缺：遥操作效率低且带偏见，仿真数据无法保证接触有效性；亟需一种可规模化、物理验证可靠的自动采集闭环系统。

Method: 设计AutoDex全自动系统：集成20相机稠密感知（应对严重手-物遮挡）、碰撞监控机械臂执行、自动成功/失败标注、主动物体重置机制；支持可替换的抓取候选生成器，并构建可检索、可行性过滤的物理标注数据库。

Result: 在100个多样物体上，使用Allegro和Inspire手完成3593次抓取试验，含多视角同步观测与机器人状态日志；相比遥操作，500次轨迹采集耗时从49.4小时降至10.3小时（4.8倍提速）；基于AutoDex验证库检索的抓取成功率76%，远高于纯仿真验证的34%。

Conclusion: AutoDex首次实现了高通量、全闭环、无人干预的真实抓取数据采集，所建数据库显著提升下游抓取策略的泛化性与可靠性，为灵巧操作学习提供高质量物理标注基础。

Abstract: Learning robust dexterous grasping requires real-world data that records the physical outcomes of grasp attempts. Such data is hard to obtain at scale: teleoperation yields valid physical outcomes but is slow and operator-biased, while simulation-based generation is cheap and scalable but cannot certify contact validity. A natural solution is to generate candidate grasps and verify them on real hardware, but this scales only if the entire collection loop (perception, execution, labeling, and reset) runs without human intervention. We present AutoDex, an automated real-world data-collection system that closes this loop: for each candidate from a replaceable generator, it localizes the object under severe hand-object occlusion with dense 20-camera perception, executes collision-monitored robot motions, labels lift-and-hold success or failure, and actively resets the object between trials to expose additional candidates across stable poses. The result is a reusable database of physically labeled grasp trials that downstream systems can query by retrieval and feasibility filtering. Using AutoDex, we collect 3,593 grasp trials across Allegro and Inspire hands on 100 diverse objects, with synchronized multi-view observations and robot-state logs. For a matched 500-trajectory collection, AutoDex requires 10.3 h versus 49.4 h for teleoperation, yielding a 4.8x throughput improvement, and grasps retrieved from the AutoDex-validated database succeed 76% versus 34% for simulation-only validation. Code and data will be publicly released.

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [1069] [Multimodal Image Colorization: Quantifying the Impact of Text-Conditioned Guidance on Grayscale-to-Color Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20722)
*Colten Reissmann,Hugo Garrido-Lestache Belinchon*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文研究了文本条件对灰度图像着色模型的影响，通过对比U-Net和Stable Diffusion 1.5两种架构在有无CLIP文本条件下的性能，发现文本条件显著提升了PSNR、SSIM、colorfulness等指标，并降低了LPIPS，表明其能一致提升着色质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 灰度图像自动上色在历史照片修复、医学成像和艺术媒体中具有广泛应用，但因同一灰度图对应多种合理着色方案，仍是计算机视觉中的重大挑战。

Method: 定量评估文本条件对像素级和感知指标的影响；对比U-Net与Stable Diffusion 1.5两种架构在有/无CLIP文本条件下的表现，其余变量保持一致。

Result: U-Net中，文本条件使PSNR提升5.6%、SSIM提升1.2%、colorfulness提升36.6%，LPIPS降低7.6%；Stable Diffusion中，PSNR提升5.8%、SSIM提升1.5%、colorfulness提升0.6%，LPIPS降低11.3%。

Conclusion: 文本条件可一致、显著地提升不同规模架构的灰度图像着色质量。

Abstract: Grayscale images are commonly found in historical photography restoration, medical imaging, and artistic media. However, automatically applying color to these images remains a significant challenge in computer vision because many plausible colorizations can correspond to the same grayscale input.
  In this work, we quantify the effect of text conditioning on pixel-level and perceptual metrics for grayscale-to-color image models. Specifically, we compare two architectures, a U-Net and Stable Diffusion 1.5, each tested with and without CLIP text conditioning while holding all other variables constant. Our results show that text conditioning improves PSNR by 5.6%, SSIM by 1.2%, and colorfulness by 36.6%, while reducing LPIPS by 7.6% in the U-Net tier. In the Stable Diffusion tier, text conditioning improves PSNR by 5.8%, SSIM by 1.5%, and colorfulness by 0.6%, while reducing LPIPS by 11.3%. These results indicate that text conditioning provides consistent, measurable improvements to colorization quality across both architecture scales.

</details>


### [1070] [PIAvatar: Physically Interactive Avatars via Deformation Gradient Decoupling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21162)
*Sang-Hun Han,Min-Gyu Park,Jisu Shin,Seunghyun Shin,Jin-Hwi Park,Hae-Gon Jeon*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出PIAvatar框架，通过解耦运动学速度与变形梯度，在Material Point Method框架中实现物理感知的3D人体化身交互（人-物、人-人）与非刚性形变模拟，并引入骨骼结构支持实时姿态估计与跟踪。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D人体化身虽具高视觉保真度，但缺乏真实物理交互能力；已有方法仅支持有限物理形变，导致交互行为受限。

Method: 提出PIAvatar框架：1）解耦kinematic velocity与deformation gradient以建模外力下的应力响应；2）在化身中集成骨骼结构以实现闭式姿态估计与实时跟踪；3）基于传统Material Point Method实现物理一致的动力学模拟。

Result: 在人-物和人-人交互场景中验证了该方法能支持多样化的物理交互行为，实现逼真的非刚性形变与实时姿态跟踪。

Conclusion: PIAvatar成功实现了兼具物理真实性与实时性的3D人体化身交互与形变模拟，为虚拟化身在复杂交互环境中的应用提供了新范式。

Abstract: 3D human avatars have shown impressive visual fidelity driven by pose-conditioned models, yet they still lack the physical ability required for interactions with each other and environments. Although recent studies have made various attempts to incorporate physical characteristics into 3D avatars, they only exhibit limited physical deformations, often leading to constrained interaction behaviors. To resolve this issue, we present PIAvatar, a framework to simultaneously enable physically aware interactions between avatar-avatar and avatar-environment, and a non-rigid deformable human body simulation. In this work, our key insight is to decouple kinematic velocity from deformation gradient. When external forces act on avatars, the kinematic velocity induces stress which hinders the avatar's ability to achieve a desired pose. In addition, we integrate a skeletal framework within the avatar. It allows estimating its poses and real-time tracking in a closed form, even during non-rigid physical interactions. Our approach is implemented within a conventional Material Point Method framework to ensure physically consistent dynamics. We lastly evaluate the method on both human-object and human-human interaction scenarios to assess its behavior under diverse interaction settings.

</details>


### [1071] [Scene-Level Heterogeneous Physics Simulation with 3D Gaussian Splats](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21753)
*Xiaoyang Liu,Shangzhe Wu,Kai Han*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种Representation Abstraction Framework，首次将3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）资产融入场景级、异构、多求解器物理仿真中，通过统一粒子表示实现3DGS与网格、流体及静态场景的双向物理交互。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）虽在渲染上达到光逼真水平，但其表示形式无法被主流物理引擎理解，现有物理模拟方法仅支持孤立、理想化环境下的对象级物理，难以处理复杂静态碰撞几何与异构资产交互。

Method: 提出Representation Abstraction Framework：将3DGS、虚拟网格、流体等多元资产统一抽象为物理粒子集；结合场景捕获所得静态碰撞边界，输入求解器无关的物理内核；再将物理结果映射回各资产的视觉重建。

Result: 实现了3DGS资产的非刚性形变、与流体/网格等CG资产及大规模静态场景的双向耦合物理交互，展示了此前不可实现的真实感联合现象。

Conclusion: 该框架成功弥合了3DGS表征与物理仿真之间的鸿沟，为构建可交互、可物理驱动的神经渲染场景提供了通用、可扩展的基础架构。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has achieved state-of-the-art photorealistic rendering, but the representation gap prevents these assets from being physically interactive. Production-grade physics engines do not understand the 3DGS representation, while prior physics-for-3DGS methods are monolithic silos. These prior works are fundamentally limited, demonstrating only object-centric physics in isolated environments, such as on an ideal plane. They are incapable of interacting with complex static collision geometry or heterogeneous assets. We propose a novel framework that, for the first time, bridges this gap by enabling 3DGS assets to participate in scene-level, heterogeneous, multi-solver physical simulations. Our core contribution is a Representation Abstraction Framework that translates all diverse assets, including 3DGS, virtual meshes, and fluids, into a unified physical particle set. This abstraction is key to enabling complex behaviors, such as the non-rigid deformation of 3DGS assets, within a unified physics pipeline. This particle set, along with the static scene collision boundaries derived from scene capture, is processed within a solver-agnostic physics kernel. The physical results are then mapped back to drive each asset's specific visual reconstruction. This architecture unlocks capabilities impossible with prior art. We demonstrate complex, two-way interactions between deformable 3DGS assets, standard CG assets such as fluids and meshes, and large-scale captured static environments, showcasing realistic coupled phenomena that were previously unattainable.

</details>


### [1072] [Single-Event Upsets in 3D Gaussian Splatting Rendering: Bit-Level Criticality, Spatial Extent, and a Parallel Support Guard](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21791)
*Faruk Alpay,Baris Basaran*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文研究了三维高斯点绘（3D Gaussian Splatting）在受单粒子翻转（SEU）影响的硬件（如航天处理器、机器人边缘设备）上的容错性问题，通过大规模可控故障注入实验发现图像失真高度集中在少数高位比特（尤其是符号位），并提出一种轻量级、理论可证的参数裁剪防护机制（support guard），显著抑制错误传播，提升鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 三维高斯点绘作为实时场景表示方法，正被部署于易受瞬态故障（如单粒子翻转）影响的硬件平台（如星载处理器、机器人边缘设备），而现有模型缺乏对浮点参数中单比特翻转导致的静默数据损坏的有效防护。

Method: 构建GPU原生并行故障注入引擎，在4个场景、6个字段、所有比特位及3种浮点格式（fp32/fp16/bf16）上注入超380万次单比特翻转；基于IEEE-754格式与渲染管线激活分析，推导出闭式扰动界以预测各比特敏感度；设计轻量级per-primitive参数裁剪防护（support guard），将各参数限制在训练期间观测到的坐标范围内。

Result: 发现图像失真高度集中于少数高位比特（如对数尺度的符号位），可致单个高斯元覆盖高达75.7%画面；所提guard仅耗时76微秒/帧，在76.8万次注入中将最坏污染面积限制在11.68%；在20000并发翻转下，PSNR从10.6 dB提升至21.8 dB；且可限制分布式渲染中被污染的tile/合成节点数量。

Conclusion: 三维高斯点绘对高位浮点比特翻转极度敏感，但其敏感性具有强结构化特征；所提出的support guard是一种低开销、可证明安全、适用于实际部署的容错机制，为神经渲染系统在关键嵌入式场景中的可靠性提供了实用保障。

Abstract: Three-dimensional Gaussian splatting is a standard real-time scene representation increasingly deployed on hardware exposed to transient faults, such as spaceborne processors and robotic edge devices where silent data corruption occurs. A trained model is a large array of floating-point parameters in GPU memory, where a single-event upset corresponds to a single flipped bit. This paper measures these effects and constructs a defense. A GPU-resident parallel fault-injection engine applies over 3.8 million controlled single-bit upsets across four scenes, six fields, all bit positions, and three numeric formats (fp32, fp16, bf16), using 5.3 GPU-hours. The effect is highly concentrated: most upsets leave the image perceptually unchanged due to high redundancy, but a small set of high-order bits principally the logarithmic scale's sign bit enlarge a single primitive to cover up to 75.7% of the frame. A closed-form perturbation bound derived from the IEEE-754 layout and pipeline activations predicts this per-bit ordering. This concentration motivates a support guard: a per-primitive clamp of each parameter to the coordinate box observed during training, costing 76 us per frame. Over 768,000 guarded upsets, the worst corruption footprint is restricted to 11.68% of the frame. We prove the guard leaves clean models unchanged and prevents frame-covering corruption. Under an accumulated dose of 20,000 simultaneous upsets, the unguarded renderer degrades to 10.6 dB, whereas the guarded renderer remains at 21.8 dB. The corruption footprint also dictates the number of tile/compositing nodes contaminated in distributed renderers, where the per-node guard contains it.

</details>


### [1073] [Mesh2GS: White-Box 3DGS Construction via Plenoptic Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21898)
*Haoran Zhu,Youcheng Cai,Huangsheng Du,Jingyang Meng,Ligang Liu*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Mesh2GS的白盒式3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）构建框架，直接从网格几何出发生成3DGS表示，基于光场采样理论实现高质量全局光照渲染。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法多关注从多视角图像重建3DGS到网格，而将网格转换为3DGS的研究较少；且传统启发式绑定高斯椭球到网格的方式效果有限。

Method: 提出基于光场采样理论的3DGS构建策略，推导最小采样率与高斯分布；设计结合反照率-阴影分解的3DGS更新流程以高效捕获全局光照；引入神经光照增强模块处理非朗伯效应。

Result: 在实时共享渲染和非朗伯效应（如镜面高光）捕捉方面显著优于当前最优方法。

Conclusion: Mesh2GS是一种理论严谨、性能优越的网格到3DGS转换新范式，适用于高质量、实时、支持全局光照与复杂材质的渲染任务。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a promising method for high-quality, real-time 3D reconstruction. To associate 3DGS with mesh representations, existing methods primarily focus on 3DGS-to-mesh reconstruction from multi-view images. In contrast, the problem of converting a mesh into 3DGS has received comparatively less attention. Instead of relying on heuristic strategies that bind 3D Gaussians to the mesh, we propose a novel white-box 3DGS construction framework, termed Mesh2GS, which generates 3DGS directly from mesh geometry based on plenoptic sampling theory, achieving Nyquist-level performance for high-quality global illumination rendering. Firstly, we propose a plenoptic sampling guided 3DGS construction strategy that theoretically derives the minimum sampling rate of the sampled views and the distribution of 3D Gaussians. Second, we propose a novel 3DGS update procedure with albedo--shading decomposition for efficient global-illumination capture. Finally, we introduce a neural illumination enhancement module to handle non-Lambertian effects. Experimental results demonstrate that our method surpasses state-of-the-art baselines and is practically effective for both real-time shared rendering and non-Lambertian effects capturing specular highlights. The project code will be released upon acceptance.

</details>


### [1074] [Lighting-Consistent Object Transfer Across Radiance Fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22481)
*Nicolás Violante,George Kopanas,Linus Franke,Julien Philip,George Drettakis*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的光照一致性方法，用于将3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）重建中的物体从源场景迁移至目标场景，并在渲染后通过图像级光照谐调与3D重建优化实现逼真合成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 直接将3DGS中提取的物体粘贴到另一场景会导致光照不一致，影响真实感，现有方法难以兼顾易用性与质量。

Method: 构建一个扩散模型，输入为光照不一致的合成图像，输出为光照一致的图像；训练数据融合合成、生成与真实图像对；整体流程包括物体提取、视图渲染、逐视图扩散谐调、3DGS后优化重建。

Result: 在多个场景上实现了高质量、视觉逼真的跨场景物体合成，显著优于先前方法，且流程端到端、易于使用。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了3DGS间物体迁移的光照一致性难题，将图像级谐调与3D重建结合，提升了实用性与渲染质量。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) is widely used to capture and render real scenes. Compositing objects from one capture into another has applications in many domains, such as VFX, architecture and interior design, or marketing. However, extracting an object from a source scene and naively pasting it into a target scene will fail to produce realistic results due to the different lighting conditions between the two scenes. To address this problem, we introduce a diffusion model that harmonizes naively composited images with inconsistent lighting. The model is trained with a heterogeneous dataset of image pairs (inconsistent composite input, consistent output), combining synthetic, generated, and real data. Our complete 3D solution allows a user to extract an object from the source scene and composite it into the target scene. From this, the (inconsistent) views of the target scene with the composite object are rendered. Our diffusion model harmonizes each one of these views, which are finally consolidated in a 3DGS representation with a post-optimization step. Our method provides visually compelling results, making object transfer between 3DGS easy to use and significantly improving quality compared to previous methods.

</details>


### [1075] [Line Drawings using LightBenders: Authoring and Illuminating](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22499)
*Hamed Alimohammadzadeh,Shahram Ghandeharizadeh*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为LightBender的无人机系统，通过硬件（带伺服关节和可寻址LED灯条的无人机）与软件（自动规划、Blender插件、SVG导入工具）协同实现空中动态线稿与字体照明，并经用户实验验证其定位误差在视觉上可接受。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统二维线稿和字体照明受限于物理介质，缺乏空间动态表现力；本文旨在探索利用多无人机协同在三维空间中实时、动态地投射和动画化二维图形的新范式。

Method: 设计并构建了LightBender硬件平台（含伺服调节机构与高密度LED），开发了三部分软件：1）自动计算最少无人机数、规避气流干扰的编队规划与SFL文件生成/执行算法；2）Blender插件支持图形创作、动画设计与一键部署；3）支持SVG导入的LB-Author工具链。并通过IRB批准的21人用户研究评估定位精度对观感质量的影响。

Result: 系统实现了任意线稿与字母的空中照明与动画；用户研究表明最大10.1 mm定位误差在所有测试内容中均被感知为可接受，观感质量中位数评分为8（0–10分）。

Conclusion: LightBender验证了利用可重构无人机集群进行空中光绘的可行性与实用性，其软硬件协同架构为沉浸式光艺术、交互展示与新型人机界面提供了新路径。

Abstract: This study presents the hardware and software architecture of a transformative system for illuminating line drawings and letterforms. These mid-air illuminations are indoors and might be animated. The hardware contribution is a drone equipped with servo-actuated rod joints and a dense, addressable LED strip that enables arbitrary orientation, a LightBender. The software contributions are threefold. First, the system implements algorithms and heuristics to estimate the minimum number of LightBenders required to render a line drawing or letterform, stagger swarm formations to mitigate LightBender downwash, generate Swarm Flight and Lighting (SFL) files, and execute these files using a swarm of LightBenders to illuminate line drawings and letterforms. Second, a Blender add-on enables users to register LightBenders, author graphics and animations represented by swarms of LightBenders, and deploy the swarm for illumination through one-click functions. Third, users may import SVG files into either the Blender add-on or a standalone LB-Author tool to illuminate line drawings directly from vector graphics.
  We present results from an IRB-approved human subject study (n=21) to evaluate the impact of LightBender misalignment on the perceived illuminations. Obtained results demonstrate that the system's 10.1 mm maximum misalignment is perceptually acceptable across tested illuminations, with a median quality rating of 8 on a 0-10 scale.

</details>


### [1076] [Illuminating English Letters Using a Flying Light Speck](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22592)
*Hamed Alimohammadzadeh,Shahram Ghandeharizadeh*

Main category: cs.GR
