TL;DR: 本文设计并实现了一种飞行光斑（FLS）系统，用于照亮英文字母，并通过定量与定性（含20人IRB批准的人因实验）评估其性能，发现定位误差为42–56毫米，且字母呈现顺序显著影响检测时长。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一种能自主定位并沿轨迹照亮英文字母的微型飞行光斑系统，以探索新型人机交互或光学显示应用。

Method: 设计并实现搭载摄像头和嵌入式计算单元的飞行光斑（FLS）系统，使其能实时定位并跟踪预定轨迹以照亮字母；通过定量测量误差与IRB批准的20人用户实验进行综合评估。

Result: FLS系统定位误差为42至56毫米，影响字母识别；实验发现字母呈现顺序对用户检测时长有显著影响。

Conclusion: FLS具备基本字母照明能力，但精度需提升以保障可读性；呈现顺序是影响人因表现的关键因素，应在后续交互设计中予以重视。

Abstract: This paper presents the design and implementation of a Flying Light Speck (FLS) to illuminate English letters. The FLS uses its onboard camera and computing to localize and follow a trajectory to illuminate a letter. We evaluate the illuminations quantitatively and qualitatively. The latter is based on an IRB approved human subject study with 20 participants. The obtained results show a 42 to 56 millimeter error that impacts the detection of letters. A key finding is that the order in which the illumination of letters is presented to subjects has a significant effect on detection duration.

</details>


### [1077] [DJM: Compact Base Meshes for Displacement Mapping using Triangle Jacobians](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22880)
*Congyi Zhang,Nicholas Vining,Yanhong Lin,Alireza Khatami,Ziyu Sun,Xiaohu Guo,Wenping Wang,Alla Sheffer*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出DJM（Displacement Jacobian Metric）方法，通过引入位移函数的雅可比矩阵来指导基础网格构建，在保证双射性和低参数畸变的前提下，实现高精度与小尺寸的权衡优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将精细三角网格转换为基于粗略基网格的位移函数表示时，需兼顾基网格三角形数量少和位移函数逼近精度高；而高精度要求位移映射具有双射性且参数畸变低。

Method: 提出基于雅可比度量（DJM）的基网格构造方法，改进QEM简化算法，约束位移映射为双射且满足雅可比下界；全程显式维护输入网格与基网格的映射关系，结合鲁棒的逆重心坐标位移求解器获取稠密对应关系。

Result: 在重建精度与网格尺寸的权衡上优于现有方法，并验证了其在微网格渲染和神经编码任务中的鲁棒性与实用性。

Conclusion: DJM方法通过几何感知的雅可比约束提升了位移表示的质量，为紧凑几何表示提供了更优的基础网格生成方案。

Abstract: Representing complex geometry as a displacement function defined over a coarse base mesh enables compact storage and accelerated rendering. The core challenge in converting detailed triangle meshes into this representation is computing base meshes that have as few triangles as possible, while also supporting displacement functions that accurately approximate the input. Accurate approximation requires the supported displacement functions to bijectively map the input surface onto the base with low parametric distortion. We observe that this distortion can be measured by evaluating the pointwise Jacobian of the displacement functions. Our new DJM (Displacement Jacobian Metric)-based base-mesh construction method uses the Jacobian of the displacement functions to guide base mesh computation, enabling us to outperform prior approaches in terms of accuracy to size trade-off. We achieve this goal by proposing a variant of the QEM-based simplification scheme that constrains the displacement mapping between the input and the base to be bijective and low distortion (defined as satisfying a lower bound on the mapping Jacobian). When evaluating and encoding the displacement maps, we avoid unreliable ray-mesh intersections by explicitly storing the mapping between the input mesh and the base throughout the construction process, and use this mapping within a robust inverse barycentric displacement solver to obtain dense base-to-mesh correspondences to assist all computations. We demonstrate DJM to outperform alternative schemes in terms of reconstruction accuracy to size trade-off, and demonstrate its robustness and usability for micromesh-based rendering and neural encoding.

</details>


### [1078] [Controllable Texture Tiling with Transformed RoPE-Enhanced Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22945)
*Junrong Huang,Zhiyuan Zhang,Rui Tang,Hongbo Fu,Jnig Liao*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于扩散变换器（Diffusion Transformers）的可控高保真纹理平铺新框架，通过坐标变换旋转嵌入和分离注意力掩码两大技术创新，实现对纹理频率、方向、尺度的精确控制，同时保持参考纹理结构完整性和场景光照几何一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有材质迁移和参考引导修复方法难以满足用户指定参数（如频率、方向、尺度）下的纹理平铺需求；生成方法常因像素重采样或语义编码器缺乏细粒度空间信息而破坏纹理结构，并难以保持原始场景的光照与几何一致性。

Method: 提出基于Diffusion Transformers的框架，包含两项核心技术：1）坐标变换旋转嵌入机制——将2D仿射变换直接作用于目标隐变量与图像条件间的相对位置编码，避免显式像素扭曲；2）分离注意力掩码——阻止参考特征的语义泄露，保障结构完整性并实现与原场景光照几何的无缝融合。

Result: 大量实验表明，该方法在控制精度和纹理保真度上均优于当前最优基线方法。

Conclusion: 所提框架有效解耦了空间操控与内容生成，实现了用户可控、结构保真、光照几何一致的高质量纹理平铺。

Abstract: Realistic integration of user-specified textures into scene images is a fundamental task in computer graphics and image editing. While existing material transfer and reference-guided inpainting methods can edit surface appearances, they often fail to address the specific requirements of texture tiling. This task necessitates precisely repeating a reference pattern according to user-defined parameters such as frequency, orientation, and scale. Furthermore, current generative approaches often struggle to maintain the structural fidelity of the reference texture, limited by either destructive pixel-level resampling or the lack of fine-grained spatial information in semantic image encoders, and they frequently fail to preserve the coherent lighting and geometry of the original scene. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for controllable and high-fidelity texture tiling based on Diffusion Transformers. Our approach introduces two key technical innovations to decouple spatial manipulation from content generation. First, we propose a Coordinate-Transformed Rotary Embedding mechanism. By applying 2D affine transformations directly to the relative positional embeddings between the target latent and the image condition, we achieve precise control over tiling patterns without explicit pixel warping, thereby utilizing the full information of the reference condition without degradation. Second, a Disjoint Attention Mask is employed to shield reference features from semantic leakage. This preserves structural integrity while seamlessly blending the synthesized texture with the scene's original lighting and geometry. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both control accuracy and texture fidelity.

</details>


### [1079] [VolHuMe: a High-Resolution Large Scale Dataset of Volumetric Human Meshes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23062)
*Giulia Martinelli,Niccolò Bisagno,Nicola Garau,Esa Rahtu,Nicola Conci*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: VolHuMe is a high-quality 4D human scan dataset captured with 64 RGB and 32 depth cameras, featuring 104 subjects and rich ground truth (e.g., SMPL-X, high-res meshes, multi-view images, garment segmentation, hand/face geometry); it emphasizes close-range, high-resolution capture for improved geometric and texture fidelity, and serves to benchmark and expose limitations of current 3D/4D human reconstruction methods.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Prior human datasets rely mainly on full-body imagery, lacking fine-grained body-part details; VolHuMe addresses this by using close-range, high-resolution volumetric capture to improve geometric fidelity and texture resolution.

Method: Capture of 4D human scans using a state-of-the-art volumetric studio with 64 RGB and 32 depth cameras; collection and annotation of diverse ground truth modalities including SMPL-X, high-resolution meshes, multi-view RGB/depth, rigged meshes, point clouds, garment segmentation, and detailed hand/facial geometry.

Result: VolHuMe contains 104 high-quality individual subject captures with extensive ground truth; benchmarking on state-of-the-art 3D/4D reconstruction methods demonstrates its quality and reveals limitations in current evaluation testbeds.

Conclusion: VolHuMe sets a new standard for high-fidelity 4D human data, enabling advances in human modeling and reconstruction, while highlighting the need for more rigorous and fine-grained evaluation protocols.

Abstract: We introduce VolHuMe, a dataset of high-quality 4D human scans captured with a state-of-the-art volumetric studio using 64 RGB and 32 depth cameras. VolHuMe contains individual captures of 104 subjects and provides extensive ground truth, including SMPL-X, high-resolution meshes, multi-view RGB/depth images, rigged meshes, point clouds, garment segmentation, and detailed hand and facial geometry. Unlike prior datasets that primarily rely on full-body imagery, VolHuMe uses a close-range, high-resolution capture setup that preserves fine-grained body-part details, improving geometric fidelity and texture resolution. We benchmark VolHuMe on state-of-the-art methods across 3D and 4D human reconstruction tasks, showcasing the dataset's quality and exposing the limitations of current evaluation testbeds.

</details>


### [1080] [MeshFlow: Mesh Generation with Equivariant Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23489)
*Qi Sun,Kiyohiro Nakayama,Jing Nathan Yan,Qixing Huang,Alexander Rush,Leonidas Guibas,Gordon Wetzstein,Jing Liao,Guandao Yang*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: MeshFlow 提出了一种直接生成三角网格（triangle soups）的新方法，利用等变最优传输流匹配模型，保持面和顶点排列的对称性，相比自回归方法实现约18倍推理加速且保持同等质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 直接生成网格困难在于其内在对称性（如面和顶点的排列不变性），传统自回归序列化方式效率低且破坏对称性。

Method: 提出等变最优传输流匹配模型，改进Diffusion Transformer架构以建模满足排列不变性的速度场，并设计基于最优传输的训练目标以消除违反对称性的监督信号。

Result: MeshFlow 在网格质量上媲美当前最优自回归方法，推理速度提升约18倍。

Conclusion: MeshFlow 通过显式建模三角网格的对称性，实现了高效、高质量的直接网格生成，为3D生成提供了新范式。

Abstract: Meshes are among the most common 3D scene representations, but directly generating meshes is challenging because the representation contains important symmetries, including permutation invariance of faces and vertices. MeshFlow learns to generate triangle meshes directly as triangle soups, avoiding the need to serialize meshes into long autoregressive sequences. We adopt equivariant optimal-transport flow matching models that respect the key symmetries of triangle soups: arbitrary permutations of faces and permutations of the vertices within each face.
  Toward this goal, we propose a simple yet effective modification to the Diffusion Transformer architecture, resulting in a scalable network capable of modeling a velocity field while maintaining the desired equivariance. We further introduce an optimal-transport-based training objective that improves convergence by eliminating supervision signals that violate these symmetries. MeshFlow achieves mesh quality comparable to state-of-the-art autoregressive mesh generators while providing about an 18$\times$ speedup during inference. Project page is at https://qiisun.github.io/MeshFlow/.

</details>


<div id='cs.MA'></div>

# cs.MA [[Back]](#toc)

### [1081] [Specialize Roles, Mix Deployments: Pushing the Cost-Accuracy Frontier of LLM Agent Teams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20629)
*Yinsicheng Jiang,Liang Cheng,Yeqi Huang,Yufan Zhao,Zhan Lu,Li Dong,Wenda Li,Edoardo Ponti,Luo Mai*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了AgentCARD，一个面向角色的基准测试套件，用于评估LLM代理团队在角色分配与部署模式上的成本-准确性权衡，揭示异构团队在效率与性能上的优势，并支持持续扩展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代理基准多针对固定模型或配置，难以指导成本与精度兼顾的最优部署策略；而实际多角色代理系统中，不同角色（如规划、执行、验证）对模型能力和部署方式的需求各异。

Method: 提出AgentCARD基准，包含角色分解评估框架、统一的成本建模（API/自托管/混合）、帕累托前沿分析及基于Shapley值的角色瓶颈诊断方法。

Result: 异构团队持续占据成本-精度帕累托前沿：相比同质团队，精度最高提升44%，或以低至1/12的任务成本达到同等最强性能；且最优角色分配因领域而异（如某些领域受规划器限制，另一些受执行器限制）。

Conclusion: AgentCARD为LLM代理团队的部署优化提供了可扩展、角色感知的评估范式，证实异构与混合部署是提升性价比的关键路径，并支持向更多角色（如验证）及新任务域拓展。

Abstract: LLM agents are increasingly deployed as multi-role teams, where tasks are divided across specialized roles such as planner, executor, and verifier. In these systems, cost and accuracy are no longer properties of a single model: they depend on which model fills each role and where it is hosted, including API, self-hosted, and hybrid deployment. Existing agentic benchmarks typically evaluate fixed models or fixed agent configurations, and therefore offer limited guidance for cost-accuracy-optimal deployment. We introduce AgentCARD, a role-aware benchmark suite for evaluating LLM agent teams across role assignment and deployment mode. AgentCARD combines a role-decomposed evaluation harness, a unified API/self-hosted cost model, Pareto-frontier analysis, and a Shapley-based diagnostic for identifying role bottlenecks. Our evaluation shows that heterogeneous teams consistently occupy the cost-accuracy frontier. They improve accuracy by up to $44\%$ over cost-equivalent homogeneous teams, or match the strongest homogeneous team at up to $12\times$ lower per-task cost through hybrid deployment. We further find that the best role assignment is domain-dependent: some domains are planner-bottlenecked, while others are executor-bottlenecked. Finally, AgentCARD extends beyond planner--executor teams to workflows with additional roles such as verification, and supports continual evaluation as new domains and team structures emerge. Our code is released at: https://github.com/Auto-CAP/AgentCAP

</details>


### [1082] [How Much Coordination Gain Is Real? A Paired Noise-Floor Protocol for Multi-Agent LLM Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20695)
*Alibek T Kaliyev,Artem Maryanskyy*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文质疑当前多智能体大语言模型协调架构的评估方法，指出在配置等价条件下，不同协议在相同模型和基准上的配对试验零差异（trial-0 disagreement）波动较大（[-3, +18]pp），多数已报道的性能提升未超出该自然波动范围；提出以 coordination-active pass^k 为最小报告协议，并基于 ET-MCP 平台实证发现两种典型读取机制（pull/intercept）在 trial-1 上无显著恢复增益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究常以微小基准提升作为架构优越性证据，但缺乏对协议间固有随机波动（尤其在 trial-0 配置等价时）的量化评估，导致结果可信度存疑。

Method: 在 Claude Haiku 4.5 和 tau²-bench 零售基准上，对 no_coord 与 intercept 等配置等价协议进行双种子（n=100 each）配对实验，计算 signed paired gaps 及 Wilson 置信区间；引入 coordination-active pass^k 协议，并依托 ET-MCP 负知识库平台隔离 reader-side 设计变量。

Result: 配置等价协议间 trial-0 配对差距达 [-3, +18]pp， pooled +5pp（Wilson CI [-2, +12]），无统计显著性；7/10 近期架构的 headline 效果低于该本地波动下限；pull 与 intercept 在 trial-1 均未提升恢复效果。

Conclusion: 当前多智能体协调架构的多数 reported gains 可能落入方法固有噪声区间；应采用 coordination-active pass^k 等更严谨的报告协议，并在 same-model 配对复现下验证有效性。

Abstract: Multi-agent LLM coordination papers report small benchmark deltas as evidence that one architecture beats another. A prior question: how much paired trial-0 disagreement do two protocols produce on the same model and benchmark when their API inputs are configuration-equivalent (matched by code inspection plus a SHA-256 byte audit), short of full identity-replay? On Claude Haiku 4.5 against tau^2-bench retail, the clean configuration-equivalent contrast (no_coord vs. intercept, both inert at trial 0) gives signed paired gaps of +10pp and 0pp across two n=100 seeds; pooled across both, +5pp with Wilson CI [-2,+12], not significant. The largest single-seed contrast (+18pp pull-vs-intercept, p_corr=0.012) did not reproduce at the second seed (-3pp, p_corr=1.0); no trial-0 contrast is significant after Bonferroni at either seed or pooled. The envelope of observed paired gaps spans [-3,+18]pp across two seeds, with pooled upper Wilson CI ~15pp. Seven of ten recent multi-agent coordination architectures report headline effects below this local floor, and one more sits inside the envelope; whether they survive a same-model paired replication is, by construction, untested in their original settings.
  We define coordination-active pass^k, pass^k restricted to trials where the coordination mechanism is logically active, as the minimum reporting protocol, with sample-size targets and runtime hooks in the body. Measurements run on ET-MCP, a task-scoped negative-knowledge store conformant with MCP 2026-07-28, used as a substrate to isolate reader-side choices, not as a contribution. On Haiku 4.5 the candidate readers (pull, intercept) do not improve trial-1 recovery; we give a preliminary diagnosis of failure modes with refinements on existing production hook surfaces.

</details>


### [1083] [Structural Distinguishability of Static and Adaptive Policy Regimes in Agent-Based Regulatory Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20699)
*Roberto Garrone*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种控制模拟基准，用于评估政策与代理双方适应性对监管结论的影响，强调需通过区分不同适应性组合的‘制度可分辨性’而非仅平均性能来评价自适应政策导向的基于代理模型（ABM）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有政策导向的基于代理模型（ABM）常将监管视为固定参数，难以区分监管结论依赖于代理适应、政策适应还是二者交互，亟需能解耦并比较不同适应性组合的方法。

Method: 基于四制度架构，构建单一可配置的排放监管ABM，系统对比四种组合：固定政策/固定代理、固定政策/自适应代理、自适应政策/固定代理、自适应政策/自适应代理；评估多种策略（包括固定策略与三种自适应控制器：设定点、安全裕度、单边控制），并引入标量指标、相对于上限的符号诊断、轨迹模式及可视化联合分析。

Result: 基准成功复现了三类控制器典型行为：设定点控制精准跟踪上限但频繁越界；安全裕度控制以保守性降低违规；单边控制可抑制违规但与自适应代理结合时易导致过度保守。此外，发现平均结果相似时，不同制度下监管结论可能显著不同。

Conclusion: 政策导向ABM的评估应聚焦于‘制度可分辨性’——即能否识别出政策适应、代理适应及其交互所导致的质性差异，而不仅关注平均性能；所提方法论（多维诊断工具集）为此提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Agent-based models are widely used to evaluate policy interventions in complex socio-technical systems, yet many policy-oriented ABMs represent regulation as a fixed scenario parameter. This limits their ability to distinguish whether regulatory conclusions depend on agent adaptation, policy adaptation, or the interaction between both. Building on a previously proposed four-regime architecture, this paper contributes a controlled simulation benchmark rather than a new general framework. Using a single configurable emissions-regulation ABM, we compare constant policy/constant agents, constant policy/adaptive agents, adaptive policy/constant agents, and adaptive policy/adaptive agents under matched simulation conditions. We evaluate naive fixed policies, tracking-aware calibrated fixed policies, and three adaptive controllers: setpoint, safety-margin, and one-sided control. The benchmark recovers expected controller archetypes: setpoint control tracks the cap but produces frequent boundary crossings, safety-margin control reduces violations through conservatism, and one-sided control can limit violations but may ratchet toward over-conservatism when combined with adaptive agents. The contribution is methodological: scalar indicators, cap-relative symbolic diagnostics, trajectory motifs, and visual inspection jointly reveal how regulatory conclusions can differ even when average outcomes appear similar. Adaptive policy-oriented ABMs should therefore be evaluated through regime distinguishability, not only through average performance.

</details>


### [1084] [Machine-Coached Policy Revision in Adaptive Agent-Based Regulatory Simulation: A Controller-Level Contestability Layer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20700)
*Roberto Garrone*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种轻量级的机器辅导式政策修订层，用于增强自适应基于智能体模型（ABM）中政策控制器的可辩驳性与可解释性，通过符号化规则表示、冲突识别与优先级调整，支持政策决策的解释、质疑、修订与再评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ABM诊断流程多为事后分析，缺乏将诊断结果系统反馈至政策控制器的机制，导致政策调整缺乏实时性与可辩驳性。

Method: 构建一个轻量级机器辅导政策修订层，将政策决策表示为可废止规则，支持冲突识别、优先级调整及解释生成，并在排放调控ABM中设计控制实验验证其效果。

Result: 在VPVA调控机制中，针对过度保守失效问题，预定义辅导模板成功添加放松规则，在保留违规、超调和波动等约束前提下显著降低失效复发率。

Conclusion: 机器辅导应被视为可解释自适应ABM在控制器层面的延伸，与因果、信息论及轨迹诊断方法互补，强调政策决策的可辩驳性而非最优性或形式保证。

Abstract: Policy-oriented agent-based models are increasingly used to study regulatory interventions in complex adaptive socio-technical systems. Recent adaptive ABM frameworks distinguish between static and adaptive agents, fixed and adaptive policies, and alternative controller designs. However, most diagnostic workflows remain ex post: trajectories are analysed after simulation, but the resulting evidence is not systematically fed back into the policy controller. This paper proposes a lightweight machine-coached policy-revision layer for adaptive agent-based regulation. The layer represents policy decisions as defeasible rules with explicit conflicts and priorities, generates explanations for controller actions, and allows diagnostic failures to be translated into rule additions, removals, or priority changes. The contribution is not a new optimal controller and does not claim formal guarantees for unrestricted machine coaching. Instead, it provides a simulation-compatible operationalization of controller-level contestability: policy decisions can be explained, challenged, revised, and re-evaluated in held-out simulation runs. A stylized emissions-regulation ABM is used as the experimental component. A controlled simulation experiment focuses on an over-conservatism failure in the VPVA regime. The predefined coaching template adds a relaxation rule to the symbolic controller, reducing over-conservatism recurrence under held-out seeds while preserving violation, overshoot, and volatility guardrails. The paper argues that machine coaching is best understood as a controller-level extension of explainable adaptive ABM, complementary to causal, information-theoretic, and trajectory-based diagnostics.

</details>


### [1085] [BARD-MARL: Byzantine-Agent Detection for Learned Communication in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20701)
*Almond Kiruthu Murimi*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出BARD-MARL方法，用于在基于学习通信的多智能体强化学习中检测拜占庭式（异常/恶意）智能体，尤其应用于自适应交通信号控制；该方法融合策略图特征与贝叶斯信任统计两类证据，在不同攻击类型下展现出互补性与高检测性能（如100智能体场景下AUC-ROC达0.982），强调需针对攻击类型进行消融分析，并明确区分协调、检测与缓解机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 学习型通信虽提升多智能体协作，但也引发信任问题——当部分智能体发生故障或变为对抗性时，通信可能被滥用；亟需在学习型通信MARL中实现对拜占庭智能体的有效检测。

Method: 提出BARD-MARL，一种后置诊断层，构建于BayesG通信基底之上；融合两类智能体级证据：1）从状态-动作轨迹提取的策略图特征；2）由BayesG隐式掩码概率计算的贝叶斯信任统计。

Result: 在SUMO交通网格多种攻击（固定动作、观测翻转、随机噪声、协同攻击）下验证有效性：25智能体时，观测翻转攻击下AUC-ROC达0.843；100智能体时，统一BARD-MARL变体在10%固定动作和协同攻击下均达0.982 AUC-ROC；两类证据呈互补性而非单一主导。

Conclusion: 学习型通信策略本身蕴含可用于诊断的有用信息；但要建立可信的鲁棒性主张，必须开展攻击特异性消融实验，并显式分离协调、检测与缓解三个环节。

Abstract: Learned communication improves coordination in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning, but it also creates a trust problem: a trained policy may route information through agents that have become faulty or adversarial. This paper studies Byzantine-agent detection for learned-communication MARL in adaptive traffic signal control. We propose BARD-MARL, a post-hoc diagnostic layer on top of BayesG, which is used as an attributed communication substrate rather than as a contribution of this paper. BARD-MARL combines two agent-level evidence streams: policy-graph features extracted from state-action trajectories and Bayesian trust statistics computed from BayesG latent mask probabilities. Across fixed-action, observation-flip, random-noise, and coordinated attacks in SUMO traffic grids, the results show that these signals are complementary rather than universally dominant. On a 25-agent grid, BARD-MARL reaches 0.843 AUC-ROC under a 10% observation-flip attack, while policy-graph-only detection reaches 0.917 AUC-ROC under a 10% coordinated attack. On a 100-agent grid, the unified BARD-MARL variant reaches 0.982 AUC-ROC for both 10% fixed-action and 10% coordinated attacks. The study shows that learned communication policies expose useful diagnostic evidence, but credible resilience claims require attack-specific ablations and explicit separation between coordination, detection, and mitigation.

</details>


### [1086] [Empowering Economic Simulation Through Situation-Aware Llm-Driven Generative System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20720)
*Zhimei Chen,Mu Chen*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出SAMAS模型，结合大语言模型（LLM）与基于智能体的建模（ABM），通过嵌入宏观经济学知识和模拟轨迹，提升个体智能体的感知与决策能力，从而更真实地模拟经济波动与拐点预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统经济建模采用自上而下范式，忽略个体差异与社会互动复杂性；现有ABM泛化能力差，难以应对未预设场景。

Method: 提出SAMAS框架，将LLM用于角色扮演式智能体建模，使其具备宏观经济学理解与历史模拟经验，联合建模宏观结构模式与微观动态行为。

Result: 在波动真实性与经济拐点预测任务上表现优于现有ABM方法。

Conclusion: LLM增强的ABM能有效 bridging 微观行为与宏观现象，为复杂经济社会系统建模提供新范式。

Abstract: Traditional economic modeling typically follows a TOP-DOWN paradigm, neglecting individual diversity and the complexity of social interactions. To better capture the complexity of societal structure, Agent-Based Modeling (ABM) employs a BOTTOM-UP solution by incorporating micro-level dynamics to generate macroeconomic phenomena. Reinforcement Learning further improves its decision-making ability through tailored reward signals. However, existing ABM systems struggle to generalize beyond predefined scenarios. Recognizing the potential of LLM-driven role-playing in perception and human-like decision-making, we propose SAMAS, which models individual agents with rich macroeconomic understanding embedded in LLMs and economic trajectories experienced in the passing simulation steps. By jointly modeling both macro-level structural patterns and micro-level dynamic behaviors, SAMAS achieves superior performance in volatility realism and turning point prediction.

</details>


### [1087] [Artificial collectives of specialists and generalists excel at different tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20877)
*John Meluso,Laurent Hébert-Dufresne,Christoph Riedl,H. Oliver Gao*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文通过系统实验研究了多智能体系统中代理的解释能力、理性限制和任务特性如何共同影响集体表现，发现不同类型的代理（专家型与通才型）在不同类型任务中的性能差异，并揭示了性能与收敛速度之间的基本权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 缺乏对人工集体的描述性科学理解，导致难以设计资源高效的多智能体系统。

Method: 通过系统实验，分析优化型智能体在不同解释能力、理性限制和任务特性下的集体表现。

Result: 解释网络属性对平均性能影响较小（0.07标准差），但在特定任务中影响显著增强（最高达1.84标准差）；专家型集体在协商类任务中表现更优，而通才型集体在生成、选择与协调类任务中更优；理性限制调节上述关系，并引出性能与收敛速度的基本权衡。

Conclusion: 多智能体系统的设计应匹配解释网络结构与任务需求及代理计算限制，以提升效率并降低能耗。

Abstract: Collective artificial intelligence, where multiple agents work on shared tasks, holds potential to solve expansive problems in fields from medicine to collective governance. But while prescriptive engineering solutions abound, we lack descriptive scientific understanding of artificial collectives, and therefore principles for how to design resource efficient multi-agent systems. Through systematic experiments with optimizing agents, we characterize how agent interpretive abilities, rationality bounds, and task qualities interact to shape collective performance. Agents range from specialists, with narrow interpretive abilities, to generalists, with broad ones. Collectives of specialists correspond to sparse, centralized networks, while collectives of generalists correspond to dense, decentralized ones. We show that interpretive network properties have small performance effects on average (0.07 standard deviations of performance). However, for specific task qualities, these effects are 4.5 times larger (0.33 sd) and can reach much higher for certain task qualities (1.84 sd). This leads collectives of generalists to perform better on tasks that involve generating, choosing, and coordinating, while collectives of specialists with a few generalist mediators perform better on tasks that involve negotiating. Rationality bounds then moderate these relationships. At loose bounds, specialists outperform generalists through more effective sampling of high-dimensional decision spaces. At tight bounds, generalists outperform specialists through better gradient estimation. A fundamental trade-off between performance and convergence speed emerges at moderate bounds. These findings suggest that multi-agent design could benefit from matching interpretive networks to both task demands and agents' computational limits, with implications for the efficiency and energy costs of multi-agent systems.

</details>


### [1088] [Monitoring Diameters of Causal Communication Graph with Spatio-Temporal Logic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21558)
*Lydia Bakiri,Jérémy Dubut,Sergio Mover*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种扩展的muTGL逻辑（加入空间视界算子），以增强其对多智能体系统中距离约束可达性与通信链长度/代价的表达能力，并提供了集中式离线监控算法，应用于共识型任务分配协议的仿真验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: muTGL逻辑虽能表达时空纠缠性质，但缺乏对特定距离内可达性及通信链长度或代价的建模能力，而这对于去中心化监控和分布式协议的图论分析至关重要。

Method: 在muTGL逻辑中引入新的‘空间视界’算子，以显式约束通信链的距离范围；证明该算子可编码其他逻辑中的模态（如可达性、逃逸）；设计并实现集中式离线监控算法。

Result: 扩展后的逻辑显著提升了对空间-时间耦合性质的刻画能力；成功应用于Consensus-Based Bundle Algorithm等分布式任务分配协议的仿真监控验证。

Conclusion: 空间视界算子有效弥补了muTGL在距离敏感性质表达上的不足，为多智能体系统的拓扑性质验证提供了更强大的形式化工具。

Abstract: Verification of multi-agent systems requires the ability to check meticulous topological properties when it comes to agents that can move through space in continuous time. This demands a logic with sufficient expressiveness to capture these dynamics. MuTGL logic has interesting properties for expressing entangled space-time properties. However, this logic lacks the expressivity needed to analyse reachability within specific distance bounds, or to track the length or the cost of communication chains: these are fundamental for decentralized monitoring, or graph-theoretic analysis of distributed protocols, where algorithmic complexities often relates with the system's communication graph diameter. We then introduce an extension of muTGL, including a new operator called the space horizon. This addition allows us to bound the distance of communication chains, hence enhancing the logic's expressiveness. We show that this operator allows to encode modalities from other logics, such as reachability or escaping which were not available in vanilla muTGL, while allowing a deeper entanglement of spatial and temporal properties. We provide a centralized offline monitoring algorithm for this logic and illustrate it on several examples on simulations of Consensus-Based Bundle Algorithms, distributed protocols for task allocation.

</details>


### [1089] [Cohort Organized Learning: Clustering Through Agreement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21743)
*Finn Henry O'Shea,Maria Elena Monzani*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Cohort Organized Learning（CoOL）的无显式距离/相似度计算的数据聚类方法，利用神经网络估计簇，并在向量数据和图像上进行了验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在提供一种不依赖显式距离或相似度计算的新型聚类方法，提升对多样化数据类型的适应性。

Method: 提出Cohort Organized Learning（CoOL），使用神经网络进行聚类；通过期望最大化（EM）推导训练梯度；设计收敛监控与聚类评估策略。

Result: CoOL可在向量数据和图像等多种数据类型上有效聚类；具备通用性，适用于任何可兼容的数据形式。

Conclusion: CoOL是一种灵活、通用的聚类框架，虽存在局限性，但在拓展至相关任务方面具有潜力。

Abstract: In this article we describe Cohort Organized Learning (CoOL), a method for clustering data without explicit distance or similarity computations. Herein, we will describe CoOL, derive the gradients determined by expectation maximization to train the networks, show how to monitor convergence during training and evaluate the clusters after training, and discuss a series of examples and use cases. We also discuss CoOL's limitations and future prospects on related tasks. Because CoOL uses neural networks to estimate the clusters, it can be used to cluster any data that can be made compatible and we illustrate this on vector data and images.

</details>


### [1090] [GARIP: A Running-Average Moving Reference for Last-Iterate Self-Play in Two-Player Zero-Sum Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22688)
*Can Savcı*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文研究了GARIP方法在双人零和博弈中的自博弈表现，通过锚定运行平均值来提升最后迭代收敛性与鲁棒性，并证明其在峰值滞后控制上的最优性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自博弈方法（如MMD、R-NaD）依赖固定或周期性快照作为参考策略，存在收敛到正则化均衡或对超参敏感等问题；本文旨在探索以运行平均为锚点的GARIP方法，揭示参考策略选择对收敛行为的本质影响。

Method: 理论分析结合实验验证：提出GARIP方法，将策略更新锚定于运行平均；通过滞后峰分析建立参考策略形状与收敛性的定量关系；在矩阵博弈、Coin Game及Connect Four/Othello等任务上对比不同锚定策略的性能。

Result: 证明运行平均在因果凸平均中唯一最小化峰值滞后；实现局部最后迭代收敛；在多个博弈任务中GARIP与R-NaD性能相当但超参更鲁棒；发现负权重（前瞻性）参考在循环深度大时进一步提升性能。

Conclusion: 参考策略的‘滞后峰’是调控自博弈动态的关键机制；GARIP凭借运行平均的最优滞后特性，在收敛性与鲁棒性间取得更好平衡，为自博弈算法设计提供新范式。

Abstract: Self-play with naive gradient ascent cycles in two-player zero-sum games: the last iterate orbits the equilibrium. Modern methods restore last-iterate convergence by regularizing toward a reference policy -- MMD a fixed one (reaching only the regularized equilibrium), R-NaD a periodic snapshot (the engine of DeepNash). We study GARIP, which anchors to the running average, and isolate what the choice of reference controls. Our central result is a mechanism: collapse tracks the peak lag of the reference, and among causal convex averages of a fixed mean lag the running average (flat profile, peak $=$ mean) uniquely minimizes that peak, while a snapshot's sawtooth has peak $= 2\times$ mean (a one-line theorem). Two consequences follow. Convergence: we prove local last-iterate convergence at constant anchor strength -- the anchor scales the base map's rotation by $1-β$, crossing the stability boundary and turning a recurrent base into a contraction (global convergence is conjectured at small $β$; we characterize a large-$β$ consensus failure). Robustness: GARIP matches R-NaD's peak performance -- on matrix games, the Coin Game, and the board games Connect Four/Othello, both moving references are far more robust than fixed-magnet and magnet-free baselines -- but is the better hyperparameter default; we report it both ways: over the full grid collapse rates are statistically indistinguishable, yet at conventional parameterizations a matched-mean-lag setting collapses in 0/40 vs 10/40 seeds (a snapshot matches it only by knowing to shorten $K$). The boundaries: an anticipatory (negative-weight) reference does better still on the stale side, and the advantage appears only where naive self-play cycles (five deep self-play loops). All experiments are pure JAX and reproducible.

</details>


### [1091] [Decentralized Autonomous Traffic Management through Corridor Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23585)
*Jasmine Jerry Aloor,Aadarsh Govada,Hamsa Balakrishnan*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体强化学习（MARL）的去中心化空中交通管理方法，用于高级空中交通（AAM）走廊网络，在无需重训练和集中协调下实现跨多走廊、不同密度与几何结构的零样本迁移与安全高效运行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自主飞行器数量增加和空域密度上升，传统集中式管理难以应对；需在AAM专用走廊中支持灵活、可扩展的去中心化轨迹规划。

Method: 扩展多智能体强化学习（MARL）框架，训练单走廊策略，并在含汇合与分叉的多走廊网络中进行零样本迁移测试，仅依赖局部协调（入、行、出行为）。

Result: 策略在不同交通密度、网络拓扑和异构飞行器性能下表现稳健；系统级指标（如边界遵从性、完成率、平均速度、间距保持等）均达到预期；无需重训练或中央协调即可实现集体有序流。

Conclusion: 基于MARL的去中心化方法可有效支撑AAM走廊网络的可扩展自主交通管理，验证了局部智能体协作生成全局有序流的可行性。

Abstract: As autonomous aircraft are introduced at scale and traffic density increases, centralized management becomes insufficient to coordinate the large numbers of crewed and uncrewed aircraft. Dedicated Advanced Air Mobility (AAM) corridors have therefore been proposed for organizing high-density autonomous traffic flows. The desire to scalably provide autonomous aircraft flexibility in trajectory planning motivates the development of decentralized approaches to traffic management in AAM corridors.
  In this work, we extend a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) approach to address the challenge of decentralized traffic flow management in air corridor networks. We test policies trained in a single-corridor setting on increasingly complex multi-corridor networks with combinations of merges and splits in a zero-shot manner. Experimental results demonstrate that learned behaviors transfer well to scenarios with varying traffic density, network geometry, and heterogeneous vehicle performance, without needing centralized coordination or model retraining. We evaluate system-level performance in terms of conformance to corridor boundaries, completion rates, average speeds, distance traveled, and maintenance of inter-aircraft separation. We find that although our policies require only locally coordinated entry, traversal, and exit behaviors, they collectively produce desirable traffic flows through the corridor network.

</details>
